title: Offline Constrained RLHF with Multiple Preference Oracles
summary: We study offline constrained reinforcement learning from human feedback with multiple preference oracles. Motivated by applications that trade off performance with safety or fairness, we aim to maximize target population utility subject to a minimum protected group welfare constraint. From pairwise comparisons collected under a reference policy, we estimate oracle-specific rewards via maximum likelihood and analyze how statistical uncertainty propagates through the dual program. We cast the constrained objective as a KL-regularized Lagrangian whose primal optimizer is a Gibbs policy, reducing learning to a convex dual problem. We propose a dual-only algorithm that ensures high-probability constraint satisfaction and provide the first finite-sample performance guarantees for offline constrained preference learning. Finally, we extend our theoretical analysis to accommodate multiple constraints and general f-divergence regularization.

AI.tldr: 研究离线约束强化学习，使用多偏好预言机，在满足保护群体福利约束下最大化目标群体效用，提出基于KL正则化拉格朗日的对偶算法，提供有限样本性能保证
AI.motivation: 针对需要在性能与安全性/公平性之间权衡的应用场景，研究如何在满足最小保护群体福利约束的前提下最大化目标群体效用，解决离线约束偏好学习问题
AI.method: 从参考策略收集的成对比较中通过最大似然估计预言机特定奖励，将约束目标转化为KL正则化拉格朗日形式，提出仅需对偶变量的算法，确保高概率约束满足
AI.result: 提供了离线约束偏好学习的首个有限样本性能保证，理论分析可扩展到多约束和一般f-散度正则化情况
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种有效的离线约束强化学习方法，能够在统计不确定性下保证约束满足，为实际应用中性能与公平性/安全性的权衡提供了理论保证

title: Adaptive Parallel Monte Carlo Tree Search for Efficient Test-time Compute Scaling
summary: Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) is an effective test-time compute scaling (TTCS) method for improving the reasoning performance of large language models, but its highly variable execution time leads to severe long-tail latency in practice. Existing optimizations such as positive early exit, reduce latency in favorable cases but are less effective when search continues without meaningful progress. We introduce {\it negative early exit}, which prunes unproductive MCTS trajectories, and an {\it adaptive boosting mechanism} that reallocates reclaimed computation to reduce resource contention among concurrent searches. Integrated into vLLM, these techniques substantially reduce p99 end-to-end latency while improving throughput and maintaining reasoning accuracy.

AI.tldr: 针对MCTS推理延迟问题，提出负向提前退出和自适应增强机制，在vLLM中显著降低p99延迟并提升吞吐量
AI.motivation: MCTS作为有效的测试时计算扩展方法，在实际应用中存在执行时间高度可变的问题，导致严重的尾部延迟。现有优化方法如正向提前退出在有利情况下能减少延迟，但在搜索无意义进展时效果有限。
AI.method: 提出负向提前退出机制，修剪无生产力的MCTS轨迹；引入自适应增强机制，重新分配回收的计算资源以减少并发搜索间的资源竞争。这些技术集成到vLLM框架中。
AI.result: 这些技术显著降低了p99端到端延迟，同时提高了吞吐量，并保持了推理准确性。
AI.conclusion: 负向提前退出和自适应增强机制能有效解决MCTS的尾部延迟问题，在保持推理性能的同时显著改善系统效率。

title: Advancing Complex Video Object Segmentation via Tracking-Enhanced Prompt: The 1st Winner for 5th PVUW MOSE Challenge
comment: 1st Place Solution for the 5th PVUW MOSE Challenge (CVPR 2026 Workshop)
summary: In the Complex Video Object Segmentation task, researchers are required to track and segment specific targets within cluttered environments, which rigorously tests a method's capability for target comprehension and environmental adaptability. Although SAM3, the current state-of-the-art solution, exhibits unparalleled segmentation performance and robustness on conventional targets, it underperforms on tiny and semantic-dominated objects. The root cause of this limitation lies in SAM3's insufficient comprehension of these specific target types. To address this issue, we propose TEP: Advancing Complex Video Object Segmentation via Tracking-Enhanced Prompts. As a training-free approach, TEP leverages external tracking models and Multimodal Large Language Models to introduce tracking-enhanced prompts, thereby alleviating the difficulty SAM3 faces in understanding these challenging targets. Our method achieved first place (56.91%) on the test set of the PVUW Challenge 2026: Complex Video Object Segmentation Track.

AI.tldr: TEP方法通过引入跟踪增强提示，解决了SAM3在微小和语义主导目标上分割性能不足的问题，在PVUW挑战赛中获得第一名
AI.motivation: 虽然SAM3在复杂视频对象分割任务中表现出色，但在微小目标和语义主导对象上表现不佳，主要原因是SAM3对这些特定目标类型的理解不足
AI.method: 提出TEP方法，这是一种无需训练的方法，利用外部跟踪模型和多模态大语言模型引入跟踪增强提示，帮助SAM3更好地理解具有挑战性的目标
AI.result: 在PVUW Challenge 2026: Complex Video Object Segmentation Track测试集上获得了第一名，得分为56.91%
AI.conclusion: 通过跟踪增强提示可以有效提升SAM3在复杂视频对象分割中对微小和语义主导目标的理解能力，显著改善分割性能

title: Multi-Camera View Scaling for Data-Efficient Robot Imitation Learning
summary: The generalization ability of imitation learning policies for robotic manipulation is fundamentally constrained by the diversity of expert demonstrations, while collecting demonstrations across varied environments is costly and difficult in practice. In this paper, we propose a practical framework that exploits inherent scene diversity without additional human effort by scaling camera views during demonstration collection. Instead of acquiring more trajectories, multiple synchronized camera perspectives are used to generate pseudo-demonstrations from each expert trajectory, which enriches the training distribution and improves viewpoint invariance in visual representations. We analyze how different action spaces interact with view scaling and show that camera-space representations further enhance diversity. In addition, we introduce a multiview action aggregation method that allows single-view policies to benefit from multiple cameras during deployment. Extensive experiments in simulation and real-world manipulation tasks demonstrate significant gains in data efficiency and generalization compared to single-view baselines. Our results suggest that scaling camera views provides a practical and scalable solution for imitation learning, which requires minimal additional hardware setup and integrates seamlessly with existing imitation learning algorithms. The website of our project is https://yichen928.github.io/robot_multiview.

AI.tldr: 通过多视角相机采集专家演示数据，无需额外人工成本即可丰富训练分布，提高模仿学习策略的泛化能力
AI.motivation: 模仿学习策略的泛化能力受限于专家演示的多样性，而收集不同环境的演示数据成本高且困难。需要一种无需额外人工努力就能利用场景多样性的实用方法。
AI.method: 在演示收集过程中扩展相机视角，使用多个同步相机视角从每个专家轨迹生成伪演示，丰富训练分布。分析不同动作空间与视角扩展的交互，引入相机空间表示增强多样性，并提出多视角动作聚合方法。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实世界操作任务中的大量实验表明，相比单视角基线，该方法在数据效率和泛化能力方面取得了显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 扩展相机视角为模仿学习提供了一个实用且可扩展的解决方案，只需最少的额外硬件设置，并能与现有模仿学习算法无缝集成。

title: Does Unification Come at a Cost? Uni-SafeBench: A Safety Benchmark for Unified Multimodal Large Models
summary: Unified Multimodal Large Models (UMLMs) integrate understanding and generation capabilities within a single architecture. While this architectural unification, driven by the deep fusion of multimodal features, enhances model performance, it also introduces important yet underexplored safety challenges. Existing safety benchmarks predominantly focus on isolated understanding or generation tasks, failing to evaluate the holistic safety of UMLMs when handling diverse tasks under a unified framework. To address this, we introduce Uni-SafeBench, a comprehensive benchmark featuring a taxonomy of six major safety categories across seven task types. To ensure rigorous assessment, we develop Uni-Judger, a framework that effectively decouples contextual safety from intrinsic safety. Based on comprehensive evaluations across Uni-SafeBench, we uncover that while the unification process enhances model capabilities, it significantly degrades the inherent safety of the underlying LLM. Furthermore, open-source UMLMs exhibit much lower safety performance than multimodal large models specialized for either generation or understanding tasks. We open-source all resources to systematically expose these risks and foster safer AGI development.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Uni-SafeBench基准测试，用于评估统一多模态大模型的安全性能，发现模型统一化虽然提升能力但显著降低安全性，开源UMLMs安全性远低于专用模型。
AI.motivation: 统一多模态大模型（UMLMs）将理解和生成能力集成在单一架构中，这种统一虽然通过多模态特征的深度融合提升了模型性能，但也引入了重要但未被充分探索的安全挑战。现有安全基准主要关注孤立的理解或生成任务，无法评估UMLMs在统一框架下处理多样化任务时的整体安全性。
AI.method: 提出了Uni-SafeBench，一个包含六大安全类别和七种任务类型的综合基准测试。开发了Uni-Judger框架，有效解耦上下文安全性和内在安全性，确保评估的严谨性。
AI.result: 基于Uni-SafeBench的综合评估发现：1）统一化过程虽然增强了模型能力，但显著降低了底层大语言模型的固有安全性；2）开源UMLMs的安全性能远低于专门用于生成或理解任务的多模态大模型。
AI.conclusion: 统一多模态大模型存在严重的安全风险，开源所有资源以系统性暴露这些风险，促进更安全的通用人工智能发展。

title: VLM-in-the-Loop: A Plug-In Quality Assurance Module for ECG Digitization Pipelines
summary: ECG digitization could unlock billions of archived clinical records, yet existing methods collapse on real-world images despite strong benchmark numbers. We introduce \textbf{VLM-in-the-Loop}, a plug-in quality assurance module that wraps any digitization backend with closed-loop VLM feedback via a standardized interface, requiring no modification to the underlying digitizer. The core mechanism is \textbf{tool grounding}: anchoring VLM assessment in quantitative evidence from domain-specific signal analysis tools. In a controlled ablation on 200 records with paired ground truth, tool grounding raises verdict consistency from 71\% to 89\% and doubles fidelity separation ($Δ$PCC 0.03 $\rightarrow$ 0.08), with the effect replicating across three VLMs (Claude Opus~4, GPT-4o, Gemini~2.5 Pro), confirming a pattern-level rather than model-specific gain. Deployed across four backends, the module improves every one: 29.4\% of borderline leads improved on our pipeline; 41.2\% of failed limb leads recovered on ECG-Digitiser; valid leads per image doubled on Open-ECG-Digitizer (2.5 $\rightarrow$ 5.8). On 428 real clinical HCM images, the integrated system reaches 98.0\% Excellent quality. Both the plug-in architecture and tool-grounding mechanism are domain-parametric, suggesting broader applicability wherever quality criteria are objectively measurable.

AI.tldr: 提出VLM-in-the-Loop插件式质量保证模块，通过工具接地机制提升心电图数字化质量，无需修改底层数字化器，在真实临床图像上达到98%优秀质量。
AI.motivation: 心电图数字化可解锁数十亿存档临床记录，但现有方法在真实世界图像上表现不佳，尽管基准测试数据良好。需要一种能提升现有数字化器质量而不修改其代码的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出VLM-in-the-Loop插件模块，通过标准化接口包装任何数字化后端，利用工具接地机制：将VLM评估锚定在特定领域信号分析工具提供的定量证据上，形成闭环反馈。
AI.result: 工具接地将判决一致性从71%提升到89%，保真度分离度翻倍(ΔPCC 0.03→0.08)；在三个VLM上效果一致；部署到四个后端均获改善：边界导联改善29.4%，失败肢体导联恢复41.2%，每图像有效导联数翻倍(2.5→5.8)；在428个真实临床HCM图像上达到98.0%优秀质量。
AI.conclusion: VLM-in-the-Loop通过工具接地机制显著提升心电图数字化质量，插件架构和工具接地机制具有领域参数化特性，可推广到其他质量标准可客观测量的领域。

title: A Physical Imitation Learning Pipeline for Energy-Efficient Quadruped Locomotion Assisted by Parallel Elastic Joint
summary: Due to brain-body co-evolution, animals' intrinsic body dynamics play a crucial role in energy-efficient locomotion, which shares control effort between active muscles and passive body dynamics -- a principle known as Embodied Physical Intelligence. In contrast, robot bodies are often designed with one centralised controller that typically suppress the intrinsic body dynamics instead of exploiting it. We introduce Physical Imitation Learning (PIL), which distils a Reinforcement Learning (RL) control policy into physically implementable body responses that can be directly offloaded to passive Parallel Elastic Joints (PEJs), enabling therefore the body to imitate part of the controlled behaviour. Meanwhile, the residual policy commands the motors to recover the RL policy's performance. The results is an overall reduced energy consumption thanks to outsourcing parts of the control policy to the PEJs. Here we show in simulated quadrupeds, that our PIL approach can offloads up to 87% of mechanical power to PEJs on flat terrain and 18% on rough terrain. Because the body design is distilled from -- rather than jointly optimised with -- the control policy, PIL realises brain-body co-design without expanding the search space with body design parameters, providing a computationally efficient route to task-specific Embodied Physical Intelligence applicable to a wide range of joint-based robot morphologies.

AI.tldr: PIL方法将强化学习控制策略蒸馏到被动并联弹性关节中，让机器人身体模仿部分控制行为，从而将机械功率卸载到被动元件，实现节能
AI.motivation: 动物通过脑体协同进化，利用内在身体动力学实现节能运动，而机器人通常采用集中式控制器抑制而非利用身体动力学。需要一种方法让机器人身体设计能够模仿控制行为，实现脑体协同设计
AI.method: 提出物理模仿学习(PIL)，将强化学习控制策略蒸馏到物理可实现的被动并联弹性关节响应中，让身体模仿部分控制行为，剩余部分由电机执行，从而将控制策略部分卸载到被动元件
AI.result: 在模拟四足机器人中，PIL方法在平坦地形可将高达87%的机械功率卸载到并联弹性关节，在崎岖地形可卸载18%，实现显著节能效果
AI.conclusion: PIL通过从控制策略蒸馏而非联合优化的方式实现脑体协同设计，不扩展搜索空间，为基于关节的机器人形态提供计算高效的任务特定具身物理智能途径

title: Lead Zirconate Titanate Reservoir Computing for Classification of Written and Spoken Digits
summary: In this paper we extend our earlier work of (Rietman et al. 2022) presenting an application of physical Reservoir Computing (RC) to the classification of handwritten and spoken digits. We utilize an unpoled cube of Lead Zirconate Titanate (PZT) as a computational substrate to process these datasets. Our results demonstrate that the PZT reservoir achieves 89.0% accuracy on MNIST handwritten digits, representing a 2.4 percentage point improvement over logistic regression baselines applied to the same preprocessed data. However, for the AudioMNIST spoken digits dataset, the reservoir system (88.2% accuracy) performs equivalently to baseline methods (88.1% accuracy), suggesting that reservoir computing provides the greatest benefits for classification tasks of intermediate difficulty where linear methods underperform but the problem remains learnable. PZT is a well-known material already used in semiconductor applications, presenting a low-power computational substrate that can be integrated with digital algorithms. Our findings indicate that physical reservoirs excel when the task difficulty exceeds the capability of simple linear classifiers but remains within the computational capacity of the reservoir dynamics.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用未极化的锆钛酸铅(PZT)立方体作为物理储层计算基底，处理手写和语音数字分类任务，发现对于中等难度任务储层计算优势最明显。
AI.motivation: 探索物理储层计算在实际分类任务中的应用潜力，特别是利用PZT这种低功耗、可集成的半导体材料作为计算基底，验证储层计算在不同难度任务中的表现差异。
AI.method: 采用未极化的锆钛酸铅(PZT)立方体作为物理储层计算基底，处理MNIST手写数字和AudioMNIST语音数字数据集，与相同预处理数据上的逻辑回归基线进行比较。
AI.result: PZT储层在MNIST手写数字上达到89.0%准确率，比逻辑回归基线提高2.4个百分点；在AudioMNIST语音数字上达到88.2%准确率，与基线方法(88.1%)表现相当。
AI.conclusion: 物理储层计算在任务难度超过简单线性分类器能力但仍在储层动态计算能力范围内时表现最佳，PZT作为低功耗计算基底具有与数字算法集成的潜力。

title: Improving Generalization of Deep Learning for Brain Metastases Segmentation Across Institutions
summary:
Background: Deep learning has demonstrated significant potential for automated brain metastases (BM) segmentation; however, models trained at a singular institution often exhibit suboptimal performance at various sites due to disparities in scanner hardware, imaging protocols, and patient demographics. The goal of this work is to create a domain adaptation framework that will allow for BM segmentation to be used across multiple institutions.
  Methods: We propose a VAE-MMD preprocessing pipeline that combines variational autoencoders (VAE) with maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) loss, incorporating skip connections and self-attention mechanisms alongside nnU-Net segmentation. The method was tested on 740 patients from four public databases: Stanford, UCSF, UCLM, and PKG, evaluated by domain classifier's accuracy, sensitivity, precision, F1/F2 scores, surface Dice (sDice), and 95th percentile Hausdorff distance (HD95).
  Results: VAE-MMD reduced domain classifier accuracy from 0.91 to 0.50, indicating successful feature alignment across institutions. Reconstructed volumes attained a PSNR greater than 36 dB, maintaining anatomical accuracy. The combined method raised the mean F1 by 11.1% (0.700 to 0.778), the mean sDice by 7.93% (0.7121 to 0.7686), and reduced the mean HD95 by 65.5% (11.33 to 3.91 mm) across all four centers compared to the baseline nnU-Net.
  Conclusions: VAE-MMD effectively diminishes cross-institutional data heterogeneity and enhances BM segmentation generalization across volumetric, detection, and boundary-level metrics without necessitating target-domain labels, thereby overcoming a significant obstacle to the clinical implementation of AI-assisted segmentation.

AI.tldr: VAE-MMD域适应框架通过变分自编码器和最大均值差异损失，结合nnU-Net分割，显著提升脑转移瘤在多中心数据上的分割性能，无需目标域标签。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在脑转移瘤自动分割方面潜力显著，但单一机构训练的模型在不同站点因扫描硬件、成像协议和患者人口统计学差异而表现不佳。需要创建跨多机构的域适应框架。
AI.method: 提出VAE-MMD预处理管道，结合变分自编码器（VAE）和最大均值差异（MMD）损失，包含跳跃连接和自注意力机制，与nnU-Net分割结合。在斯坦福、UCSF、UCLM和PKG四个公共数据库的740名患者上进行测试。
AI.result: VAE-MMD将域分类器准确率从0.91降至0.50，表明跨机构特征对齐成功。重建体积PSNR大于36dB，保持解剖准确性。相比基线nnU-Net，平均F1提升11.1%（0.700到0.778），平均表面Dice提升7.93%（0.7121到0.7686），平均HD95降低65.5%（11.33到3.91mm）。
AI.conclusion: VAE-MMD有效减少跨机构数据异质性，在体积、检测和边界层面指标上增强脑转移瘤分割泛化能力，无需目标域标签，克服了AI辅助分割临床实施的重要障碍。

title: StretchBot: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Adaptive Guidance with Assistive Robots
summary: Assistive robots have growing potential to support physical wellbeing in home and healthcare settings, for example, by guiding users through stretching or rehabilitation routines. However, existing systems remain largely scripted, which limits their ability to adapt to user state, environmental context, and interaction dynamics. In this work, we present StretchBot, a hybrid neuro-symbolic robotic coach for adaptive assistive guidance. The system combines multimodal perception with knowledge-graph-grounded large language model reasoning to support context-aware adjustments during short stretching sessions while maintaining a structured routine. To complement the system description, we report an exploratory pilot comparison between scripted and adaptive guidance with three participants. The pilot findings suggest that the adaptive condition improved perceived adaptability and contextual relevance, while scripted guidance remained competitive in smoothness and predictability. These results provide preliminary evidence that structured actionable knowledge can help ground language-model-based adaptation in embodied assistive interaction, while also highlighting the need for larger, longitudinal studies to evaluate robustness, generalizability, and long-term user experience.

AI.tldr: StretchBot是一个混合神经符号机器人教练，通过结合多模态感知和知识图谱增强的大语言模型推理，为辅助伸展训练提供自适应指导，相比脚本化系统能更好地适应用户状态和环境上下文。
AI.motivation: 现有的辅助机器人系统大多是脚本化的，缺乏根据用户状态、环境上下文和交互动态进行自适应调整的能力，限制了它们在家庭和医疗保健环境中的物理健康支持潜力。
AI.method: 开发了StretchBot系统，采用混合神经符号架构，结合多模态感知与基于知识图谱的大语言模型推理，在保持结构化常规的同时支持上下文感知的调整。
AI.result: 初步探索性试验（3名参与者）表明，自适应条件在感知适应性和上下文相关性方面优于脚本化指导，而脚本化指导在流畅性和可预测性方面仍具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 结构化可操作知识可以帮助基于语言模型的自适应在具身辅助交互中落地，但需要更大规模的纵向研究来评估系统的鲁棒性、泛化能力和长期用户体验。

title: COTTA: Context-Aware Transfer Adaptation for Trajectory Prediction in Autonomous Driving
summary: Developing robust models to accurately predict the trajectories of surrounding agents is fundamental to autonomous driving safety. However, most public datasets, such as the Waymo Open Motion Dataset and Argoverse, are collected in Western road environments and do not reflect the unique traffic patterns, infrastructure, and driving behaviors of other regions, including South Korea. This domain discrepancy leads to performance degradation when state-of-the-art models trained on Western data are deployed in different geographic contexts. In this work, we investigate the adaptability of Query-Centric Trajectory Prediction (QCNet) when transferred from U.S.-based data to Korean road environments. Using a Korean autonomous driving dataset, we compare four training strategies: zero-shot transfer, training from scratch, full fine-tuning, and encoder freezing. Experimental results demonstrate that leveraging pretrained knowledge significantly improves prediction performance. Specifically, selectively fine-tuning the decoder while freezing the encoder yields the best trade-off between accuracy and training efficiency, reducing prediction error by over 66% compared to training from scratch. This study provides practical insights into effective transfer learning strategies for deploying trajectory prediction models in new geographic domains.

AI.tldr: 研究探讨了轨迹预测模型QCNet从美国数据迁移到韩国道路环境的适应性，比较了四种训练策略，发现选择性微调解码器并冻结编码器在准确性和训练效率方面达到最佳平衡。
AI.motivation: 当前大多数公开数据集（如Waymo和Argoverse）基于西方道路环境，无法反映韩国等地区的独特交通模式、基础设施和驾驶行为。这种领域差异导致基于西方数据训练的最先进模型在不同地理环境中部署时性能下降。
AI.method: 使用韩国自动驾驶数据集，比较了四种训练策略：零样本迁移、从头开始训练、完全微调以及编码器冻结。重点研究了Query-Centric Trajectory Prediction (QCNet)模型从美国数据到韩国道路环境的迁移能力。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，利用预训练知识显著提高了预测性能。具体而言，选择性微调解码器同时冻结编码器在准确性和训练效率方面达到最佳平衡，与从头开始训练相比，预测误差减少了超过66%。
AI.conclusion: 这项研究为在新地理领域中部署轨迹预测模型提供了有效的迁移学习策略实用见解，证明了预训练知识在跨域适应中的重要性，特别是编码器冻结与解码器微调的组合策略。

title: LiPS: Lightweight Panoptic Segmentation for Resource-Constrained Robotics
comment: Submitted to IEEE ICIP 2026. Under review
summary: Panoptic segmentation is a key enabler for robotic perception, as it unifies semantic understanding with object-level reasoning. However, the increasing complexity of state-of-the-art models makes them unsuitable for deployment on resource-constrained platforms such as mobile robots. We propose a novel approach called LiPS that addresses the challenge of efficient-to-compute panoptic segmentation with a lightweight design that retains query-based decoding while introducing a streamlined feature extraction and fusion pathway. It aims at providing a strong panoptic segmentation performance while substantially lowering the computational demands. Evaluations on standard benchmarks demonstrate that LiPS attains accuracy comparable to much heavier baselines, while providing up to 4.5 higher throughput, measured in frames per second, and requiring nearly 6.8 times fewer computations. This efficiency makes LiPS a highly relevant bridge between modern panoptic models and real-world robotic applications.

AI.tldr: LiPS是一种轻量级全景分割方法，在保持查询解码的同时简化特征提取和融合，实现了与大型模型相当的精度但计算量减少6.8倍，吞吐量提高4.5倍，适合资源受限的机器人平台。
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的全景分割模型过于复杂，不适合部署在移动机器人等资源受限平台上，需要一种既能保持高性能又能大幅降低计算需求的方法。
AI.method: 提出LiPS方法，保留基于查询的解码机制，但引入了简化的特征提取和融合路径，采用轻量级设计来降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，LiPS达到了与更重基线模型相当的精度，同时吞吐量提高了4.5倍（帧率），计算量减少了6.8倍。
AI.conclusion: LiPS在现代全景分割模型和实际机器人应用之间架起了高效的桥梁，为资源受限平台提供了可行的全景分割解决方案。

title: Diversity-Aware Reverse Kullback-Leibler Divergence for Large Language Model Distillation
summary: Reverse Kullback-Leibler (RKL) divergence has recently emerged as the preferred objective for large language model (LLM) distillation, consistently outperforming forward KL (FKL), particularly in regimes with large vocabularies and significant teacher-student capacity mismatch, where RKL focuses learning on dominant modes rather than enforcing dense alignment. However, RKL introduces a structural limitation that drives the student toward overconfident predictions. We first provide an analysis of RKL by decomposing its gradients into target and non-target components, and show that non-target gradients consistently push the target logit upward even when the student already matches the teacher, thereby reducing output diversity. In addition, RKL provides weak supervision over non-target classes, leading to poor tail alignment. To address these issues, we propose Diversity-aware RKL (DRKL), which removes this gradient effect and strengthens non-target supervision while preserving the optimization benefits of RKL. Extensive experiments across datasets and model families demonstrate that DRKL consistently outperforms FKL, RKL, and other state-of-the-art distillation objectives, achieving better performance and a superior fidelity-diversity trade-off.

AI.tldr: 论文提出DRKL方法解决RKL蒸馏中过度自信和尾部对齐问题，在保持RKL优化优势的同时提升多样性和性能
AI.motivation: RKL（反向KL散度）在LLM蒸馏中表现优于FKL，但存在结构性缺陷：导致学生模型过度自信预测，减少输出多样性，且对非目标类监督较弱导致尾部对齐差
AI.method: 提出多样性感知RKL（DRKL）：1）通过梯度分解分析RKL问题，发现非目标梯度持续推高目标logit；2）移除这种梯度效应；3）加强非目标监督，同时保留RKL的优化优势
AI.result: 在多个数据集和模型家族上的实验表明，DRKL一致优于FKL、RKL和其他最先进的蒸馏目标，实现了更好的性能和更优的保真度-多样性权衡
AI.conclusion: DRKL有效解决了RKL蒸馏中的过度自信和多样性问题，在保持RKL优势的同时显著提升了蒸馏效果，为LLM蒸馏提供了更优的目标函数

title: The 1st Winner for 5th PVUW MeViS-Text Challenge: Strong MLLMs Meet SAM3 for Referring Video Object Segmentation
comment: 1st Place Solution for the 5th PVUW MeViS-Text Challenge (CVPR 2026 Workshop)
summary: This report presents our winning solution to the 5th PVUW MeViS-Text Challenge. The track studies referring video object segmentation under motion-centric language expressions, where the model must jointly understand appearance, temporal behavior, and object interactions. To address this problem, we build a fully training-free pipeline that combines strong multimodal large language models with SAM3. Our method contains three stages. First, Gemini-3.1 Pro decomposes each target event into instance-level grounding targets, selects the frame where the target is most clearly visible, and generates a discriminative description. Second, SAM3-agent produces a precise seed mask on the selected frame, and the official SAM3 tracker propagates the mask through the whole video. Third, a refinement stage uses Qwen3.5-Plus and behavior-level verification to correct ambiguous or semantically inconsistent predictions. Without task-specific fine-tuning, our method ranks first on the PVUW 2026 MeViS-Text test set, achieving a Final score of 0.909064 and a J&F score of 0.7897. The code is available at https://github.com/Moujuruo/MeViSv2_Track_Solution_2026.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个无需训练的三阶段方法，在PVUW 2026 MeViS-Text挑战赛中获胜，通过结合多模态大语言模型和SAM3实现视频对象分割
AI.motivation: 解决基于运动中心语言表达的视频对象分割问题，需要模型同时理解外观、时间行为和对象交互，传统方法需要大量任务特定训练
AI.method: 三阶段无训练流程：1) Gemini-3.1 Pro分解目标事件并生成判别性描述；2) SAM3-agent生成种子掩码并由SAM3跟踪器传播；3) Qwen3.5-Plus和行为级验证进行细化修正
AI.result: 在PVUW 2026 MeViS-Text测试集上排名第一，Final分数0.909064，J&F分数0.7897，无需任务特定微调
AI.conclusion: 提出的无训练方法有效解决了基于运动语言表达的视频对象分割问题，展示了多模态大语言模型与分割模型的强大组合能力

title: SoftHand Model-W: A 3D-Printed, Anthropomorphic, Underactuated Robot Hand with Integrated Wrist and Carpal Tunnel
comment: Accepted for publication at the International Conference of Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2026, Vienna
summary: This paper presents the SoftHand Model-W: a 3D-printed, underactuated, anthropomorphic robot hand based on the Pisa/IIT SoftHand, with an integrated antagonistic tendon mechanism and 2 degree-of-freedom tendon-driven wrist. These four degrees-of-acuation provide active flexion and extension to the five fingers, and active flexion/extension and radial/ulnar deviation of the palm through the wrist, while preserving the synergistic and self-adaptive features of such SoftHands. A carpal tunnel-inspired tendon routing allows remote motor placement in the forearm, reducing distal inertia and maintaining a compact form factor. The SoftHand-W is mounted on a 6-axis robot arm and tested with two reorientation tasks requiring coordination between the hand and arm's pose: cube stacking and in-plane disc rotation. Results comparing task time, arm joint travel, and configuration changes with and without wrist actuation show that adding the wrist reduces compensatory and reconfiguration movements of the arm for a quicker task-completion time. Moreover, the wrist enables pick-and-place operations that would be impossible otherwise. Overall, the SoftHand Model-W demonstrates how proximal degrees of freedom are key to achieving versatile, human-like manipulation in real world robotic applications, with a compact design enabling deployment in research and assistive settings.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了SoftHand Model-W：一款基于Pisa/IIT SoftHand的3D打印欠驱动仿人机器人手，集成了拮抗肌腱机制和2自由度肌腱驱动腕部，通过四个驱动自由度实现手指主动屈伸和手掌腕部屈伸/桡尺偏，保持软手的协同自适应特性，腕部驱动减少了手臂补偿运动，提高了任务完成效率。
AI.motivation: 开发具有腕部驱动功能的机器人手，以增强机器人操作能力，减少手臂补偿运动，实现更高效、更自然的物体操作，特别是在需要手-臂协调的任务中。
AI.method: 设计基于Pisa/IIT SoftHand的3D打印欠驱动仿人机器人手，集成拮抗肌腱机制和2自由度肌腱驱动腕部；采用腕管式肌腱布线实现远程电机放置；将SoftHand-W安装在6轴机器人臂上，通过立方体堆叠和平面圆盘旋转任务测试手-臂协调性能。
AI.result: 腕部驱动显著减少了手臂的补偿和重配置运动，缩短了任务完成时间；腕部使原本不可能的拾放操作成为可能；近端自由度对实现真实世界应用中多样化、类人操作至关重要。
AI.conclusion: SoftHand Model-W展示了近端自由度对实现多功能、类人操作的关键作用，紧凑设计使其适用于研究和辅助应用场景，为机器人操作提供了更高效、更自然的解决方案。

title: CircuitProbe: Predicting Reasoning Circuits in Transformers via Stability Zone Detection
comment: 11 pages, 1 figure, 3 tables. Code available at https://github.com/agenticclass/circuitprobe
summary: Transformer language models contain localized reasoning circuits, contiguous layer blocks that improve reasoning when duplicated at inference time. Finding these circuits currently requires brute-force sweeps costing 25 GPU hours per model. We propose CircuitProbe, which predicts circuit locations from activation statistics in under 5 minutes on CPU, providing a speedup of three to four orders of magnitude. We find that reasoning circuits come in two types: stability circuits in early layers, detected through the derivative of representation change, and magnitude circuits in late layers, detected through anomaly scoring. We validate across 9 models spanning 6 architectures, including 2025 models, confirming that CircuitProbe top predictions match or are within 2 layers of the optimal circuit in all validated cases. A scaling experiment across the Qwen 2.5 family reveals that layer duplication consistently benefits models under 3B parameters but degrades performance in 7B+ models, making this a practical scaling technique for small language models. CircuitProbe requires as few as 10 calibration examples and its predictions are stable across English, Hindi, Chinese, and French.

AI.tldr: CircuitProbe：一种快速预测Transformer语言模型中推理电路位置的方法，速度比暴力搜索快3-4个数量级，仅需CPU上5分钟即可完成
AI.motivation: 现有方法需要耗费大量计算资源（每个模型25 GPU小时）来暴力搜索推理电路位置，需要一种更高效的检测方法
AI.method: 通过激活统计量预测电路位置：早期层使用表示变化的导数检测稳定性电路，晚期层使用异常评分检测幅度电路
AI.result: 在9个模型（涵盖6种架构）上验证，CircuitProbe的预测结果与最优电路匹配或在2层以内；层复制对3B以下参数模型有益，但对7B+模型有害
AI.conclusion: CircuitProbe提供了一种高效检测推理电路的方法，适用于小型语言模型，仅需少量校准样本且在多语言中表现稳定

title: Out of Sight, Out of Track: Adversarial Attacks on Propagation-based Multi-Object Trackers via Query State Manipulation
comment: Accepted for presentation at CVPR 2026 (main track)
summary: Recent Tracking-by-Query-Propagation (TBP) methods have advanced Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) by enabling end-to-end (E2E) pipelines with long-range temporal modeling. However, this reliance on query propagation introduces unexplored architectural vulnerabilities to adversarial attacks. We present FADE, a novel attack framework designed to exploit these specific vulnerabilities. FADE employs two attack strategies targeting core TBP mechanisms: (i) Temporal Query Flooding: Generates spurious temporally consistent track queries to exhaust the tracker's limited query budget, forcing it to terminate valid tracks. (ii) Temporal Memory Corruption: Directly attacks the query updater's memory by severing temporal links via state de-correlation and erasing the learned feature identity of matched tracks. Furthermore, we introduce a differentiable pipeline to optimize these attacks for physical-world realizability by leveraging simulations of advanced perception sensor spoofing. Experiments on MOT17 and MOT20 benchmarks demonstrate that FADE is highly effective against state-of-the-art TBP trackers, causing significant identity switches and track terminations.

AI.tldr: FADE是一种针对基于查询传播的跟踪方法的新型对抗攻击框架，通过时间查询洪泛和时间记忆破坏两种策略，利用TBP方法的架构漏洞进行攻击。
AI.motivation: 虽然基于查询传播的跟踪方法在多目标跟踪中取得了进展，但其依赖查询传播的架构存在未探索的对抗攻击漏洞。作者旨在揭示这些特定漏洞并开发相应的攻击框架。
AI.method: FADE采用两种攻击策略：1) 时间查询洪泛：生成虚假的时间一致跟踪查询来耗尽跟踪器的有限查询预算；2) 时间记忆破坏：通过状态去相关和擦除匹配轨迹的特征身份来直接攻击查询更新器的记忆。此外，还引入了可微分管道来优化攻击以实现物理世界可行性。
AI.result: 在MOT17和MOT20基准测试上的实验表明，FADE对最先进的TBP跟踪器非常有效，导致显著的身份切换和轨迹终止。
AI.conclusion: FADE框架成功揭示了基于查询传播的跟踪方法的架构漏洞，并展示了对抗攻击对这些方法的严重威胁，为未来更鲁棒的跟踪系统设计提供了重要启示。

title: How to Train your Tactile Model: Tactile Perception with Multi-fingered Robot Hands
comment: Accepted for publication at the International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2026, Vienna
summary: Rapid deployment of new tactile sensors is essential for scalable robotic manipulation, especially in multi-fingered hands equipped with vision-based tactile sensors. However, current methods for inferring contact properties rely heavily on convolutional neural networks (CNNs), which, while effective on known sensors, require large, sensor-specific datasets. Furthermore, they require retraining for each new sensor due to differences in lens properties, illumination, and sensor wear. Here we introduce TacViT, a novel tactile perception model based on Vision Transformers, designed to generalize on new sensor data. TacViT leverages global self-attention mechanisms to extract robust features from tactile images, enabling accurate contact property inference even on previously unseen sensors. This capability significantly reduces the need for data collection and retraining, accelerating the deployment of new sensors. We evaluate TacViT on sensors for a five-fingered robot hand and demonstrate its superior generalization performance compared to CNNs. Our results highlight TacViTs potential to make tactile sensing more scalable and practical for real-world robotic applications.

AI.tldr: TacViT：基于视觉Transformer的新型触觉感知模型，能够在未见过的传感器上实现泛化，减少数据收集和重新训练需求
AI.motivation: 当前基于CNN的触觉感知方法需要大量传感器特定数据集，且对新传感器需要重新训练，限制了触觉传感器的快速部署和规模化应用
AI.method: 提出TacViT模型，基于视觉Transformer架构，利用全局自注意力机制从触觉图像中提取鲁棒特征，实现对新传感器的泛化能力
AI.result: 在五指机器人手的传感器上评估，TacViT相比CNN展现出更优越的泛化性能，能够准确推断接触属性
AI.conclusion: TacViT有潜力使触觉传感更具可扩展性和实用性，加速新传感器的部署，推动机器人触觉感知的实际应用

title: MAC-Attention: a Match-Amend-Complete Scheme for Fast and Accurate Attention Computation
summary: Long-context decoding in LLMs is IO-bound: each token re-reads an ever-growing KV cache. Prior accelerations cut bytes via compression, which lowers fidelity, or selection/eviction, which restricts what remains accessible, and both can degrade delayed recall and long-form generation. We introduce MAC-Attention, a fidelity- and access-preserving alternative that accelerates decoding by reusing prior attention computations for semantically similar recent queries. It starts with a match stage that performs pre-RoPE L2 matching over a short local window; an amend stage rectifies the reused attention by recomputing a small band near the match boundary; and a complete stage fuses the rectified results with fresh attention computed on the KV tail through a numerically stable merge. On a match hit, the compute and bandwidth complexity is constant regardless of context length. The method is model-agnostic and composes with IO-aware kernels, paged-KV managers, and MQA/GQA. Across LongBench v2 (120K), RULER (120K), and LongGenBench (16K continuous generation), compared to the latest FlashInfer library, MAC-Attention reduces KV accesses by up to 99%, cuts token generation latency by over 60% at 128K, and achieves over 14.3x attention-phase speedups, up to 2.6x end-to-end, while maintaining full-attention quality. By reusing computation, MAC-Attention delivers long-context inference that is both fast and faithful. Code is available here: https://github.com/YJHMITWEB/MAC-Attention.git

AI.tldr: MAC-Attention是一种新的注意力机制，通过重用语义相似的查询的先前注意力计算来加速长上下文解码，保持保真度和访问完整性，显著减少KV访问和生成延迟。
AI.motivation: 长上下文解码在LLMs中是IO受限的：每个令牌都需要重新读取不断增长的KV缓存。现有加速方法通过压缩（降低保真度）或选择/淘汰（限制可访问内容）来减少字节数，这两者都会影响延迟回忆和长文本生成质量。
AI.method: MAC-Attention包含三个阶段：匹配阶段在短局部窗口内执行预RoPE L2匹配；修正阶段通过重新计算匹配边界附近的小区域来修正重用的注意力；完成阶段通过数值稳定的合并将修正结果与KV尾部的新鲜注意力计算融合。命中匹配时，计算和带宽复杂度与上下文长度无关。
AI.result: 在LongBench v2（120K）、RULER（120K）和LongGenBench（16K连续生成）上，相比最新的FlashInfer库，MAC-Attention将KV访问减少高达99%，在128K上下文下将令牌生成延迟降低超过60%，注意力阶段加速超过14.3倍，端到端加速高达2.6倍，同时保持完整注意力质量。
AI.conclusion: 通过重用计算，MAC-Attention实现了既快速又忠实的长上下文推理。该方法与模型无关，可与IO感知内核、分页KV管理器以及MQA/GQA组合使用。

title: First Logit Boosting: Visual Grounding Method to Mitigate Object Hallucination in Large Vision-Language Models
summary: Recent Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance across various multimodal tasks that require understanding both visual and linguistic inputs. However, object hallucination -- the generation of nonexistent objects in answers -- remains a persistent challenge. Although several approaches such as retraining and external grounding methods have been proposed to mitigate this issue, they still suffer from high data costs or structural complexity. Training-free methods such as Contrastive Decoding (CD) are more cost-effective, avoiding additional training or external models, but still suffer from long-term decay, where visual grounding weakens and language priors dominate as the generation progresses. In this paper, we propose First Logit Boosting (FLB), a simple yet effective training-free technique designed to alleviate long-term decay in LVLMs. FLB stores the logit of the first generated token and adds it to subsequent token predictions, effectively mitigating long-term decay of visual information. We observe that FLB (1) sustains the visual information embedded in the first token throughout generation, and (2) suppresses hallucinated words through the stabilizing effect of the ``The'' token. Experimental results show that FLB significantly reduces object hallucination across various tasks, benchmarks, and backbone models. Notably, it causes negligible inference overhead, making it highly applicable to real-time multimodal systems. Code is available at https://github.com/jiwooha20/FLB

AI.tldr: 本文提出First Logit Boosting (FLB)方法，一种无需训练的技术，通过存储并添加首个生成token的logit到后续token预测中，有效缓解大型视觉语言模型中的长期衰减问题，显著减少物体幻觉。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型在多种多模态任务中表现出色，但物体幻觉（生成不存在物体的答案）仍然是一个持续挑战。现有方法如重新训练和外部接地方法存在高数据成本或结构复杂性问题，而无需训练的方法如对比解码则存在长期衰减问题，即随着生成过程进行，视觉接地减弱而语言先验主导。
AI.method: 提出First Logit Boosting (FLB)方法，这是一种简单有效的无需训练技术。核心思想是存储第一个生成token的logit，并将其添加到后续token的预测中。这种方法能够：(1) 在整个生成过程中维持嵌入在第一个token中的视觉信息；(2) 通过"The" token的稳定化效应抑制幻觉词。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，FLB在各种任务、基准测试和骨干模型中都能显著减少物体幻觉。该方法仅带来可忽略的推理开销，使其非常适合实时多模态系统应用。
AI.conclusion: FLB是一种简单而有效的无需训练方法，通过缓解长期衰减问题，显著减少了大型视觉语言模型中的物体幻觉，具有实际应用价值。

title: A wearable haptic device for edge and surface simulation
summary: Object manipulation is fundamental to virtual reality (VR) applications, yet conventional fingertip haptic devices fail to render certain tactile features relevant for immersive and precise interactions, as i.e. detection of edges. This paper presents a compact, lightweight fingertip haptic device (24.3 g) that delivers distinguishable surface and edge contact feedback through a novel dual-motor mechanism. Pressure distribution characterization using a 6 x 6 flexible sensor array demonstrates distinct contact patterns between the two stimulation modes. A preliminary user study with five participants achieved 93% average classification accuracy across four conditions (edge/surface contact with light/heavy pressure), with mean response times of 2.79 seconds. The results indicate that the proposed device can effectively convey edge and surface tactile cues, potentially enhancing object manipulation fidelity in VR environments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种轻量级指尖触觉设备，通过双电机机制提供可区分的表面和边缘接触反馈，增强VR中的物体操作体验。
AI.motivation: 传统指尖触觉设备无法渲染某些对沉浸式和精确交互相关的触觉特征，如边缘检测，这限制了VR应用中物体操作的逼真度。
AI.method: 开发了一种紧凑轻便（24.3克）的指尖触觉设备，采用新颖的双电机机制，通过6×6柔性传感器阵列进行压力分布表征，区分两种刺激模式。
AI.result: 压力分布表征显示两种刺激模式具有不同的接触模式；初步用户研究（5名参与者）在四种条件下（边缘/表面接触×轻/重压力）达到93%的平均分类准确率，平均响应时间为2.79秒。
AI.conclusion: 该设备能有效传达边缘和表面触觉线索，有望提高VR环境中物体操作的逼真度。

title: Hierarchical Discrete Flow Matching for Graph Generation
summary: Denoising-based models, including diffusion and flow matching, have led to substantial advances in graph generation. Despite this progress, such models remain constrained by two fundamental limitations: a computational cost that scales quadratically with the number of nodes and a large number of function evaluations required during generation. In this work, we introduce a novel hierarchical generative framework that reduces the number of node pairs that must be evaluated and adopts discrete flow matching to significantly decrease the number of denoising iterations. We empirically demonstrate that our approach more effectively captures graph distributions while substantially reducing generation time.

AI.tldr: 提出分层生成框架，通过减少节点对评估和采用离散流匹配来降低图生成的计算成本和迭代次数
AI.motivation: 现有基于去噪的图生成模型存在两个基本限制：计算成本随节点数呈二次方增长，以及生成过程中需要大量函数评估
AI.method: 引入分层生成框架，减少需要评估的节点对数量，并采用离散流匹配来显著减少去噪迭代次数
AI.result: 经验证明该方法能更有效地捕捉图分布，同时大幅减少生成时间
AI.conclusion: 提出的分层框架解决了现有图生成模型的计算效率问题，在保持生成质量的同时显著提升了速度

title: Automated Detection of Multiple Sclerosis Lesions on 7-tesla MRI Using U-net and Transformer-based Segmentation
comment: 31 pages, 3 figures, 3 tables. Inference code and model weights available at https://github.com/maynord/7T-MS-lesion-segmentation
summary: Ultra-high field 7-tesla (7T) MRI improves visualization of multiple sclerosis (MS) white matter lesions (WML) but differs sufficiently in contrast and artifacts from 1.5-3T imaging - suggesting that widely used automated segmentation tools may not translate directly. We analyzed 7T FLAIR scans and generated reference WML masks from Lesion Segmentation Tool (LST) outputs followed by expert manual revision. As external comparators, we applied LST-LPA and the more recent LST-AI ensemble, both originally developed on lower-field data. We then trained 3D UNETR and SegFormer transformer-based models on 7T FLAIR at multiple resolutions (0.5x0.5x0.5^3, 1.0x1.0x1.0^3, and 1.5x1.5x2.0^3) and evaluated all methods using voxel-wise and lesion-wise metrics from the BraTS 2023 framework. On the held-out test set at native 0.5x0.5x0.5^3 resolution, 7T-trained transformers achieved competitive overlap with LST-AI while recovering additional small lesions that were missed by classical methods, at the cost of some boundary variability and occasional artifact-related false positives. On a held-out 7 T test set, our best transformer model (SegFormer) achieved a voxel-wise Dice of 0.61 and lesion-wise Dice of 0.20, improving on the classical LST-LPA tool (Dice 0.39, lesion-wise Dice 0.02). Performance decreased for models trained on downsampled images, underscoring the value of native 7T resolution for small-lesion detection. By releasing our 7T-trained models, we aim to provide a reproducible, ready-to-use resource for automated lesion quantification in ultra-high field MS research (https://github.com/maynord/7T-MS-lesion-segmentation).

AI.tldr: 研究比较了传统分割工具与基于Transformer的深度学习模型在7T MRI多发性硬化白质病变分割中的表现，发现7T训练的Transformer模型在原生高分辨率下能检测到更多小病变，但存在边界变异性和假阳性问题。
AI.motivation: 超高场7T MRI能更好地显示多发性硬化白质病变，但其对比度和伪影与1.5-3T成像差异较大，现有自动化分割工具可能无法直接应用，需要开发专门针对7T MRI的分割方法。
AI.method: 使用7T FLAIR扫描数据，通过LST工具生成参考病变掩膜并经专家手动修订。比较了传统LST-LPA和LST-AI工具，并训练了3D UNETR和SegFormer等Transformer模型在不同分辨率(0.5³、1.0³、1.5×2.0³)下的表现，采用BraTS 2023框架的体素级和病变级指标进行评估。
AI.result: 在原生0.5³分辨率测试集上，7T训练的Transformer模型与LST-AI表现相当，但能检测到更多传统方法遗漏的小病变，代价是边界变异性和偶尔的伪影相关假阳性。最佳SegFormer模型达到体素级Dice 0.61和病变级Dice 0.20，优于传统LST-LPA工具(Dice 0.39，病变级Dice 0.02)。降采样训练模型性能下降，表明原生7T分辨率对小病变检测至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 针对7T MRI训练的Transformer模型在多发性硬化白质病变分割中优于传统方法，特别是在小病变检测方面。原生高分辨率训练对性能至关重要。研究发布了7T训练模型，为超高场多发性硬化研究提供了可复现的自动化病变量化工具。

title: A Dual-Action Fabric-Based Soft Robotic Glove for Ergonomic Hand Rehabilitation
summary: Hand impairment following neurological disorders substantially limits independence in activities of daily living, motivating the development of effective assistive and rehabilitation strategies. Soft robotic gloves have attracted growing interest in this context, yet persistent challenges in customization, ergonomic fit, and flexion-extension actuation constrain their clinical utility. Here, we present a dual-action fabric-based soft robotic glove incorporating customized actuators aligned with individual finger joints. The glove comprises five independently controlled dual-action actuators supporting finger flexion and extension, together with a dedicated thumb abduction actuator. Leveraging computer numerical control heat sealing technology, we fabricated symmetrical-chamber actuators that adopt a concave outer surface upon inflation, thereby maximizing finger contact area and improving comfort. Systematic characterization confirmed that the actuators generate sufficient joint moment and fingertip force for ADL-relevant tasks, and that the complete glove system produces adequate grasping force for common household objects. A preliminary study with ten healthy subjects demonstrated that active glove assistance significantly reduces forearm muscle activity during object manipulation. A pilot feasibility study with three individuals with cervical spinal cord injury across seven functional tasks indicated that glove assistance promotes more natural grasp patterns and reduces reliance on tenodesis grasp, although at the cost of increased task completion time attributable to the current actuation interface. This customizable, ergonomic design represents a practical step toward personalized hand rehabilitation and assistive robotics.

AI.tldr: 开发了一种基于织物的双作用软体机器人手套，通过定制化执行器支持手指屈伸和拇指外展，用于神经障碍后的手部康复和辅助
AI.motivation: 神经障碍导致的手部功能障碍严重影响日常生活独立性，现有软体机器人手套在定制化、人体工程学适配和屈伸驱动方面存在限制，制约了其临床应用价值
AI.method: 采用计算机数控热封技术制造对称腔室执行器，设计具有五个独立控制的双作用执行器支持手指屈伸，以及专门的拇指外展执行器。执行器充气时形成凹形外表面以最大化手指接触面积
AI.result: 执行器产生足够的关节力矩和指尖力用于日常生活任务，完整手套系统能产生足够抓握力。健康受试者测试显示主动辅助显著减少前臂肌肉活动。颈椎脊髓损伤患者初步研究显示手套辅助促进更自然的抓握模式，减少对肌腱转移抓握的依赖
AI.conclusion: 这种可定制、符合人体工程学的设计代表了向个性化手部康复和辅助机器人技术的实际进展，尽管当前驱动界面增加了任务完成时间

title: Softmax gradient policy for variance minimization and risk-averse multi armed bandits
summary: Algorithms for the Multi-Armed Bandit (MAB) problem play a central role in sequential decision-making and have been extensively explored both theoretically and numerically. While most classical approaches aim to identify the arm with the highest expected reward, we focus on a risk-aware setting where the goal is to select the arm with the lowest variance, favoring stability over potentially high but uncertain returns. To model the decision process, we consider a softmax parameterization of the policy; we propose a new algorithm to select the minimal variance (or minimal risk) arm and prove its convergence under natural conditions. The algorithm constructs an unbiased estimate of the objective by using two independent draws from the current's arm distribution. We provide numerical experiments that illustrate the practical behavior of these algorithms and offer guidance on implementation choices. The setting also covers general risk-aware problems where there is a trade-off between maximizing the average reward and minimizing its variance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于多臂老虎机问题的新算法，专注于选择方差最小的臂（风险最小化），而非传统上追求最高期望奖励的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统多臂老虎机算法主要关注识别期望奖励最高的臂，但在实际应用中，决策者往往更关注稳定性，需要选择风险最小（方差最低）的臂。本文旨在解决这种风险感知场景下的决策问题。
AI.method: 采用softmax参数化策略，提出新算法通过使用当前臂分布的两个独立抽样来构建目标函数的无偏估计，从而选择最小方差臂。算法在自然条件下被证明具有收敛性。
AI.result: 提供了数值实验验证算法的实际行为，并为实现选择提供指导。算法能够有效处理一般风险感知问题，平衡平均奖励最大化和方差最小化之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法为风险感知的多臂老虎机问题提供了有效的解决方案，特别适用于需要稳定性优先于高回报但不确定收益的决策场景。

title: Preference Guided Iterated Pareto Referent Optimisation for Accessible Route Planning
summary: We propose the Preference Guided Iterated Pareto Referent Optimisation (PG-IPRO) for urban route planning for people with different accessibility requirements and preferences. With this algorithm the user can interact with the system by giving feedback on a route, i.e., the user can say which objective should be further minimized, or conversely can be relaxed. This leads to intuitive user interaction, that is especially effective during early iterations compared to information-gain-based interaction. Furthermore, due to PG-IPRO's iterative nature, the full set of alternative, possibly optimal policies (the Pareto front), is never computed, leading to higher computational efficiency and shorter waiting times for users.

AI.tldr: PG-IPRO算法用于满足不同无障碍需求和偏好的城市路径规划，通过用户反馈交互优化路线，相比基于信息增益的交互更直观高效。
AI.motivation: 为满足不同人群（特别是无障碍需求者）在城市路径规划中的个性化需求，需要一种能够根据用户偏好进行交互式优化的算法，以提供更符合个人需求的路线方案。
AI.method: 提出偏好引导迭代帕累托参考优化（PG-IPRO）算法，用户可以对路线给出反馈，指定哪些目标应该进一步最小化或可以放松，系统根据反馈迭代优化，避免计算完整的帕累托前沿。
AI.result: PG-IPRO在早期迭代中相比基于信息增益的交互方法更直观有效，由于不计算完整的帕累托前沿，计算效率更高，用户等待时间更短。
AI.conclusion: PG-IPRO为城市路径规划提供了一种高效的用户交互式优化方法，特别适合满足不同无障碍需求和偏好的个性化路线规划需求。

title: All Roads Lead to Rome: Incentivizing Divergent Thinking in Vision-Language Models
summary: Recent studies have demonstrated that Reinforcement Learning (RL), notably Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), can intrinsically elicit and enhance the reasoning capabilities of Vision-Language Models (VLMs). However, despite the promise, the underlying mechanisms that drive the effectiveness of RL models as well as their limitations remain underexplored. In this paper, we highlight a fundamental behavioral distinction between RL and base models, where the former engages in deeper yet narrow reasoning, while base models, despite less refined along individual path, exhibit broader and more diverse thinking patterns. Through further analysis of training dynamics, we show that GRPO is prone to diversity collapse, causing models to prematurely converge to a limited subset of reasoning strategies while discarding the majority of potential alternatives, leading to local optima and poor scalability. To address this, we propose Multi-Group Policy Optimization (MUPO), a simple yet effective approach designed to incentivize divergent thinking across multiple solutions, and demonstrate its effectiveness on established benchmarks. Project page: https://xytian1008.github.io/MUPO/

AI.tldr: 本文提出MUPO方法解决GRPO训练中出现的多样性崩溃问题，通过激励多组策略优化来促进发散性思维，提升视觉语言模型的推理能力。
AI.motivation: 研究发现强化学习（特别是GRPO）虽然能提升视觉语言模型的推理能力，但会导致模型陷入深度但狭窄的推理模式，而基础模型虽然推理不够精细但思维模式更广泛多样。GRPO容易发生多样性崩溃，使模型过早收敛到有限的推理策略子集，丢弃大多数潜在替代方案，导致局部最优和可扩展性差。
AI.method: 提出多组策略优化（MUPO）方法，这是一种简单但有效的技术，旨在激励跨多个解决方案的发散性思维。MUPO通过维护多个策略组来避免多样性崩溃，促进更广泛的推理策略探索。
AI.result: 在已建立的基准测试上证明了MUPO的有效性，能够解决GRPO的多样性崩溃问题，提升模型的推理能力和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: MUPO通过激励发散性思维解决了强化学习训练中的多样性崩溃问题，为提升视觉语言模型的推理能力提供了一种有效方法，相比传统GRPO具有更好的可扩展性和性能。

title: Compact Keyframe-Optimized Multi-Agent Gaussian Splatting SLAM
summary: Efficient multi-agent 3D mapping is essential for robotic teams operating in unknown environments, but dense representations hinder real-time exchange over constrained communication links. In multi-agent Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM), systems typically rely on a centralized server to merge and optimize the local maps produced by individual agents. However, sharing these large map representations, particularly those generated by recent methods such as Gaussian Splatting, becomes a bottleneck in real-world scenarios with limited bandwidth. We present an improved multi-agent RGB-D Gaussian Splatting SLAM framework that reduces communication load while preserving map fidelity. First, we incorporate a compaction step into our SLAM system to remove redundant 3D Gaussians, without degrading the rendering quality. Second, our approach performs centralized loop closure computation without initial guess, operating in two modes: a pure rendered-depth mode that requires no data beyond the 3D Gaussians, and a camera-depth mode that includes lightweight depth images for improved registration accuracy and additional Gaussian pruning. Evaluation on both synthetic and real-world datasets shows up to 85-95\% reduction in transmitted data compared to state-of-the-art approaches in both modes, bringing 3D Gaussian multi-agent SLAM closer to practical deployment in real-world scenarios. Code: https://github.com/lemonci/coko-slam

AI.tldr: 提出改进的多智能体RGB-D高斯溅射SLAM框架，通过压缩冗余3D高斯和集中式闭环检测，在保持地图保真度的同时减少85-95%的通信负载
AI.motivation: 多智能体3D建图在未知环境中对机器人团队至关重要，但密集地图表示在有限带宽下难以实时传输。现有基于高斯溅射的SLAM系统在集中式服务器合并地图时面临通信瓶颈
AI.method: 1) 在SLAM系统中加入压缩步骤，移除冗余3D高斯而不降低渲染质量；2) 采用无需初始猜测的集中式闭环检测，提供两种模式：纯渲染深度模式（仅需3D高斯）和相机深度模式（包含轻量深度图像以提高配准精度和进一步高斯修剪）
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的评估显示，相比最先进方法，两种模式下传输数据减少85-95%，使3D高斯多智能体SLAM更接近实际部署
AI.conclusion: 提出的改进框架显著降低了多智能体高斯溅射SLAM的通信负载，同时保持地图质量，为实现实际场景中的实时多机器人协作建图提供了可行方案

title: Informed Machine Learning with Knowledge Landmarks
summary: Informed Machine Learning has emerged as a viable generalization of Machine Learning (ML) by building a unified conceptual and algorithmic setting for constructing models on a unified basis of knowledge and data. Physics-informed ML involving physics equations is one of the developments within Informed Machine Learning. This study proposes a novel direction of Knowledge-Data ML, referred to as KD-ML, where numeric data are integrated with knowledge tidbits expressed in the form of granular knowledge landmarks. We advocate that data and knowledge are complementary in several fundamental ways: data are precise (numeric) and local, usually confined to some region of the input space, while knowledge is global and formulated at a higher level of abstraction. The knowledge can be represented as information granules and organized as a collection of input-output information granules called knowledge landmarks. In virtue of this evident complementarity, we develop a comprehensive design process of the KD-ML model and formulate an original augmented loss function L, which additively embraces the component responsible for optimizing the model based on available numeric data, while the second component, playing the role of a granular regularizer, so that it adheres to the granular constraints (knowledge landmarks). We show the role of the hyperparameter positioned in the loss function, which balances the contribution and guiding role of data and knowledge, and point to some essential tendencies associated with the quality of data (noise level) and the level of granularity of the knowledge landmarks. Experiments on two physics-governed benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed KD model consistently outperforms data-driven ML models.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为KD-ML的知识-数据机器学习新方法，通过将数值数据与以粒度知识地标形式表达的知识片段相结合，构建了一个包含数据优化和知识约束的增强损失函数。
AI.motivation: 认识到数据与知识之间存在根本互补性：数据是精确的、局部的，通常局限于输入空间的某些区域；而知识是全局的，在更高抽象层次上表达。这种互补性为构建更强大的机器学习模型提供了机会。
AI.method: 提出KD-ML框架，将知识表示为信息颗粒并组织为输入-输出信息颗粒集合（知识地标）。开发了包含两个组件的增强损失函数：一个负责基于数值数据优化模型，另一个作为粒度正则化器，确保模型遵守粒度约束（知识地标）。
AI.result: 在两个物理基准测试上的实验表明，提出的KD模型在性能上持续优于纯数据驱动的机器学习模型。研究还展示了超参数在平衡数据和知识贡献方面的作用，以及数据质量（噪声水平）和知识地标粒度水平对模型性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: KD-ML为知识-数据机器学习提供了一个系统化的设计框架，通过有效整合数值数据和抽象知识，构建了比纯数据驱动模型更优越的机器学习模型，展示了数据和知识互补性的实际价值。

title: A Reasoning-Enabled Vision-Language Foundation Model for Chest X-ray Interpretation
summary: Chest X-rays (CXRs) are among the most frequently performed imaging examinations worldwide, yet rising imaging volumes increase radiologist workload and the risk of diagnostic errors. Although artificial intelligence (AI) systems have shown promise for CXR interpretation, most generate only final predictions, without making explicit how visual evidence is translated into radiographic findings and diagnostic predictions. We present CheXOne, a reasoning-enabled vision-language model for CXR interpretation. CheXOne jointly generates diagnostic predictions and explicit, clinically grounded reasoning traces that connect visual evidence, radiographic findings, and these predictions. The model is trained on 14.7 million instruction and reasoning samples curated from 30 public datasets spanning 36 CXR interpretation tasks, using a two-stage framework that combines instruction tuning with reinforcement learning to improve reasoning quality. We evaluate CheXOne in zero-shot settings across visual question answering, report generation, visual grounding and reasoning assessment, covering 17 evaluation settings. CheXOne outperforms existing medical and general-domain foundation models and achieves strong performance on independent public benchmarks. A clinical reader study demonstrates that CheXOne-drafted reports are comparable to or better than resident-written reports in 55% of cases, while effectively addressing clinical indications and enhancing both report writing and CXR interpretation efficiency. Further analyses involving radiologists reveal that the generated reasoning traces show high clinical factuality and provide causal support for the final predictions, offering a plausible explanation for the performance gains. These results suggest that explicit reasoning can improve model performance, interpretability and clinical utility in AI-assisted CXR interpretation.

AI.tldr: CheXOne是一个用于胸部X光片解读的推理增强视觉语言模型，能同时生成诊断预测和明确的临床推理轨迹，连接视觉证据、放射学发现和诊断预测。
AI.motivation: 胸部X光片是全球最常进行的影像检查之一，但不断增长的影像量增加了放射科医生的工作负担和诊断错误风险。现有AI系统大多只生成最终预测，没有明确解释视觉证据如何转化为放射学发现和诊断预测。
AI.method: 使用从30个公共数据集的36个CXR解读任务中提取的1470万个指令和推理样本进行训练，采用两阶段框架结合指令微调和强化学习来提升推理质量。
AI.result: 在17个评估设置中，CheXOne在零样本设置下优于现有医学和通用领域基础模型，在独立公共基准测试中表现强劲。临床阅读研究显示，CheXOne生成的报告在55%的情况下优于或等同于住院医师撰写的报告，有效处理临床指征并提高报告撰写和CXR解读效率。
AI.conclusion: 明确的推理可以提升AI辅助CXR解读中的模型性能、可解释性和临床实用性，生成的推理轨迹具有高临床事实性并为最终预测提供因果支持。

title: PanoAir: A Panoramic Visual-Inertial SLAM with Cross-Time Real-World UAV Dataset
summary:
Accurate pose estimation is fundamental for unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) applications, where Visual-Inertial SLAM (VI-SLAM) provides a cost-effective solution for localization and mapping. However, existing VI-SLAM methods mainly rely on sensors with limited fields of view (FoV), which can lead to drift and even failure in complex UAV scenarios. Although panoramic cameras provide omnidirectional perception to improve robustness, panoramic VI-SLAM and corresponding real-world datasets for UAVs remain underexplored. To address this limitation, we first construct a real-world panoramic visual-inertial dataset covering diverse flight conditions, including varying illumination, altitudes, trajectory lengths, and motion dynamics. To achieve accurate and robust pose estimation under such challenging UAV scenarios, we propose a panoramic VI-SLAM framework that exploits the omnidirectional FoV via the proposed panoramic feature extraction and panoramic loop closure, enhancing feature constraints and ensuring global consistency. Extensive experiments on both the proposed dataset and public benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves superior accuracy, robustness, and consistency compared to existing approaches. Moreover, deployment on embedded platform validates its practical applicability, achieving comparable computational efficiency to PC implementations.
  The source code and dataset are publicly available at https://drive.google.com/file/d/1lG1Upn6yi-N6tYpEHAt6dfR1uhzNtWbT/view

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于无人机应用的360度全景视觉-惯性SLAM框架，并构建了首个真实世界的全景视觉-惯性数据集，解决了传统有限视野传感器在复杂无人机场景中的漂移和失效问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-惯性SLAM方法主要依赖有限视野传感器，在复杂无人机场景中容易产生漂移甚至失效。虽然全景相机提供全方位感知以提高鲁棒性，但针对无人机的全景视觉-惯性SLAM及相关真实世界数据集仍未被充分探索。
AI.method: 首先构建了覆盖多样化飞行条件的真实世界全景视觉-惯性数据集，包括不同光照、高度、轨迹长度和运动动态。提出了全景视觉-惯性SLAM框架，通过全景特征提取和全景闭环检测来利用全方位视野，增强特征约束并确保全局一致性。
AI.result: 在提出的数据集和公共基准上的广泛实验表明，该方法相比现有方法实现了更优的精度、鲁棒性和一致性。在嵌入式平台上的部署验证了其实用性，达到了与PC实现相当的计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了无人机全景视觉-惯性SLAM领域的空白，通过构建首个真实世界数据集和提出有效的全景SLAM框架，为无人机在复杂场景中的精确定位提供了可靠解决方案，并展示了在实际嵌入式平台上的应用潜力。

title: Hierarchical Apprenticeship Learning from Imperfect Demonstrations with Evolving Rewards
summary: While apprenticeship learning has shown promise for inducing effective pedagogical policies directly from student interactions in e-learning environments, most existing approaches rely on optimal or near-optimal expert demonstrations under a fixed reward. Real-world student interactions, however, are often inherently imperfect and evolving: students explore, make errors, revise strategies, and refine their goals as understanding develops. In this work, we argue that imperfect student demonstrations are not noise to be discarded, but structured signals-provided their relative quality is ranked. We introduce HALIDE, Hierarchical Apprenticeship Learning from Imperfect Demonstrations with Evolving Rewards, which not only leverages sub-optimal student demonstrations, but ranks them within a hierarchical learning framework. HALIDE models student behavior at multiple levels of abstraction, enabling inference of higher-level intent and strategy from suboptimal actions while explicitly capturing the temporal evolution of student reward functions. By integrating demonstration quality into hierarchical reward inference,HALIDE distinguishes transient errors from suboptimal strategies and meaningful progress toward higher-level learning goals. Our results show that HALIDE more accurately predicts student pedagogical decisions than approaches that rely on optimal trajectories, fixed rewards, or unranked imperfect demonstrations.

AI.tldr: HALIDE是一个从非完美学生演示中学习教学策略的分层框架，通过排名演示质量来区分临时错误和次优策略，比依赖最优轨迹的方法更准确预测学生决策。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的学生互动往往是不完美且不断演化的，学生探索、犯错、修正策略、随着理解发展而精炼目标。现有方法依赖最优或接近最优的专家演示和固定奖励，无法有效处理这种非完美演示。
AI.method: 提出HALIDE（Hierarchical Apprenticeship Learning from Imperfect Demonstrations with Evolving Rewards），采用分层学习框架，在多抽象层次建模学生行为，推断高层次意图和策略，同时显式捕捉学生奖励函数的时间演化，并将演示质量整合到分层奖励推断中。
AI.result: HALIDE比依赖最优轨迹、固定奖励或未排名的非完美演示的方法更准确地预测学生教学决策。
AI.conclusion: 非完美学生演示不应被视为需要丢弃的噪声，而是具有结构化的信号，只要能够对其相对质量进行排名。分层框架能够有效利用次优学生演示来推断教学策略。

title: Beyond Symbolic Solving: Multi Chain-of-Thought Voting for Geometric Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Geometric Problem Solving (GPS) remains at the heart of enhancing mathematical reasoning in large language models because it requires the combination of diagrammatic understanding, symbolic manipulation and logical inference. In existing literature, researchers have chiefly focused on synchronising the diagram descriptions with text literals and solving the problem. In this vein, they have either taken a neural, symbolic or neuro-symbolic approach. But this solves only the first two of the requirements, namely diagrammatic understanding and symbolic manipulation, while leaving logical inference underdeveloped. The logical inference is often limited to one chain-of-thought (CoT). To address this weakness in hitherto existing models, this paper proposes MARS-GPS, that generates multiple parallel reasoning rollouts augmented with Python code execution for numerical verification, ranks them using token-level entropy as a confidence signal, and aggregates answers through a multi-stage voting and self-verification pipeline. Empirical results show that MARS-GPS with 8 parallel rollouts achieves 88.8% on Geometry3K, a nearly +11% improvement over the prior state-of-the-art, with accuracy scaling consistently as the number of rollouts increases from 1 to 16 (+6.0% on ablation subset). We provide our code and data in an anonymous repository: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/MARS-GPS-DE55.

AI.tldr: MARS-GPS通过生成多个并行推理路径、使用Python代码执行进行数值验证、基于token熵排名，并通过多阶段投票和自我验证聚合答案，显著提升了几何问题解决的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有几何问题解决方法主要关注图表描述与文本的同步以及问题求解，但只解决了图表理解和符号操作两个需求，而逻辑推理能力发展不足，通常仅限于单一思维链。需要增强逻辑推理能力以提升几何问题解决性能。
AI.method: 提出MARS-GPS方法：1）生成多个并行推理路径；2）使用Python代码执行进行数值验证；3）基于token级熵作为置信度信号对推理路径进行排名；4）通过多阶段投票和自我验证管道聚合答案。
AI.result: 在Geometry3K数据集上，MARS-GPS使用8个并行推理路径达到88.8%的准确率，比之前的最先进方法提高了近11%。当推理路径数量从1增加到16时，准确率持续提升（在消融子集上提高6.0%）。
AI.conclusion: MARS-GPS通过多并行推理路径、代码验证和基于熵的排名机制，有效增强了大型语言模型在几何问题解决中的逻辑推理能力，显著提升了性能并展示了可扩展性。

title: ARGS: Auto-Regressive Gaussian Splatting via Parallel Progressive Next-Scale Prediction
summary: Auto-regressive frameworks for next-scale prediction of 2D images have demonstrated strong potential for producing diverse and sophisticated content by progressively refining a coarse input. However, extending this paradigm to 3D object generation remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we introduce auto-regressive Gaussian splatting (ARGS), a framework for making next-scale predictions in parallel for generation according to levels of detail. We propose a Gaussian simplification strategy and reverse the simplification to guide next-scale generation. Benefiting from the use of hierarchical trees, the generation process requires only \(\mathcal{O}(\log n)\) steps, where \(n\) is the number of points. Furthermore, we propose a tree-based transformer to predict the tree structure auto-regressively, allowing leaf nodes to attend to their internal ancestors to enhance structural consistency. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach effectively generates multi-scale Gaussian representations with controllable levels of detail, visual fidelity, and a manageable time consumption budget.

AI.tldr: ARGS：一种用于3D对象生成的自回归高斯溅射框架，通过层次化树结构和多尺度预测实现高效可控的细节生成
AI.motivation: 自回归框架在2D图像生成中表现出色，但扩展到3D对象生成仍未被充分探索。现有方法在3D生成中缺乏高效的多尺度控制和结构一致性
AI.method: 提出自回归高斯溅射（ARGS）框架，采用高斯简化策略和反向简化引导多尺度生成。利用层次树结构实现O(log n)复杂度，并设计基于树的Transformer自回归预测树结构，使叶节点能关注其祖先节点以增强结构一致性
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效生成具有可控细节层次、视觉保真度的多尺度高斯表示，且时间消耗可控
AI.conclusion: ARGS框架成功将自回归范式扩展到3D对象生成，实现了高效、可控的多尺度3D内容生成

title: An Integrated Soft Robotic System for Measuring Vital Signs in Search and Rescue Environments
summary: Robots are frequently utilized in search-and-rescue operations. In recent years, significant advancements have been made in the field of victim assessment. However, there are still open issues regarding heart rate measurement, and no studies have been found that assess pressure in post-disaster scenarios. This work designs a soft gripper and integrates it into a mobile robotic system, thereby creating a device capable of measuring the pulse and blood pressure of victims in post-disaster environments. The gripper is designed to envelop the victim's arm and inflate like a sphygmomanometer, facilitated by a specialized portability system. The utilization of different signal processing algorithms has enabled the attainment of a pulse bias of \qty{4}{\bpm} and a bias of approximately \qty{5}{\mmHg} for systolic and diastolic pressures. The findings, in conjunction with the other statistical data and the validation of homoscedasticity in the error terms, prove the system's capacity to accurately determine heart rate and blood pressure, thereby rendering it suitable for search and rescue operations. Finally, a post-disaster has been employed as a test to validate the functionality of the entire system and to demonstrate its capacity to adapt to various victim positions, its measurement speed, and its safety for victims.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一种用于灾后救援的软体抓取器，集成到移动机器人系统中，能够测量受害者的脉搏和血压，在灾后环境中进行生命体征评估。
AI.motivation: 虽然机器人在搜救行动中应用广泛，受害者评估领域也有显著进展，但在心率测量方面仍存在未解决的问题，且缺乏针对灾后场景的血压评估研究。需要开发能够在灾后环境中准确测量受害者生命体征的系统。
AI.method: 设计了一个软体抓取器，集成到移动机器人系统中。抓取器能够包裹受害者手臂并像血压计一样充气，通过专门的便携系统实现。采用不同的信号处理算法来处理测量数据。
AI.result: 系统实现了脉搏偏差4 bpm，收缩压和舒张压偏差约5 mmHg。统计数据和误差项同方差性验证证明了系统能够准确确定心率和血压。通过灾后场景测试验证了系统功能，展示了其对不同受害者位置的适应性、测量速度和安全性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统能够准确测量灾后受害者的心率和血压，适合搜救行动使用。软体抓取器集成移动机器人系统的方法有效解决了灾后环境中的生命体征评估问题。

title: Learning to Shuffle: Block Reshuffling and Reversal Schemes for Stochastic Optimization
summary: Shuffling strategies for stochastic gradient descent (SGD), including incremental gradient, shuffle-once, and random reshuffling, are supported by rigorous convergence analyses for arbitrary within-epoch permutations. In particular, random reshuffling is known to improve optimization constants relative to cyclic and shuffle-once schemes. However, existing theory offers limited guidance on how to design new data-ordering schemes that further improve optimization constants or stability beyond random reshuffling. In this paper, we design a pipeline using a large language model (LLM)-guided program evolution framework to discover an effective shuffling rule for without-replacement SGD. Abstracting from this instance, we identify two fundamental structural components: block reshuffling and paired reversal. We analyze these components separately and show that block reshuffling strictly reduces prefix-gradient variance constants within the unified shuffling framework, yielding provable improvements over random reshuffling under mild conditions. Separately, we show that paired reversal symmetrizes the epoch map and cancels the leading order-dependent second-order term, reducing order sensitivity from quadratic to cubic in the step size. Numerical experiments with the discovered algorithm validate the theory and demonstrate consistent gains over standard shuffling schemes across convex and nonconvex benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用LLM引导的程序演化框架来发现有效的无放回SGD洗牌策略，识别出块重洗和配对反转两个核心组件，理论证明这些组件能改善优化常数和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有随机重洗牌策略虽然优于循环和单次洗牌方案，但缺乏系统的方法来设计能进一步改进优化常数或稳定性的新数据排序方案。
AI.method: 使用大型语言模型引导的程序演化框架来发现有效的无放回SGD洗牌规则，从中抽象出块重洗和配对反转两个核心结构组件，并分别进行理论分析。
AI.result: 块重洗在温和条件下严格降低前缀梯度方差常数，提供可证明的优于随机重洗的改进；配对反转对称化epoch映射并消除主导的顺序相关二阶项，将顺序敏感性从步长的二次降低到三次。
AI.conclusion: 通过LLM引导的演化发现的洗牌算法在理论和实验上都优于标准洗牌方案，为设计更优的SGD数据排序策略提供了系统方法。

title: PC-SAM: Patch-Constrained Fine-Grained Interactive Road Segmentation in High-Resolution Remote Sensing Images
summary: Road masks obtained from remote sensing images effectively support a wide range of downstream tasks. In recent years, most studies have focused on improving the performance of fully automatic segmentation models for this task, achieving significant gains. However, current fully automatic methods are still insufficient for identifying certain challenging road segments and often produce false positive and false negative regions. Moreover, fully automatic segmentation does not support local segmentation of regions of interest or refinement of existing masks. Although the SAM model is widely used as an interactive segmentation model and performs well on natural images, it shows poor performance in remote sensing road segmentation and cannot support fine-grained local refinement. To address these limitations, we propose PC-SAM, which integrates fully automatic road segmentation and interactive segmentation within a unified framework. By carefully designing a fine-tuning strategy, the influence of point prompts is constrained to their corresponding patches, overcoming the inability of the original SAM to perform fine local corrections and enabling fine-grained interactive mask refinement. Extensive experiments on several representative remote sensing road segmentation datasets demonstrate that, when combined with point prompts, PC-SAM significantly outperforms state-of-the-art fully automatic models in road mask segmentation, while also providing flexible local mask refinement and local road segmentation. The code will be available at https://github.com/Cyber-CCOrange/PC-SAM.

AI.tldr: PC-SAM：一个统一框架，结合了全自动道路分割和交互式分割，通过点提示实现精细的局部掩码修正，在遥感道路分割任务中优于现有全自动方法。
AI.motivation: 当前全自动道路分割方法在识别具有挑战性的道路段时存在不足，经常产生假阳性和假阴性区域，且不支持局部感兴趣区域分割或现有掩码的细化。虽然SAM模型在自然图像交互分割中表现良好，但在遥感道路分割中效果不佳，无法支持细粒度的局部修正。
AI.method: 提出PC-SAM框架，将全自动道路分割和交互式分割集成到统一框架中。通过精心设计的微调策略，将点提示的影响限制在对应的图像块内，克服了原始SAM无法进行精细局部修正的缺点，实现了细粒度的交互式掩码细化。
AI.result: 在多个代表性遥感道路分割数据集上的实验表明，结合点提示使用时，PC-SAM在道路掩码分割方面显著优于最先进的全自动模型，同时提供灵活的局部掩码细化和局部道路分割能力。
AI.conclusion: PC-SAM通过统一全自动和交互式分割框架，解决了遥感道路分割中全自动方法的局限性，提供了更精确的道路掩码分割和灵活的局部修正功能，为下游任务提供了更好的支持。

title: Infinite-Horizon Ergodic Control via Kernel Mean Embeddings
summary: This paper derives an infinite-horizon ergodic controller based on kernel mean embeddings for long-duration coverage tasks on general domains. While existing kernel-based ergodic control methods provide strong coverage guarantees on general coverage domains, their practical use has been limited to sub-ergodic, finite-time horizons due to intractable computational scaling, prohibiting its use for long-duration coverage. We resolve this scaling by deriving an infinite-horizon ergodic controller equipped with an extended kernel mean embedding error visitation state that recursively records state visitation. This extended state decouples past visitation from future control synthesis and expands ergodic control to infinite-time settings. In addition, we present a variation of the controller that operates on a receding-horizon control formulation with the extended error state. We demonstrate theoretical proof of asymptotic convergence of the derived controller and show preservation of ergodic coverage guarantees for a class of 2D and 3D coverage problems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于核均值嵌入的无限时域遍历控制器，用于解决一般域上的长期覆盖任务，通过引入扩展的误差访问状态来避免计算复杂度随时间的增长问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于核的遍历控制方法虽然在一般覆盖域上提供了强覆盖保证，但由于计算复杂度随时间呈指数增长，实际应用仅限于有限时域，无法用于长期覆盖任务。
AI.method: 推导了基于核均值嵌入的无限时域遍历控制器，引入了扩展的核均值嵌入误差访问状态来递归记录状态访问历史，将过去访问与未来控制解耦，并提出了基于滚动时域控制框架的变体。
AI.result: 证明了所推导控制器的渐近收敛性，并在2D和3D覆盖问题中展示了遍历覆盖保证的保持性，解决了长期覆盖任务的计算可扩展性问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入扩展的误差访问状态，成功将遍历控制扩展到无限时域设置，为长期覆盖任务提供了计算高效且具有理论保证的解决方案。

title: Autonomous Adaptive Solver Selection for Chemistry Integration via Reinforcement Learning
summary: The computational cost of stiff chemical kinetics remains a dominant bottleneck in reacting-flow simulation, yet hybrid integration strategies are typically driven by hand-tuned heuristics or supervised predictors that make myopic decisions from instantaneous local state. We introduce a constrained reinforcement learning (RL) framework that autonomously selects between an implicit BDF integrator (CVODE) and a quasi-steady-state (QSS) solver during chemistry integration. Solver selection is cast as a Markov decision process. The agent learns trajectory-aware policies that account for how present solver choices influence downstream error accumulation, while minimizing computational cost under a user-prescribed accuracy tolerance enforced through a Lagrangian reward with online multiplier adaptation. Across sampled 0D homogeneous reactor conditions, the RL-adaptive policy achieves a mean speedup of approximately $3\times$, with speedups ranging from $1.11\times$ to $10.58\times$, while maintaining accurate ignition delays and species profiles for a 106-species \textit{n}-dodecane mechanism and adding approximately $1\%$ inference overhead. Without retraining, the 0D-trained policy transfers to 1D counterflow diffusion flames over strain rates $10$--$2000~\mathrm{s}^{-1}$, delivering consistent $\approx 2.2\times$ speedup relative to CVODE while preserving near-reference temperature accuracy and selecting CVODE at only $12$--$15\%$ of space-time points. Overall, the results demonstrate the potential of the proposed reinforcement learning framework to learn problem-specific integration strategies while respecting accuracy constraints, thereby opening a pathway toward adaptive, self-optimizing workflows for multiphysics systems with spatially heterogeneous stiffness.

AI.tldr: 提出基于约束强化学习的自适应求解器选择框架，在化学反应动力学计算中自动选择隐式BDF积分器或准稳态求解器，在保证精度的同时实现计算加速。
AI.motivation: 刚性化学动力学计算成本是反应流模拟的主要瓶颈，现有混合积分策略通常基于手动调优的启发式方法或仅考虑瞬时局部状态的监督预测器，缺乏对误差累积的轨迹感知能力。
AI.method: 将求解器选择建模为马尔可夫决策过程，采用约束强化学习框架，通过拉格朗日奖励函数在线调整乘子，在用户规定的精度容差下最小化计算成本，学习考虑当前选择对下游误差积累影响的轨迹感知策略。
AI.result: 在0D均质反应器条件下，RL自适应策略平均加速约3倍（范围1.11-10.58倍），保持106种n-十二烷机理的准确点火延迟和物种分布，仅增加约1%推理开销。未经重新训练，该策略可迁移到1D逆流扩散火焰，在应变率10-2000 s⁻¹范围内实现约2.2倍加速，温度精度接近参考值，仅在12-15%的时空点选择CVODE。
AI.conclusion: 提出的强化学习框架能够学习特定问题的积分策略同时尊重精度约束，为具有空间异质性刚度的多物理场系统开辟了自适应、自优化工作流程的途径。

title: PsychAgent: An Experience-Driven Lifelong Learning Agent for Self-Evolving Psychological Counselor
summary: Existing methods for AI psychological counselors predominantly rely on supervised fine-tuning using static dialogue datasets. However, this contrasts with human experts, who continuously refine their proficiency through clinical practice and accumulated experience. To bridge this gap, we propose an Experience-Driven Lifelong Learning Agent (\texttt{PsychAgent}) for psychological counseling. First, we establish a Memory-Augmented Planning Engine tailored for longitudinal multi-session interactions, which ensures therapeutic continuity through persistent memory and strategic planning. Second, to support self-evolution, we design a Skill Evolution Engine that extracts new practice-grounded skills from historical counseling trajectories. Finally, we introduce a Reinforced Internalization Engine that integrates the evolved skills into the model via rejection fine-tuning, aiming to improve performance across diverse scenarios. Comparative analysis shows that our approach achieves higher scores than strong general LLMs (e.g., GPT-5.4, Gemini-3) and domain-specific baselines across all reported evaluation dimensions. These results suggest that lifelong learning can improve the consistency and overall quality of multi-session counseling responses.

AI.tldr: 提出PsychAgent，一种经验驱动的终身学习AI心理咨询师，通过记忆增强规划引擎、技能进化引擎和强化内化引擎实现持续自我进化，在多轮咨询中表现优于通用大模型和领域基线。
AI.motivation: 现有AI心理咨询方法主要依赖静态对话数据集进行监督微调，这与人类专家通过临床实践和经验积累持续提升能力的方式形成对比。需要弥合这一差距，让AI心理咨询师能够像人类专家一样通过实践经验进行持续学习和进化。
AI.method: 提出三引擎框架：1）记忆增强规划引擎，用于纵向多轮会话交互，通过持久记忆和策略规划确保治疗连续性；2）技能进化引擎，从历史咨询轨迹中提取基于实践的新技能；3）强化内化引擎，通过拒绝微调将进化技能整合到模型中，提升多样化场景下的性能。
AI.result: 比较分析显示，该方法在所有报告评估维度上都优于强大的通用大模型（如GPT-5.4、Gemini-3）和领域特定基线。结果表明终身学习能够提高多轮咨询响应的一致性和整体质量。
AI.conclusion: 经验驱动的终身学习框架PsychAgent能够有效提升AI心理咨询师在多轮会话中的表现，通过模拟人类专家的经验积累和学习过程，实现了比传统静态方法更优的咨询质量和一致性。

title: PET-DINO: Unifying Visual Cues into Grounding DINO with Prompt-Enriched Training
summary: Open-Set Object Detection (OSOD) enables recognition of novel categories beyond fixed classes but faces challenges in aligning text representations with complex visual concepts and the scarcity of image-text pairs for rare categories. This results in suboptimal performance in specialized domains or with complex objects. Recent visual-prompted methods partially address these issues but often involve complex multi-modal designs and multi-stage optimizations, prolonging the development cycle. Additionally, effective training strategies for data-driven OSOD models remain largely unexplored. To address these challenges, we propose PET-DINO, a universal detector supporting both text and visual prompts. Our Alignment-Friendly Visual Prompt Generation (AFVPG) module builds upon an advanced text-prompted detector, addressing the limitations of text representation guidance and reducing the development cycle. We introduce two prompt-enriched training strategies: Intra-Batch Parallel Prompting (IBP) at the iteration level and Dynamic Memory-Driven Prompting (DMD) at the overall training level. These strategies enable simultaneous modeling of multiple prompt routes, facilitating parallel alignment with diverse real-world usage scenarios. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that PET-DINO exhibits competitive zero-shot object detection capabilities across various prompt-based detection protocols. These strengths can be attributed to inheritance-based philosophy and prompt-enriched training strategies, which play a critical role in building an effective generic object detector. Project page: https://fuweifuvtoo.github.io/pet-dino.

AI.tldr: PET-DINO是一个支持文本和视觉提示的通用检测器，通过AFVPG模块和两种提示增强训练策略，解决了开放集目标检测中文本表示与复杂视觉概念对齐困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 开放集目标检测面临文本表示与复杂视觉概念对齐困难、稀有类别图像-文本对稀缺的问题，导致在专业领域或复杂物体上性能不佳。现有视觉提示方法通常涉及复杂的多模态设计和多阶段优化，延长开发周期，且数据驱动的OSOD训练策略研究不足。
AI.method: 提出PET-DINO通用检测器，包含对齐友好的视觉提示生成模块，在先进文本提示检测器基础上构建。引入两种提示增强训练策略：迭代级的批内并行提示和整体训练级的动态记忆驱动提示，支持同时建模多个提示路径，实现与多样化真实使用场景的并行对齐。
AI.result: 综合实验表明，PET-DINO在各种基于提示的检测协议上展现出竞争力的零样本目标检测能力。继承式哲学和提示增强训练策略在构建有效通用目标检测器中发挥关键作用。
AI.conclusion: PET-DINO通过AFVPG模块和创新的训练策略，有效解决了开放集目标检测中的对齐和训练效率问题，为构建通用目标检测器提供了有前景的解决方案。

title: Stein Variational Uncertainty-Adaptive Model Predictive Control
summary: We propose a Stein variational distributionally robust controller for nonlinear dynamical systems with latent parametric uncertainty. The method is an alternative to conservative worst-case ambiguity-set optimization with a deterministic particle-based approximation of a task-dependent uncertainty distribution, enabling the controller to concentrate on parameter sensitivities that most strongly affect closed-loop performance. Our method yields a controller that is robust to latent parameter uncertainty by coupling optimal control with Stein variational inference, and avoiding restrictive parametric assumptions on the uncertainty model while preserving computational parallelism. In contrast to classical DRO, which can sacrifice nominal performance through worst-case design, we find our approach achieves robustness by shaping the control law around relevant uncertainty that are most critical to the task objective. The proposed framework therefore reconciles robust control and variational inference in a single decision-theoretic formulation for broad classes of control systems with parameter uncertainty. We demonstrate our approach on representative control problems that empirically illustrate improved performance-robustness tradeoffs over nominal, ensemble, and classical distributionally robust baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于Stein变分分布的鲁棒控制器，用于处理具有潜在参数不确定性的非线性动力系统，通过任务相关的粒子近似替代保守的最坏情况优化，在保持计算并行性的同时实现更好的性能-鲁棒性权衡。
AI.motivation: 传统分布鲁棒优化（DRO）方法通常采用保守的最坏情况设计，可能牺牲名义性能。现有方法对不确定性模型有严格的参数假设限制，难以处理复杂的非线性系统参数不确定性。
AI.method: 将最优控制与Stein变分推理相结合，采用基于粒子的任务相关不确定性分布近似，避免对不确定性模型的限制性参数假设，同时保持计算并行性。控制器专注于对闭环性能影响最大的参数敏感性。
AI.result: 在代表性控制问题上验证了该方法，相比名义控制、集成控制和经典分布鲁棒基线，实现了更好的性能-鲁棒性权衡，能够围绕对任务目标最关键的相关不确定性来塑造控制律。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在单一决策理论公式中统一了鲁棒控制和变分推理，适用于具有参数不确定性的广泛控制系统类别，为非线性动力系统的鲁棒控制提供了新的有效方法。

title: SYNTHONY: A Stress-Aware, Intent-Conditioned Agent for Deep Tabular Generative Models Selection
