summary: Deep generative models for tabular data (GANs, diffusion models, and LLM-based generators) exhibit highly non-uniform behavior across datasets; the best-performing synthesizer family depends strongly on distributional stressors such as long-tailed marginals, high-cardinality categorical, Zipfian imbalance, and small-sample regimes. This brittleness makes practical deployment challenging, especially when users must balance competing objectives of fidelity, privacy, and utility. We study {intent-conditioned tabular synthesis selection}: given a dataset and a user intent expressed as a preference over evaluation metrics, the goal is to select a synthesizer that minimizes regret relative to an intent-specific oracle. We propose {stress profiling}, a synthesis-specific meta-feature representation that quantifies dataset difficulty along four interpretable stress dimensions, and integrate it into {SYNTHONY}, a selection framework that matches stress profiles against a calibrated capability registry of synthesizer families. Across a benchmark of 7 datasets, 10 synthesizers, and 3 intents, we demonstrate that stress-based meta-features are highly predictive of synthesizer performance: a $k$NN selector using these features achieves strong Top-1 selection accuracy, substantially outperforming zero-shot LLM selectors and random baselines. We analyze the gap between meta-feature-based and capability-based selection, identifying the hand-crafted capability registry as the primary bottleneck and motivating learned capability representations as a direction for future work.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了表格数据生成模型选择问题，提出了基于压力特征的分析方法和SYNTHONY选择框架，能够根据用户意图和数据集特征自动选择最佳生成模型。
AI.motivation: 现有表格数据生成模型（GANs、扩散模型、LLM生成器）在不同数据集上表现不稳定，最佳模型选择高度依赖于数据分布特征，这使得实际部署困难，用户需要在保真度、隐私性和实用性之间平衡。
AI.method: 提出了"压力特征分析"方法，量化数据集在四个可解释压力维度上的难度；开发了SYNTHONY选择框架，将压力特征与校准的能力注册表匹配，使用kNN选择器基于这些特征预测生成器性能。
AI.result: 在7个数据集、10个生成器和3种意图的基准测试中，基于压力特征的kNN选择器实现了强大的Top-1选择准确率，显著优于零样本LLM选择器和随机基线。
AI.conclusion: 压力特征能有效预测生成器性能，但手工制作的能力注册表是主要瓶颈，未来工作需要学习能力表示来进一步提升选择效果。

title: RegFormer: Transferable Relational Grounding for Efficient Weakly-Supervised Human-Object Interaction Detection
summary: Weakly-supervised Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection is essential for scalable scene understanding, as it learns interactions from only image-level annotations. Due to the lack of localization signals, prior works typically rely on an external object detector to generate candidate pairs and then infer their interactions through pairwise reasoning. However, this framework often struggles to scale due to the substantial computational cost incurred by enumerating numerous instance pairs. In addition, it suffers from false positives arising from non-interactive combinations, which hinder accurate instance-level HOI reasoning. To address these issues, we introduce Relational Grounding Transformer (RegFormer), a versatile interaction recognition module for efficient and accurate HOI reasoning. Under image-level supervision, RegFormer leverages spatially grounded signals as guidance for the reasoning process and promotes locality-aware interaction learning. By learning localized interaction cues, our module distinguishes humans, objects, and their interactions, enabling direct transfer from image-level interaction reasoning to precise and efficient instance-level reasoning without additional training. Our extensive experiments and analyses demonstrate that RegFormer effectively learns spatial cues for instance-level interaction reasoning, operates with high efficiency, and even achieves performance comparable to fully supervised models. Our code is available at https://github.com/mlvlab/RegFormer.

AI.tldr: RegFormer是一种用于弱监督人-物交互检测的Transformer模块，通过空间接地信号引导推理过程，实现从图像级交互推理到实例级推理的直接迁移，无需额外训练。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督HOI检测方法依赖外部物体检测器生成候选对，通过成对推理推断交互，但存在计算成本高（枚举大量实例对）和非交互组合导致的假阳性问题，阻碍准确的实例级HOI推理。
AI.method: 提出Relational Grounding Transformer (RegFormer)，利用空间接地信号作为推理过程的引导，促进局部感知的交互学习。通过学习局部化交互线索，模块能够区分人、物体及其交互，实现从图像级交互推理到精确高效的实例级推理的直接迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明RegFormer能有效学习空间线索进行实例级交互推理，运行效率高，甚至达到与全监督模型相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: RegFormer解决了弱监督HOI检测中的计算效率和假阳性问题，通过空间接地信号实现了从图像级到实例级推理的有效迁移，为可扩展的场景理解提供了高效准确的解决方案。

title: BAT: Balancing Agility and Stability via Online Policy Switching for Long-Horizon Whole-Body Humanoid Control
summary: Despite recent advances in control, reinforcement learning, and imitation learning, developing a unified framework that can achieve agile, precise, and robust whole-body behaviors, particularly in long-horizon tasks, remains challenging. Existing approaches typically follow two paradigms: coupled whole-body policies for global coordination and decoupled policies for modular precision. However, without a systematic method to integrate both, this trade-off between agility, robustness, and precision remains unresolved. In this work, we propose BAT, an online policy-switching framework that dynamically selects between two complementary whole-body RL controllers to balance agility and stability across different motion contexts. Our framework consists of two complementary modules: a switching policy learned via hierarchical RL with an expert guidance from sliding-horizon policy pre-evaluation, and an option-aware VQ-VAE that predicts option preference from discrete motion token sequences for improved generalization. The final decision is obtained via confidence-weighted fusion of two modules. Extensive simulations and real-world experiments on the Unitree G1 humanoid robot demonstrate that BAT enables versatile long-horizon loco-manipulation and outperforms prior methods across diverse tasks.

AI.tldr: BAT是一个在线策略切换框架，通过动态选择两个互补的全身RL控制器，在敏捷性和稳定性之间取得平衡，实现长时域全身运动控制。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在敏捷性、鲁棒性和精度之间的权衡问题：耦合的全身策略用于全局协调，解耦策略用于模块化精度，但缺乏系统性的整合方法。
AI.method: 提出BAT框架：1) 通过分层RL学习的切换策略，结合滑动时域策略预评估的专家指导；2) 选项感知的VQ-VAE，从离散运动token序列预测选项偏好；3) 通过置信度加权融合两个模块的最终决策。
AI.result: 在Unitree G1人形机器人上的大量仿真和真实世界实验表明，BAT能够实现多功能的长时域运动操作任务，并在多样化任务中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: BAT框架通过动态策略切换成功解决了敏捷性、鲁棒性和精度之间的权衡问题，为长时域全身运动控制提供了有效的统一解决方案。

title: MAESIL: Masked Autoencoder for Enhanced Self-supervised Medical Image Learning
summary: Training deep learning models for three-dimensional (3D) medical imaging, such as Computed Tomography (CT), is fundamentally challenged by the scarcity of labeled data. While pre-training on natural images is common, it results in a significant domain shift, limiting performance. Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) on unlabeled medical data has emerged as a powerful solution, but prominent frameworks often fail to exploit the inherent 3D nature of CT scans. These methods typically process 3D scans as a collection of independent 2D slices, an approach that fundamentally discards critical axial coherence and the 3D structural context. To address this limitation, we propose the autoencoder for enhanced self-supervised medical image learning(MAESIL), a novel self-supervised learning framework designed to capture 3D structural information efficiently. The core innovation is the 'superpatch', a 3D chunk-based input unit that balances 3D context preservation with computational efficiency. Our framework partitions the volume into superpatches and employs a 3D masked autoencoder strategy with a dual-masking strategy to learn comprehensive spatial representations. We validated our approach on three diverse large-scale public CT datasets. Our experimental results show that MAESIL demonstrates significant improvements over existing methods such as AE, VAE and VQ-VAE in key reconstruction metrics such as PSNR and SSIM. This establishes MAESIL as a robust and practical pre-training solution for 3D medical imaging tasks.

AI.tldr: MAESIL是一种针对3D医学影像的自监督学习框架，通过创新的"超块"设计和双掩码策略，有效捕捉3D结构信息，在CT图像重建任务中显著优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 3D医学影像（如CT）的深度学习训练面临标注数据稀缺的挑战。现有自监督学习方法通常将3D扫描处理为独立的2D切片，这丢弃了关键的轴向连贯性和3D结构上下文信息，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 提出MAESIL框架，核心创新是"超块"——一种平衡3D上下文保存与计算效率的3D块状输入单元。采用3D掩码自编码器策略和双掩码策略，将体积分割为超块，学习全面的空间表示。
AI.result: 在三个不同的大规模公共CT数据集上验证，MAESIL在PSNR和SSIM等关键重建指标上显著优于AE、VAE和VQ-VAE等现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MAESIL为3D医学影像任务提供了一个强大且实用的预训练解决方案，能够有效捕捉3D结构信息，解决现有方法忽略3D上下文的局限性。

title: VRUD: A Drone Dataset for Complex Vehicle-VRU Interactions within Mixed Traffic
summary: The Operational Design Domain (ODD) of urbanoriented Level 4 (L4) autonomous driving, especially for autonomous robotaxis, confronts formidable challenges in complex urban mixed traffic environments. These challenges stem mainly from the high density of Vulnerable Road Users (VRUs) and their highly uncertain and unpredictable interaction behaviors. However, existing open-source datasets predominantly focus on structured scenarios such as highways or regulated intersections, leaving a critical gap in data representing chaotic, unstructured urban environments. To address this, this paper proposes an efficient, high-precision method for constructing drone-based datasets and establishes the Vehicle-Vulnerable Road User Interaction Dataset (VRUD), as illustrated in Figure 1. Distinct from prior works, VRUD is collected from typical "Urban Villages" in Shenzhen, characterized by loose traffic supervision and extreme occlusion. The dataset comprises 4 hours of 4K/30Hz recording, containing 11,479 VRU trajectories and 1,939 vehicle trajectories. A key characteristic of VRUD is its composition: VRUs account for about 87% of all traffic participants, significantly exceeding the proportions in existing benchmarks. Furthermore, unlike datasets that only provide raw trajectories, we extracted 4,002 multi-agent interaction scenarios based on a novel Vector Time to Collision (VTTC) threshold, supported by standard OpenDRIVE HD maps. This study provides valuable, rare edge-case resources for enhancing the safety performance of ADS in complex, unstructured urban environments. To facilitate further research, we have made the VRUD dataset open-source at: https://zzi4.github.io/VRUD/.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个基于无人机采集的车辆-弱势道路使用者交互数据集（VRUD），专门针对复杂、非结构化的城市环境，填补了现有数据集在混乱城市交通场景中的空白。
AI.motivation: 城市L4级自动驾驶（特别是自动驾驶出租车）在复杂的城市混合交通环境中面临巨大挑战，主要源于弱势道路使用者（VRU）的高密度及其高度不确定和不可预测的交互行为。现有开源数据集主要关注高速公路或规范交叉口等结构化场景，缺乏代表混乱、非结构化城市环境的数据。
AI.method: 提出了一种高效、高精度的基于无人机的数据集构建方法，建立了VRUD数据集。数据采集自深圳典型的"城中村"区域，这些区域交通监管松散且存在极端遮挡。数据集包含4小时4K/30Hz的录像，涵盖11,479个VRU轨迹和1,939个车辆轨迹。基于新颖的矢量碰撞时间（VTTC）阈值提取了4,002个多智能体交互场景，并提供了标准的OpenDRIVE高清地图支持。
AI.result: VRUD数据集的特点是VRU占所有交通参与者的约87%，显著超过现有基准数据集的比例。与仅提供原始轨迹的数据集不同，该研究提供了基于VTTC阈值提取的多智能体交互场景，为增强自动驾驶系统在复杂非结构化城市环境中的安全性能提供了宝贵的边缘案例资源。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为提升自动驾驶系统在复杂非结构化城市环境中的安全性能提供了有价值的稀缺边缘案例资源。VRUD数据集已开源，可供进一步研究使用。

title: Robust Multimodal Safety via Conditional Decoding
comment: 8 pages + Appendix section. Submitted to ACL 2026
summary: Multimodal large-language models (MLLMs) often experience degraded safety alignment when harmful queries exploit cross-modal interactions. Models aligned on text alone show a higher rate of successful attacks when extended to two or more modalities. In this work, we propose a simple conditional decoding strategy, CASA (Classification Augmented with Safety Attention) that utilizes internal representations of MLLMs to predict a binary safety token before response generation. We introduce a novel safety attention module designed to enhance the model's ability to detect malicious queries. Our design ensures robust safety alignment without relying on any external classifier or auxiliary head, and without the need for modality-specific safety fine-tuning. On diverse benchmarks such as MM-SafetyBench, JailbreakV-28k, and adversarial audio tests, CASA lowers the average attack success rate by more than 97% across modalities and across attack types. Our empirical evaluations also show that CASA maintains strong utility in benign inputs, a result validated through both automated and human evaluations (via 13 trained annotators). Together, these results highlight CASA as a simple and generalizable framework to improve multimodal LLM safety.

AI.tldr: CASA是一种简单的条件解码策略，利用多模态大语言模型的内部表示来预测安全标记，通过安全注意力模块增强恶意查询检测能力，无需外部分类器或模态特定微调。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在跨模态交互被有害查询利用时，安全对齐会退化。仅基于文本对齐的模型扩展到两个或多个模态时，攻击成功率更高。
AI.method: 提出CASA条件解码策略，利用MLLM内部表示预测二元安全标记，引入新颖的安全注意力模块增强恶意查询检测能力。设计确保鲁棒的安全对齐，无需外部分类器、辅助头或模态特定安全微调。
AI.result: 在MM-SafetyBench、JailbreakV-28k和对抗音频测试等多样化基准上，CASA将跨模态和跨攻击类型的平均攻击成功率降低了97%以上。在良性输入上保持强实用性，通过自动和人工评估验证。
AI.conclusion: CASA是一个简单且可泛化的框架，能显著提升多模态LLM的安全性，同时保持实用性。

title: Detecting Multi-Agent Collusion Through Multi-Agent Interpretability
summary: As LLM agents are increasingly deployed in multi-agent systems, they introduce risks of covert coordination that may evade standard forms of human oversight. While linear probes on model activations have shown promise for detecting deception in single-agent settings, collusion is inherently a multi-agent phenomenon, and the use of internal representations for detecting collusion between agents remains unexplored. We introduce NARCBench, a benchmark for evaluating collusion detection under environment distribution shift, and propose five probing techniques that aggregate per-agent deception scores to classify scenarios at the group level. Our probes achieve 1.00 AUROC in-distribution and 0.60--0.86 AUROC when transferred zero-shot to structurally different multi-agent scenarios and a steganographic blackjack card-counting task. We find that no single probing technique dominates across all collusion types, suggesting that different forms of collusion manifest differently in activation space. We also find preliminary evidence that this signal is localised at the token level, with the colluding agent's activations spiking specifically when processing the encoded parts of their partner's message. This work takes a step toward multi-agent interpretability: extending white-box inspection from single models to multi-agent contexts, where detection requires aggregating signals across agents. These results suggest that model internals provide a complementary signal to text-level monitoring for detecting multi-agent collusion, particularly for organisations with access to model activations. Code and data are available at https://github.com/aaronrose227/narcbench.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了NARCBench基准，用于评估多智能体系统中的共谋检测，并开发了五种基于模型内部激活的探测技术，在分布偏移下仍能有效检测不同形式的共谋行为。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM智能体在多智能体系统中的部署增加，它们带来了隐蔽协调的风险，这可能逃避标准的人类监督形式。虽然线性探测在单智能体欺骗检测中表现出潜力，但共谋本质上是多智能体现象，使用内部表示检测智能体之间的共谋尚未被探索。
AI.method: 引入NARCBench基准来评估环境分布偏移下的共谋检测，提出了五种探测技术，这些技术通过聚合每个智能体的欺骗分数来在群体层面分类场景。研究探索了不同探测方法在不同共谋类型中的表现。
AI.result: 探测技术在分布内达到1.00 AUROC，在零样本转移到结构不同的多智能体场景和隐写式21点算牌任务中达到0.60-0.86 AUROC。研究发现没有单一探测技术在所有共谋类型中占主导地位，表明不同形式的共谋在激活空间中以不同方式表现。初步证据显示信号在token级别局部化，共谋智能体的激活在处理其伙伴消息的编码部分时特别显著。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作向多智能体可解释性迈出了一步：将白盒检查从单一模型扩展到多智能体环境，其中检测需要跨智能体聚合信号。结果表明，模型内部为检测多智能体共谋提供了与文本级监控互补的信号，特别是对于能够访问模型激活的组织。

title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Robotic Manipulation under Distribution Shift with Bounded Extremum Seeking
summary: Reinforcement learning has shown strong performance in robotic manipulation, but learned policies often degrade in performance when test conditions differ from the training distribution. This limitation is especially important in contact-rich tasks such as pushing and pick-and-place, where changes in goals, contact conditions, or robot dynamics can drive the system out-of-distribution at inference time. In this paper, we investigate a hybrid controller that combines reinforcement learning with bounded extremum seeking to improve robustness under such conditions. In the proposed approach, deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) policies are trained under standard conditions on the robotic pushing and pick-and-place tasks, and are then combined with bounded ES during deployment. The RL policy provides fast manipulation behavior, while bounded ES ensures robustness of the overall controller to time variations when operating conditions depart from those seen during training. The resulting controller is evaluated under several out-of-distribution settings, including time-varying goals and spatially varying friction patches.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合强化学习与有界极值搜索的混合控制器，用于提升机器人操作任务在分布外条件下的鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 强化学习在机器人操作中表现出色，但训练策略在测试条件与训练分布不同时性能会下降。这在接触丰富的任务（如推动和抓取放置）中尤为突出，因为目标、接触条件或机器人动力学的变化都可能导致推理时系统处于分布外状态。
AI.method: 提出混合控制器，将深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）策略与有界极值搜索（bounded ES）结合。首先在标准条件下训练DDPG策略，然后在部署时与有界ES结合。RL策略提供快速操作行为，而有界ES确保在操作条件偏离训练条件时整体控制器对时间变化的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多种分布外设置下评估控制器，包括时变目标和空间变化的摩擦斑块条件。
AI.conclusion: 结合强化学习与有界极值搜索的混合方法能够提升机器人操作任务在分布外条件下的鲁棒性，RL提供快速响应，ES确保对条件变化的适应性。

title: Therefore I am. I Think
summary: We consider the question: when a large language reasoning model makes a choice, did it think first and then decide to, or decide first and then think? In this paper, we present evidence that detectable, early-encoded decisions shape chain-of-thought in reasoning models. Specifically, we show that a simple linear probe successfully decodes tool-calling decisions from pre-generation activations with very high confidence, and in some cases, even before a single reasoning token is produced. Activation steering supports this causally: perturbing the decision direction leads to inflated deliberation, and flips behavior in many examples (between 7 - 79% depending on model and benchmark). We also show through behavioral analysis that, when steering changes the decision, the chain-of-thought process often rationalizes the flip rather than resisting it. Together, these results suggest that reasoning models can encode action choices before they begin to deliberate in text.

AI.tldr: 研究发现大型语言推理模型在做出选择时，往往是先决定后思考，而不是先思考后决定。通过线性探针和激活操控技术，证明模型在生成推理过程之前就已经编码了决策。
AI.motivation: 探究大型语言推理模型在决策时的认知过程：是"先思考后决定"还是"先决定后思考"？理解模型内部决策机制对于提高其透明度和可靠性具有重要意义。
AI.method: 使用线性探针从预生成激活中解码工具调用决策；通过激活操控技术扰动决策方向；进行行为分析观察思维链过程对决策翻转的反应。
AI.result: 线性探针能以高置信度从预生成激活中解码决策，有时甚至在生成第一个推理标记之前；激活操控导致过度审议，并在7-79%的案例中翻转行为；思维链过程倾向于合理化决策翻转而非抵抗。
AI.conclusion: 推理模型在开始文本审议之前就能编码行动选择，支持"先决定后思考"的假设，这对理解模型内部工作机制和提升其透明度有重要启示。

title: Learnability-Guided Diffusion for Dataset Distillation
comment: This paper has been accepted to CVPR 2026
summary: Training machine learning models on massive datasets is expensive and time-consuming. Dataset distillation addresses this by creating a small synthetic dataset that achieves the same performance as the full dataset. Recent methods use diffusion models to generate distilled data, either by promoting diversity or matching training gradients. However, existing approaches produce redundant training signals, where samples convey overlapping information. Empirically, disjoint subsets of distilled datasets capture 80-90% overlapping signals. This redundancy stems from optimizing visual diversity or average training dynamics without accounting for similarity across samples, leading to datasets where multiple samples share similar information rather than complementary knowledge. We propose learnability-driven dataset distillation, which constructs synthetic datasets incrementally through successive stages. Starting from a small set, we train a model and generate new samples guided by learnability scores that identify what the current model can learn from, creating an adaptive curriculum. We introduce Learnability-Guided Diffusion (LGD), which balances training utility for the current model with validity under a reference model to generate curriculum-aligned samples. Our approach reduces redundancy by 39.1%, promotes specialization across training stages, and achieves state-of-the-art results on ImageNet-1K (60.1%), ImageNette (87.2%), and ImageWoof (72.9%). Our code is available on our project page https://jachansantiago.github.io/learnability-guided-distillation/.

AI.tldr: 提出基于可学习性指导的数据集蒸馏方法，通过增量式构建合成数据集减少冗余，在ImageNet等数据集上达到SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的数据集蒸馏方法产生冗余的训练信号，不同样本传递重叠信息而非互补知识，导致效率低下
AI.method: 提出可学习性指导的数据集蒸馏（LGD），通过增量式构建合成数据集，使用可学习性评分指导生成新样本，平衡当前模型的训练效用和参考模型的有效性
AI.result: 冗余减少39.1%，在ImageNet-1K达到60.1%、ImageNette 87.2%、ImageWoof 72.9%的SOTA性能
AI.conclusion: 基于可学习性指导的增量式数据集蒸馏能有效减少冗余，促进训练阶段专业化，显著提升数据集蒸馏性能

title: SMASH: Mastering Scalable Whole-Body Skills for Humanoid Ping-Pong with Egocentric Vision
summary: Existing humanoid table tennis systems remain limited by their reliance on external sensing and their inability to achieve agile whole-body coordination for precise task execution. These limitations stem from two core challenges: achieving low-latency and robust onboard egocentric perception under fast robot motion, and obtaining sufficiently diverse task-aligned strike motions for learning precise yet natural whole-body behaviors. In this work, we present \methodname, a modular system for agile humanoid table tennis that unifies scalable whole-body skill learning with onboard egocentric perception, eliminating the need for external cameras during deployment. Our work advances prior humanoid table-tennis systems in three key aspects. First, we achieve agile and precise ball interaction with tightly coordinated whole-body control, rather than relying on decoupled upper- and lower-body behaviors. This enables the system to exhibit diverse strike motions, including explosive whole-body smashes and low crouching shots. Second, by augmenting and diversifying strike motions with a generative model, our framework benefits from scalable motion priors and produces natural, robust striking behaviors across a wide workspace. Third, to the best of our knowledge, we demonstrate the first humanoid table-tennis system capable of consecutive strikes using onboard sensing alone, despite the challenges of low-latency perception, ego-motion-induced instability, and limited field of view. Extensive real-world experiments demonstrate stable and precise ball exchanges under high-speed conditions, validating scalable, perception-driven whole-body skill learning for dynamic humanoid interaction tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为\methodname的模块化系统，通过结合可扩展的全身技能学习和机载自我中心感知，实现了敏捷的人形机器人乒乓球系统，无需外部摄像头即可完成连续击球。
AI.motivation: 现有的人形乒乓球系统存在两个核心限制：1）依赖外部感知系统；2）无法实现敏捷的全身协调以执行精确任务。这源于两个挑战：在快速机器人运动下实现低延迟、鲁棒的机载自我中心感知，以及获取足够多样化的任务对齐击球动作来学习精确自然的全身行为。
AI.method: 提出了一个模块化系统，包含三个关键创新：1）通过紧密协调的全身控制实现敏捷精确的球体交互，而非分离的上半身和下半身行为；2）使用生成模型增强和多样化击球动作，获得可扩展的运动先验；3）首次实现仅使用机载感知就能完成连续击球的人形乒乓球系统。
AI.result: 广泛的真实世界实验表明，系统能在高速条件下实现稳定精确的球体交换，验证了可扩展的感知驱动全身技能学习在动态人形交互任务中的有效性。系统能够执行多样化的击球动作，包括爆炸性的全身扣杀和低蹲击球。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了通过结合可扩展的全身技能学习和机载自我中心感知，可以克服现有系统的局限性，实现无需外部摄像头的高性能人形乒乓球系统，为动态人形交互任务提供了新的解决方案。

title: Is One Token All It Takes? Graph Pooling Tokens for LLM-based GraphQA
summary: The integration of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) with Large Language Models (LLMs) has emerged as a promising paradigm for Graph Question Answering (GraphQA). However, effective methods for encoding complex structural information into the LLM's latent space remain an open challenge. Current state-of-the-art architectures, such as G-Retriever, typically rely on standard GNNs and aggressive mean pooling to compress entire graph substructures into a single token, creating a severe information bottleneck. This work mitigates this bottleneck by investigating two orthogonal strategies: (1) increasing the bandwidth of the graph-to-LLM interface via multi-token pooling, and (2) enhancing the semantic quality of the graph encoder via global attention mechanisms. We evaluate a suite of hierarchical pruning and clustering-based pooling operators including Top-k, SAGPool, DiffPool, MinCutPool, and Virtual Node Pooling (VNPool) to project graph data into multiple learnable tokens. Empirically, we demonstrate that while pooling introduces significant instability during soft prompt tuning, the application of Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) effectively stabilizes specific hierarchical projections (notably VNPool and pruning methods), though dense clustering operators remain challenging. This stabilization allows compressed representations to rival full-graph baselines (achieving ~73% Hit@1 on WebQSP). Conceptually, we demonstrate that a Graph Transformer with VNPool implementation functions structurally as a single-layer Perceiver IO encoder. Finally, we adapt the FandE (Features and Edges) Score to the generative GraphQA domain. Our analysis reveals that the GraphQA benchmark suffers from representational saturation, where target answers are often highly correlated with isolated node features. The implementation is available at https://github.com/Agrover112/G-Retriever/tree/all_good/

AI.tldr: 该研究通过多令牌池化和全局注意力机制缓解GNN与LLM集成中的信息瓶颈问题，评估多种池化算子并发现LoRA能稳定特定分层投影，使压缩表示媲美全图基线。
AI.motivation: 当前GNN与LLM集成方法（如G-Retriever）存在严重信息瓶颈，它们使用标准GNN和激进的平均池化将整个图子结构压缩为单个令牌，导致复杂结构信息丢失。
AI.method: 采用两种正交策略：1）通过多令牌池化增加图到LLM接口的带宽；2）通过全局注意力机制增强图编码器的语义质量。评估了Top-k、SAGPool、DiffPool、MinCutPool和VNPool等分层剪枝和基于聚类的池化算子，并使用LoRA稳定训练过程。
AI.result: 池化在软提示调优中引入显著不稳定性，但LoRA能有效稳定特定分层投影（特别是VNPool和剪枝方法）。压缩表示能媲美全图基线（在WebQSP上达到约73% Hit@1）。分析显示GraphQA基准存在表示饱和问题，目标答案常与孤立节点特征高度相关。
AI.conclusion: 多令牌池化和全局注意力机制能有效缓解图到LLM接口的信息瓶颈，VNPool在结构上相当于单层Perceiver IO编码器。GraphQA基准需要更复杂的评估指标来避免表示饱和问题。

title: AceTone: Bridging Words and Colors for Conditional Image Grading
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026. Project Page: github.com/martian422/AceTone
summary: Color affects how we interpret image style and emotion. Previous color grading methods rely on patch-wise recoloring or fixed filter banks, struggling to generalize across creative intents or align with human aesthetic preferences. In this study, we propose AceTone, the first approach that supports multimodal conditioned color grading within a unified framework. AceTone formulates grading as a generative color transformation task, where a model directly produces 3D-LUTs conditioned on text prompts or reference images. We develop a VQ-VAE based tokenizer which compresses a $3\times32^3$ LUT vector to 64 discrete tokens with $ΔE<2$ fidelity. We further build a large-scale dataset, AceTone-800K, and train a vision-language model to predict LUT tokens, followed by reinforcement learning to align outputs with perceptual fidelity and aesthetics. Experiments show that AceTone achieves state-of-the-art performance on both text-guided and reference-guided grading tasks, improving LPIPS by up to 50% over existing methods. Human evaluations confirm that AceTone's results are visually pleasing and stylistically coherent, demonstrating a new pathway toward language-driven, aesthetic-aligned color grading.

AI.tldr: AceTone提出首个支持多模态条件色彩分级的方法，通过生成3D-LUTs实现文本或参考图像驱动的色彩调整，在保真度和美学对齐方面优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 色彩影响图像风格和情感表达，现有色彩分级方法依赖局部重着色或固定滤镜库，难以泛化到不同创意意图或符合人类美学偏好。
AI.method: 将色彩分级建模为生成式色彩转换任务，使用VQ-VAE将3D-LUT向量压缩为离散token，构建大规模数据集并训练视觉语言模型预测LUT token，最后通过强化学习对齐感知保真度和美学。
AI.result: 在文本引导和参考引导的色彩分级任务中达到最先进性能，LPIPS指标提升高达50%，人类评估确认结果视觉愉悦且风格一致。
AI.conclusion: AceTone展示了语言驱动、美学对齐的色彩分级新途径，通过统一框架支持多模态条件控制，显著提升了色彩分级的质量和泛化能力。

title: Collaborative Task and Path Planning for Heterogeneous Robotic Teams using Multi-Agent PPO
summary: Efficient robotic extraterrestrial exploration requires robots with diverse capabilities, ranging from scientific measurement tools to advanced locomotion. A robotic team enables the distribution of tasks over multiple specialized subsystems, each providing specific expertise to complete the mission. The central challenge lies in efficiently coordinating the team to maximize utilization and the extraction of scientific value. Classical planning algorithms scale poorly with problem size, leading to long planning cycles and high inference costs due to the combinatorial growth of possible robot-target allocations and possible trajectories. Learning-based methods are a viable alternative that move the scaling concern from runtime to training time, setting a critical step towards achieving real-time planning. In this work, we present a collaborative planning strategy based on Multi-Agent Proximal Policy Optimization (MAPPO) to coordinate a team of heterogeneous robots to solve a complex target allocation and scheduling problem. We benchmark our approach against single-objective optimal solutions obtained through exhaustive search and evaluate its ability to perform online replanning in the context of a planetary exploration scenario.

AI.tldr: 基于MAPPO的多智能体协同规划策略，用于协调异构机器人团队解决复杂的目标分配与调度问题，相比传统规划算法具有更好的可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 地外探索需要具备多样化能力的机器人团队，但传统规划算法在问题规模增大时扩展性差，导致规划周期长、推理成本高。学习型方法将扩展性问题从运行时转移到训练时，是实现实时规划的关键步骤。
AI.method: 采用多智能体近端策略优化（MAPPO）算法，开发协同规划策略来协调异构机器人团队，解决复杂的目标分配和调度问题。
AI.result: 通过穷举搜索获得的单目标最优解进行基准测试，并在行星探索场景中评估了在线重新规划的能力。
AI.conclusion: MAPPO为基础的协同规划策略能够有效协调异构机器人团队，相比传统规划算法具有更好的可扩展性，是实现实时规划的有前景的方法。

title: FreqPhys: Repurposing Implicit Physiological Frequency Prior for Robust Remote Photoplethysmography
summary: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables contactless physiological monitoring by capturing subtle skin-color variations from facial videos. However, most existing methods predominantly rely on time-domain modeling, making them vulnerable to motion artifacts and illumination fluctuations, where weak physiological clues are easily overwhelmed by noise. To address these challenges, we propose FreqPhys, a frequency-guided rPPG framework that explicitly leverages physiological frequency priors for robust signal recovery. Specifically, FreqPhys first applies a Physiological Bandpass Filtering module to suppress out-of-band interference, and then performs Physiological Spectrum Modulation together with adaptive spectral selection to emphasize pulse-related frequency components while suppress residual in-band noise. A Cross-domain Representation Learning module further fuses these spectral priors with deep time-domain features to capture informative spatial--temporal dependencies. Finally, a frequency-aware conditional diffusion process progressively reconstructs high-fidelity rPPG signals. Extensive experiments on six benchmarks demonstrate that FreqPhys yields significant improvements over state-of-the-art approaches, particularly under challenging motion conditions. It highlights the importance of explicitly modeling physiological frequency priors. The source code will be released.

AI.tldr: FreqPhys是一个基于频率引导的远程光电容积描记术框架，通过显式利用生理频率先验来增强信号恢复的鲁棒性，有效应对运动伪影和光照变化带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有rPPG方法主要依赖时域建模，容易受到运动伪影和光照波动的影响，微弱的生理信号容易被噪声淹没。需要一种更鲁棒的方法来应对这些挑战。
AI.method: 提出FreqPhys框架：1) 生理带通滤波模块抑制带外干扰；2) 生理频谱调制和自适应频谱选择增强脉搏相关频率成分；3) 跨域表示学习模块融合频谱先验和深度时域特征；4) 频率感知条件扩散过程逐步重建高质量rPPG信号。
AI.result: 在六个基准测试上的广泛实验表明，FreqPhys相比最先进方法有显著改进，特别是在具有挑战性的运动条件下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: FreqPhys框架通过显式建模生理频率先验，显著提升了rPPG信号恢复的鲁棒性和准确性，特别是在复杂运动条件下。这突显了显式利用生理频率先验的重要性。

title: Functional Force-Aware Retargeting from Virtual Human Demos to Soft Robot Policies
summary: We introduce SoftAct, a framework for teaching soft robot hands to perform human-like manipulation skills by explicitly reasoning about contact forces. Leveraging immersive virtual reality, our system captures rich human demonstrations, including hand kinematics, object motion, dense contact patches, and detailed contact force information. Unlike conventional approaches that retarget human joint trajectories, SoftAct employs a two-stage, force-aware retargeting algorithm. The first stage attributes demonstrated contact forces to individual human fingers and allocates robot fingers proportionally, establishing a force-balanced mapping between human and robot hands. The second stage performs online retargeting by combining baseline end-effector pose tracking with geodesic-weighted contact refinements, using contact geometry and force magnitude to adjust robot fingertip targets in real time. This formulation enables soft robotic hands to reproduce the functional intent of human demonstrations while naturally accommodating extreme embodiment mismatch and nonlinear compliance. We evaluate SoftAct on a suite of contact-rich manipulation tasks using a custom non-anthropomorphic pneumatic soft robot hand. SoftAct's controller reduces fingertip trajectory tracking RMSE by up to 55 percent and reduces tracking variance by up to 69 percent compared to kinematic and learning-based baselines. At the policy level, SoftAct achieves consistently higher success in zero-shot real-world deployment and in simulation. These results demonstrate that explicitly modeling contact geometry and force distribution is essential for effective skill transfer to soft robotic hands, and cannot be recovered through kinematic imitation alone. Project videos and additional details are available at https://soft-act.github.io/.

AI.tldr: SoftAct是一个通过显式推理接触力来教授软体机器人手执行类人操作技能的框架，使用VR捕捉人类演示并采用两阶段力感知重定向算法，显著提升软体手在接触丰富任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常仅重定向人类关节轨迹，无法有效处理软体机器人手与人类手之间的极端形态不匹配和非线性柔顺性，导致技能转移效果不佳。需要显式建模接触几何和力分布来实现有效的技能转移。
AI.method: 1. 使用沉浸式VR捕捉人类演示数据（手部运动学、物体运动、密集接触斑块、详细接触力信息）；2. 两阶段力感知重定向算法：第一阶段将演示接触力分配给人类手指并按比例分配给机器人手指，建立力平衡映射；第二阶段结合基线末端执行器姿态跟踪与测地加权接触细化，实时调整机器人指尖目标。
AI.result: 在定制非拟人化气动软体机器人手上评估接触丰富的操作任务：1. 控制器将指尖轨迹跟踪RMSE降低高达55%，跟踪方差降低高达69%（相比运动学和基于学习的基线）；2. 策略层面在零样本现实世界部署和仿真中均获得更高成功率。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模接触几何和力分布对于软体机器人手的有效技能转移至关重要，仅靠运动学模仿无法恢复这些信息。SoftAct框架能够使软体机器人手重现人类演示的功能意图，同时自然适应极端形态不匹配和非线性柔顺性。

title: GUIDE: Reinforcement Learning for Behavioral Action Support in Type 1 Diabetes
summary: Type 1 Diabetes (T1D) management requires continuous adjustment of insulin and lifestyle behaviors to maintain blood glucose within a safe target range. Although automated insulin delivery (AID) systems have improved glycemic outcomes, many patients still fail to achieve recommended clinical targets, warranting new approaches to improve glucose control in patients with T1D. While reinforcement learning (RL) has been utilized as a promising approach, current RL-based methods focus primarily on insulin-only treatment and do not provide behavioral recommendations for glucose control. To address this gap, we propose GUIDE, an RL-based decision-support framework designed to complement AID technologies by providing behavioral recommendations to prevent abnormal glucose events. GUIDE generates structured actions defined by intervention type, magnitude, and timing, including bolus insulin administration and carbohydrate intake events. GUIDE integrates a patient-specific glucose level predictor trained on real-world continuous glucose monitoring data and supports both offline and online RL algorithms within a unified environment. We evaluate both off-policy and on-policy methods across 25 individuals with T1D using standardized glycemic metrics. Among the evaluated approaches, the CQL-BC algorithm demonstrates the highest average time-in-range, reaching 85.49% while maintaining low hypoglycemia exposures. Behavioral similarity analysis further indicates that the learned CQL-BC policy preserves key structural characteristics of patient action patterns, achieving a mean cosine similarity of 0.87 $\pm$ 0.09 across subjects. These findings suggest that conservative offline RL with a structured behavioral action space can provide clinically meaningful and behaviorally plausible decision support for personalized diabetes management.

AI.tldr: GUIDE是一个基于强化学习的决策支持框架，为1型糖尿病患者提供行为建议（胰岛素和碳水化合物摄入），以补充自动胰岛素输送系统，提高血糖控制效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管自动胰岛素输送系统改善了血糖结果，但许多1型糖尿病患者仍无法达到推荐的临床目标。现有强化学习方法主要关注胰岛素治疗，缺乏对血糖控制的行为建议。
AI.method: 提出GUIDE框架，使用结构化动作空间（干预类型、幅度和时间），包括胰岛素推注和碳水化合物摄入。整合患者特异性血糖预测器，支持离线和在线强化学习算法，在统一环境中评估。
AI.result: 在25名1型糖尿病患者中评估，CQL-BC算法表现最佳，平均血糖在目标范围内时间达到85.49%，同时保持低低血糖暴露。行为相似性分析显示学习到的策略保留了患者行为模式的关键结构特征。
AI.conclusion: 保守的离线强化学习结合结构化行为动作空间可以为个性化糖尿病管理提供具有临床意义且行为合理的决策支持。

title: DVGT-2: Vision-Geometry-Action Model for Autonomous Driving at Scale
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving has evolved from the conventional paradigm based on sparse perception into vision-language-action (VLA) models, which focus on learning language descriptions as an auxiliary task to facilitate planning. In this paper, we propose an alternative Vision-Geometry-Action (VGA) paradigm that advocates dense 3D geometry as the critical cue for autonomous driving. As vehicles operate in a 3D world, we think dense 3D geometry provides the most comprehensive information for decision-making. However, most existing geometry reconstruction methods (e.g., DVGT) rely on computationally expensive batch processing of multi-frame inputs and cannot be applied to online planning. To address this, we introduce a streaming Driving Visual Geometry Transformer (DVGT-2), which processes inputs in an online manner and jointly outputs dense geometry and trajectory planning for the current frame. We employ temporal causal attention and cache historical features to support on-the-fly inference. To further enhance efficiency, we propose a sliding-window streaming strategy and use historical caches within a certain interval to avoid repetitive computations. Despite the faster speed, DVGT-2 achieves superior geometry reconstruction performance on various datasets. The same trained DVGT-2 can be directly applied to planning across diverse camera configurations without fine-tuning, including closed-loop NAVSIM and open-loop nuScenes benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出Vision-Geometry-Action (VGA)自动驾驶新范式，强调密集3D几何信息的重要性，并开发了在线推理的DVGT-2模型，能够同时输出几何重建和轨迹规划。
AI.motivation: 当前端到端自动驾驶从稀疏感知发展到VLA模型，但作者认为车辆在3D世界中运行，密集3D几何信息才是决策的最全面信息源。然而现有几何重建方法依赖多帧批量处理，无法用于在线规划。
AI.method: 提出DVGT-2模型，采用在线处理方式，使用时间因果注意力和历史特征缓存支持实时推理。引入滑动窗口流式策略，在特定间隔内使用历史缓存避免重复计算，能够同时输出密集几何重建和轨迹规划。
AI.result: DVGT-2在多个数据集上实现了更优的几何重建性能，且速度更快。同一训练好的DVGT-2模型可以直接应用于不同相机配置的规划任务，无需微调，在NAVSIM闭环和nuScenes开环基准测试中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: Vision-Geometry-Action (VGA)范式通过密集3D几何信息为自动驾驶决策提供更全面的依据，DVGT-2模型实现了高效的在线几何重建和规划，展示了3D几何信息在自动驾驶中的关键作用。

title: Gradient-Based Data Valuation Improves Curriculum Learning for Game-Theoretic Motion Planning
summary: We demonstrate that gradient-based data valuation produces curriculum orderings that significantly outperform metadata-based heuristics for training game-theoretic motion planners. Specifically, we apply TracIn gradient-similarity scoring to GameFormer on the nuPlan benchmark and construct a curriculum that weights training scenarios by their estimated contribution to validation loss reduction. Across three random seeds, the TracIn-weighted curriculum achieves a mean planning ADE of $1.704\pm0.029$\,m, significantly outperforming the metadata-based interaction-difficulty curriculum ($1.822\pm0.014$\,m; paired $t$-test $p=0.021$, Cohen's $d_z=3.88$) while exhibiting lower variance than the uniform baseline ($1.772\pm0.134$\,m). Our analysis reveals that TracIn scores and scenario metadata are nearly orthogonal (Spearman $ρ=-0.014$), indicating that gradient-based valuation captures training dynamics invisible to hand-crafted features. We further show that gradient-based curriculum weighting succeeds where hard data selection fails: TracIn-curated 20\% subsets degrade performance by $2\times$, whereas full-data curriculum weighting with the same scores yields the best results. These findings establish gradient-based data valuation as a practical tool for improving sample efficiency in game-theoretic planning.

AI.tldr: 基于梯度的数据估值方法显著优于基于元数据的启发式方法，用于训练博弈论运动规划器的课程排序。TracIn梯度相似性评分在nuPlan基准测试中表现优异，通过估计训练场景对验证损失减少的贡献来构建课程权重。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在探索更有效的课程学习方法，以提升博弈论运动规划器的训练效率。传统基于元数据的启发式方法存在局限性，需要更智能的数据估值方法来优化训练过程。
AI.method: 采用TracIn梯度相似性评分方法，应用于GameFormer模型在nuPlan基准测试上。通过计算训练场景对验证损失减少的估计贡献来构建课程权重，而不是依赖人工设计的元数据特征。
AI.result: TracIn加权课程在三个随机种子下平均规划ADE为1.704±0.029米，显著优于基于交互难度的元数据课程（1.822±0.014米）。分析显示TracIn评分与场景元数据几乎正交（Spearman ρ=-0.014），表明梯度估值能捕捉手工特征无法发现的训练动态。
AI.conclusion: 基于梯度的数据估值是提高博弈论规划样本效率的实用工具。全数据课程加权优于硬数据选择，梯度方法能有效优化训练过程，为运动规划领域提供了新的课程学习策略。

title: TRiGS: Temporal Rigid-Body Motion for Scalable 4D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Recent 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) methods achieve impressive dynamic scene reconstruction but often rely on piecewise linear velocity approximations and short temporal windows. This disjointed modeling leads to severe temporal fragmentation, forcing primitives to be repeatedly eliminated and regenerated to track complex nonlinear dynamics. This makeshift approximation eliminates the long-term temporal identity of objects and causes an inevitable proliferation of Gaussians, hindering scalability to extended video sequences. To address this, we propose TRiGS, a novel 4D representation that utilizes unified, continuous geometric transformations. By integrating $SE(3)$ transformations, hierarchical Bezier residuals, and learnable local anchors, TRiGS models geometrically consistent rigid motions for individual primitives. This continuous formulation preserves temporal identity and effectively mitigates unbounded memory growth. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TRiGS achieves high fidelity rendering on standard benchmarks while uniquely scaling to extended video sequences (e.g., 600 to 1200 frames) without severe memory bottlenecks, significantly outperforming prior works in temporal stability.

AI.tldr: TRiGS是一种新型4D表示方法，通过统一的连续几何变换解决现有4D高斯泼溅方法中的时间碎片化和内存增长问题，实现了长视频序列的高质量渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有4D高斯泼溅方法依赖分段线性速度近似和短时间窗口，导致严重的时间碎片化，迫使基元反复消除和再生以跟踪复杂非线性动态。这种临时近似消除了物体的长期时间一致性，导致高斯基元不可避免的增殖，阻碍了扩展到长视频序列的可扩展性。
AI.method: TRiGS采用统一的连续几何变换，整合了SE(3)变换、分层贝塞尔残差和可学习的局部锚点，为单个基元建模几何一致的刚性运动。这种连续表示保留了时间一致性，有效缓解了无界内存增长。
AI.result: TRiGS在标准基准测试中实现了高保真渲染，同时独特地扩展到长视频序列（600到1200帧）而没有严重的内存瓶颈，在时间稳定性方面显著优于先前工作。
AI.conclusion: TRiGS通过连续几何变换表示解决了4D高斯泼溅中的时间碎片化和内存增长问题，为动态场景重建提供了可扩展的解决方案，特别适用于长视频序列。

title: ProOOD: Prototype-Guided Out-of-Distribution 3D Occupancy Prediction
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/7uHeng/ProOOD
summary: 3D semantic occupancy prediction is central to autonomous driving, yet current methods are vulnerable to long-tailed class bias and out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs, often overconfidently assigning anomalies to rare classes. We present ProOOD, a lightweight, plug-and-play method that couples prototype-guided refinement with training-free OOD scoring. ProOOD comprises (i) prototype-guided semantic imputation that fills occluded regions with class-consistent features, (ii) prototype-guided tail mining that strengthens rare-class representations to curb OOD absorption, and (iii) EchoOOD, which fuses local logit coherence with local and global prototype matching to produce reliable voxel-level OOD scores. Extensive experiments on five datasets demonstrate that ProOOD achieves state-of-the-art performance on both in-distribution 3D occupancy prediction and OOD detection. On SemanticKITTI, it surpasses baselines by +3.57% mIoU overall and +24.80% tail-class mIoU; on VAA-KITTI, it improves AuPRCr by +19.34 points, with consistent gains across benchmarks. These improvements yield more calibrated occupancy estimates and more reliable OOD detection in safety-critical urban driving. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/7uHeng/ProOOD.

AI.tldr: ProOOD：一种用于3D语义占据预测的轻量级即插即用方法，通过原型引导的细化和免训练的OOD评分，解决长尾类别偏差和分布外输入问题，提升自动驾驶场景下的预测准确性和异常检测可靠性。
AI.motivation: 当前3D语义占据预测方法存在两个主要问题：1）对长尾类别偏差敏感，容易将异常过度自信地分配给稀有类别；2）对分布外（OOD）输入脆弱，影响自动驾驶系统的安全性。
AI.method: ProOOD包含三个核心组件：1）原型引导的语义填补，用类别一致的特征填充遮挡区域；2）原型引导的尾部挖掘，增强稀有类别表示以减少OOD吸收；3）EchoOOD，融合局部logit一致性与局部全局原型匹配，生成可靠的体素级OOD分数。
AI.result: 在五个数据集上的实验表明，ProOOD在3D占据预测和OOD检测方面均达到最先进性能：在SemanticKITTI上，整体mIoU提升+3.57%，尾部类别mIoU提升+24.80%；在VAA-KITTI上，AuPRCr提升+19.34个点，各基准测试均有稳定提升。
AI.conclusion: ProOOD通过原型引导的细化和免训练OOD评分，显著提高了3D语义占据预测的校准度和OOD检测的可靠性，为安全关键的城市驾驶场景提供了更稳健的解决方案。

title: A Cross-graph Tuning-free GNN Prompting Framework
summary: GNN prompting aims to adapt models across tasks and graphs without requiring extensive retraining. However, most existing graph prompt methods still require task-specific parameter updates and face the issue of generalizing across graphs, limiting their performance and undermining the core promise of prompting. In this work, we introduce a Cross-graph Tuning-free Prompting Framework (CTP), which supports both homogeneous and heterogeneous graphs, can be directly deployed to unseen graphs without further parameter tuning, and thus enables a plug-and-play GNN inference engine. Extensive experiments on few-shot prediction tasks show that, compared to SOTAs, CTP achieves an average accuracy gain of 30.8% and a maximum gain of 54%, confirming its effectiveness and offering a new perspective on graph prompt learning.

AI.tldr: CTP是一个跨图免调优提示框架，支持同质和异质图，无需参数调优即可部署到未见图上，实现即插即用的GNN推理引擎，在少样本预测任务上相比SOTA平均准确率提升30.8%。
AI.motivation: 现有图提示方法仍需任务特定参数更新，且难以跨图泛化，限制了性能并削弱了提示的核心承诺。需要一种无需调优即可跨图部署的图提示框架。
AI.method: 提出跨图免调优提示框架CTP，支持同质和异质图，可直接部署到未见图上而无需进一步参数调优，实现即插即用的GNN推理引擎。
AI.result: 在少样本预测任务上的广泛实验显示，相比SOTA方法，CTP平均准确率提升30.8%，最大提升达54%，证实了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: CTP为图提示学习提供了新视角，通过免调优跨图部署实现了真正的即插即用GNN推理，显著提升了少样本预测性能。

title: Reliev3R: Relieving Feed-forward Reconstruction from Multi-View Geometric Annotations
summary: With recent advances, Feed-forward Reconstruction Models (FFRMs) have demonstrated great potential in reconstruction quality and adaptiveness to multiple downstream tasks. However, the excessive reliance on multi-view geometric annotations, e.g. 3D point maps and camera poses, makes the fully-supervised training scheme of FFRMs difficult to scale up. In this paper, we propose Reliev3R, a weakly-supervised paradigm for training FFRMs from scratch without cost-prohibitive multi-view geometric annotations. Relieving the reliance on geometric sensory data and compute-exhaustive structure-from-motion preprocessing, our method draws 3D knowledge directly from monocular relative depths and image sparse correspondences given by zero-shot predictions of pretrained models. At the core of Reliev3R, we design an ambiguity-aware relative depth loss and a trigonometry-based reprojection loss to facilitate supervision for multi-view geometric consistency. Training from scratch with the less data, Reliev3R catches up with its fully-supervised sibling models, taking a step towards low-cost 3D reconstruction supervisions and scalable FFRMs.

AI.tldr: Reliev3R提出了一种弱监督训练范式，无需多视角几何标注即可从头训练前馈重建模型，通过零样本预测的单目相对深度和图像稀疏对应关系获取3D知识。
AI.motivation: 前馈重建模型（FFRMs）虽然重建质量好且适应多种下游任务，但过度依赖多视角几何标注（如3D点云图和相机位姿），使得全监督训练方案难以扩展。需要降低对昂贵几何传感器数据和计算密集型SfM预处理的依赖。
AI.method: 提出Reliev3R弱监督训练范式，核心设计包括：1）模糊感知相对深度损失，处理零样本预测深度中的尺度模糊性；2）基于三角测量的重投影损失，利用稀疏对应关系监督多视角几何一致性。直接从预训练模型的零样本预测中获取单目相对深度和图像稀疏对应关系。
AI.result: 使用更少的数据从头训练，Reliev3R能够达到其全监督兄弟模型的性能水平，为低成本3D重建监督和可扩展FFRMs迈出了重要一步。
AI.conclusion: Reliev3R成功实现了无需昂贵多视角几何标注的弱监督FFRMs训练，通过利用零样本预测的几何信息，显著降低了3D重建监督的成本和复杂性，推动了可扩展前馈重建模型的发展。

title: TF-SSD: A Strong Pipeline via Synergic Mask Filter for Training-free Co-salient Object Detection
summary: Co-salient Object Detection (CoSOD) aims to segment salient objects that consistently appear across a group of related images. Despite the notable progress achieved by recent training-based approaches, they still remain constrained by the closed-set datasets and exhibit limited generalization. However, few studies explore the potential of Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) to address CoSOD, which demonstrate a strong generalized ability and robust saliency understanding. In this paper, we investigate and leverage VFMs for CoSOD, and further propose a novel training-free method, TF-SSD, through the synergy between SAM and DINO. Specifically, we first utilize SAM to generate comprehensive raw proposals, which serve as a candidate mask pool. Then, we introduce a quality mask generator to filter out redundant masks, thereby acquiring a refined mask set. Since this generator is built upon SAM, it inherently lacks semantic understanding of saliency. To this end, we adopt an intra-image saliency filter that employs DINO's attention maps to identify visually salient masks within individual images. Moreover, to extend saliency understanding across group images, we propose an inter-image prototype selector, which computes similarity scores among cross-image prototypes to select masks with the highest score. These selected masks serve as final predictions for CoSOD. Extensive experiments show that our TF-SSD outperforms existing methods (e.g., 13.7\% gains over the recent training-free method). Codes are available at https://github.com/hzz-yy/TF-SSD.

AI.tldr: TF-SSD是一种基于SAM和DINO协同的训练无关共显著目标检测方法，通过生成候选掩码池、质量筛选、语义过滤和跨图像原型选择来实现高性能的共显著检测。
AI.motivation: 现有基于训练的共显著目标检测方法受限于封闭数据集且泛化能力有限，而视觉基础模型(VFMs)展现出强大的泛化能力和显著性理解能力，但很少有研究探索利用VFMs解决CoSOD问题。
AI.method: 提出TF-SSD方法：1)使用SAM生成原始候选掩码池；2)基于SAM的质量掩码生成器过滤冗余掩码；3)利用DINO注意力图进行单图像内显著性过滤；4)提出跨图像原型选择器，通过计算跨图像原型相似度选择最高分掩码作为最终预测。
AI.result: 实验表明TF-SSD优于现有方法，相比最近的训练无关方法提升了13.7%，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过协同利用SAM和DINO两种视觉基础模型，TF-SSD实现了无需训练的高性能共显著目标检测，展示了VFMs在CoSOD任务中的巨大潜力。

title: STAR: Mitigating Cascading Errors in Spatial Reasoning via Turn-point Alignment and Segment-level DPO
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures, 4 tables, Accepted by ICME 2026
summary: Structured spatial navigation is a core benchmark for Large Language Models (LLMs) spatial reasoning. Existing paradigms like Visualization-of-Thought (VoT) are prone to cascading errors in complex topologies. To solve this, we propose STAR, a two-stage framework grounded on topological anchors, and introduce the RedMaze-23K dataset with human-inspired turnpoint annotations. The first stage uses supervised fine-tuning to help models internalize spatial semantics and prune redundant paths. The second adopts Spatial-aware Segment-level Direct Preference Optimization (SDPO) to refine self-correction in long-horizon navigation. Experiments show STAR achieves state-of-the-art performance among open-source models: its 32B variant outperforms DeepSeek-V3 (29.27% vs. 25.00%) and reaches 82.4% of GPT-4's performance.

AI.tldr: STAR框架通过拓扑锚点和两阶段训练解决LLM空间导航中的级联错误问题，在RedMaze-23K数据集上达到开源模型最佳性能
AI.motivation: 现有可视化思维（VoT）等方法在复杂拓扑结构中容易产生级联错误，需要更可靠的空间导航解决方案
AI.method: 提出STAR两阶段框架：第一阶段使用监督微调让模型内化空间语义并剪枝冗余路径；第二阶段采用空间感知分段级直接偏好优化（SDPO）来精炼长视野导航中的自我校正
AI.result: STAR的32B变体在性能上超过DeepSeek-V3（29.27% vs. 25.00%），达到GPT-4性能的82.4%，在开源模型中达到最先进水平
AI.conclusion: STAR框架通过拓扑锚点和两阶段训练有效解决了LLM空间导航中的级联错误问题，显著提升了复杂拓扑环境下的导航性能

title: FecalFed: Privacy-Preserving Poultry Disease Detection via Federated Learning
comment: Accepted to the CVPR 2026 Workshop on Vision for Agriculture
summary: Early detection of highly pathogenic avian influenza (HPAI) and endemic poultry diseases is critical for global food security. While computer vision models excel at classifying diseases from fecal imaging, deploying these systems at scale is bottlenecked by farm data privacy concerns and institutional data silos. Furthermore, existing open-source agricultural datasets frequently suffer from severe, undocumented data contamination. In this paper, we introduce $\textbf{FecalFed}$, a privacy-preserving federated learning framework for poultry disease classification. We first curate and release $\texttt{poultry-fecal-fl}$, a rigorously deduplicated dataset of 8,770 unique images across four disease classes, revealing and eliminating a 46.89$\%$ duplication rate in popular public repositories. To simulate realistic agricultural environments, we evaluate FecalFed under highly heterogeneous, non-IID conditions (Dirichlet $α=0.5$). While isolated single-farm training collapses under this data heterogeneity, yielding only 64.86$\%$ accuracy, our federated approach recovers performance without centralizing sensitive data. Specifically, utilizing server-side adaptive optimization (FedAdam) with a Swin-Small architecture achieves 90.31$\%$ accuracy, closely approaching the centralized upper bound of 95.10\%. Furthermore, we demonstrate that an edge-optimized Swin-Tiny model maintains highly competitive performance at 89.74$\%$, establishing a highly efficient, privacy-first blueprint for on-farm avian disease monitoring.

AI.tldr: FecalFed是一个保护隐私的联邦学习框架，用于家禽疾病分类，通过去重数据集和联邦学习方法解决了数据隐私和数据污染问题，在非IID数据分布下实现了接近集中式训练的性能。
AI.motivation: 家禽高致病性禽流感和地方性疾病的早期检测对全球粮食安全至关重要，但计算机视觉模型的大规模部署受到农场数据隐私问题和机构数据孤岛的阻碍，同时现有开源农业数据集存在严重的数据污染问题。
AI.method: 提出了FecalFed隐私保护联邦学习框架，首先创建并发布了经过严格去重的poultry-fecal-fl数据集（8,770张独特图像），在高度异构的非IID条件下（Dirichlet α=0.5）评估联邦学习方法，使用服务器端自适应优化（FedAdam）和Swin-Small架构。
AI.result: 发现流行公共数据集中存在46.89%的重复率；在数据异构性下，孤立单农场训练准确率仅为64.86%，而联邦学习方法达到90.31%准确率，接近集中式上限95.10%；边缘优化的Swin-Tiny模型也保持了89.74%的竞争性性能。
AI.conclusion: FecalFed框架为农场禽病监测提供了一个高效、隐私优先的蓝图，能够在保护敏感数据隐私的同时，在高度异构的农业环境中实现接近集中式训练的性能。

title: The Rashomon Effect for Visualizing High-Dimensional Data
comment: The paper is accepted in AISTATS 2026
summary: Dimension reduction (DR) is inherently non-unique: multiple embeddings can preserve the structure of high-dimensional data equally well while differing in layout or geometry. In this paper, we formally define the Rashomon set for DR -- the collection of `good' embedding -- and show how embracing this multiplicity leads to more powerful and trustworthy representations. Specifically, we pursue three goals. First, we introduce PCA-informed alignment to steer embeddings toward principal components, making axes interpretable without distorting local neighborhoods. Second, we design concept-alignment regularization that aligns an embedding dimension with external knowledge, such as class labels or user-defined concepts. Third, we propose a method to extract common knowledge across the Rashomon set by identifying trustworthy and persistent nearest-neighbor relationships, which we use to construct refined embeddings with improved local structure while preserving global relationships. By moving beyond a single embedding and leveraging the Rashomon set, we provide a flexible framework for building interpretable, robust, and goal-aligned visualizations.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出通过利用降维中的Rashomon集合（多个同样好的嵌入）来构建更强大和可信的可视化表示，包括PCA对齐、概念对齐正则化和提取共同知识的方法。
AI.motivation: 降维本质上具有非唯一性，多个嵌入可以同样好地保留高维数据的结构，但布局或几何形状不同。传统方法只关注单一嵌入，而忽略了这种多样性。论文旨在通过正式定义降维的Rashomon集合（"好"嵌入的集合），并利用这种多样性来获得更强大和可信的表示。
AI.method:
1. PCA-informed alignment：引导嵌入朝向主成分，使坐标轴可解释而不扭曲局部邻域
2. Concept-alignment regularization：将嵌入维度与外部知识（如类别标签或用户定义概念）对齐
3. 提取Rashomon集合中的共同知识：识别可信且持久的最近邻关系，用于构建改进局部结构同时保留全局关系的精炼嵌入
AI.result: 通过超越单一嵌入并利用Rashomon集合，论文提供了一个灵活的框架来构建可解释、鲁棒且目标对齐的可视化。该方法能够产生具有可解释坐标轴的嵌入，将外部知识融入表示中，并通过提取共同知识改进局部结构。
AI.conclusion: 通过正式定义和利用降维中的Rashomon集合，可以构建更强大、更可信、更可解释的可视化表示。这种方法提供了灵活的框架，能够根据具体目标调整嵌入，同时保持数据的基本结构，为降维应用开辟了新的可能性。

title: HarassGuard: Detecting Harassment Behaviors in Social Virtual Reality with Vision-Language Models
comment: To appear in the 2026 TVCG Special Issue on the 2026 IEEE Conference on Virtual Reality and 3D User Interfaces (VR)
summary: Social Virtual Reality (VR) platforms provide immersive social experiences but also expose users to serious risks of online harassment. Existing safety measures are largely reactive, while proactive solutions that detect harassment behavior during an incident often depend on sensitive biometric data, raising privacy concerns. In this paper, we present HarassGuard, a vision-language model (VLM) based system that detects physical harassment in social VR using only visual input. We construct an IRB-approved harassment vision dataset, apply prompt engineering, and fine-tune VLMs to detect harassment behavior by considering contextual information in social VR. Experimental results demonstrate that HarassGuard achieves competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art baselines (i.e., LSTM/CNN, Transformer), reaching an accuracy of up to 88.09% in binary classification and 68.85% in multi-class classification. Notably, HarassGuard matches these baselines while using significantly fewer fine-tuning samples (200 vs. 1,115), offering unique advantages in contextual reasoning and privacy-preserving detection.

AI.tldr: HarassGuard：基于视觉语言模型的社交VR骚扰检测系统，仅使用视觉输入实现主动骚扰检测，保护用户隐私
AI.motivation: 社交VR平台存在严重的在线骚扰风险，现有安全措施多为被动响应，而主动检测方案通常依赖敏感生物识别数据，引发隐私担忧
AI.method: 构建IRB批准的骚扰视觉数据集，应用提示工程，微调视觉语言模型（VLM）以考虑社交VR中的上下文信息来检测骚扰行为
AI.result: HarassGuard在二分类任务中达到88.09%准确率，多分类任务中达到68.85%准确率，性能与最先进基线（LSTM/CNN、Transformer）相当，但所需微调样本显著减少（200 vs. 1,115）
AI.conclusion: HarassGuard提供了一种有效的隐私保护骚扰检测方案，在保持竞争力的同时减少了数据需求，在上下文推理和隐私保护检测方面具有独特优势

title: Scheduling LLM Inference with Uncertainty-Aware Output Length Predictions
summary: To schedule LLM inference, the \textit{shortest job first} (SJF) principle is favorable by prioritizing requests with short output lengths to avoid head-of-line (HOL) blocking. Existing methods usually predict a single output length for each request to facilitate scheduling. We argue that such a \textit{point estimate} does not match the \textit{stochastic} decoding process of LLM inference, where output length is \textit{uncertain} by nature and determined by when the end-of-sequence (EOS) token is sampled. Hence, the output length of each request should be fitted with a distribution rather than a single value. With an in-depth analysis of empirical data and the stochastic decoding process, we observe that output length follows a heavy-tailed distribution and can be fitted with the log-t distribution. On this basis, we propose a simple metric called Tail Inflated Expectation (TIE) to replace the output length in SJF scheduling, which adjusts the expectation of a log-t distribution with its tail probabilities to account for the risk that a request generates long outputs. To evaluate our TIE scheduler, we compare it with three strong baselines, and the results show that TIE reduces the per-token latency by $2.31\times$ for online inference and improves throughput by $1.42\times$ for offline data generation.

AI.tldr: 提出TIE调度器，用对数t分布拟合LLM输出长度的不确定性，替代SJF调度中的点估计，显著降低延迟并提升吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM推理调度方法通常预测单个输出长度进行SJF调度，但这与LLM解码过程的随机性不匹配。输出长度本质上是随机的，由EOS令牌采样决定，应该用分布而非单值来拟合。
AI.method: 通过实证数据分析发现输出长度服从重尾分布，可用对数t分布拟合。提出尾膨胀期望(TIE)指标替代SJF中的输出长度，该指标通过尾部概率调整对数t分布的期望，以考虑生成长输出的风险。
AI.result: 与三个强基线比较，TIE调度器在线推理中每令牌延迟降低2.31倍，离线数据生成中吞吐量提升1.42倍。
AI.conclusion: 考虑LLM输出长度的随机性和重尾特性，使用TIE指标进行SJF调度能显著提升推理性能，比传统的点估计方法更有效。

title: Towards Viewpoint-Robust End-to-End Autonomous Driving with 3D Foundation Model Priors
comment: Accepted at CVPR Workshop on Simulation for Autonomous Driving 2026
summary: Robust trajectory planning under camera viewpoint changes is important for scalable end-to-end autonomous driving. However, existing models often depend heavily on the camera viewpoints seen during training. We investigate an augmentation-free approach that leverages geometric priors from a 3D foundation model. The method injects per-pixel 3D positions derived from depth estimates as positional embeddings and fuses intermediate geometric features through cross-attention. Experiments on the VR-Drive camera viewpoint perturbation benchmark show reduced performance degradation under most perturbation conditions, with clear improvements under pitch and height perturbations. Gains under longitudinal translation are smaller, suggesting that more viewpoint-agnostic integration is needed for robustness to camera viewpoint changes.

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用3D基础模型几何先验的无增强方法，通过深度估计获取像素级3D位置作为位置嵌入，并通过交叉注意力融合中间几何特征，以提升自动驾驶轨迹规划在相机视角变化下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶轨迹规划模型严重依赖训练时看到的相机视角，缺乏对视角变化的鲁棒性。需要一种不依赖数据增强的方法来提高模型在相机视角变化下的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出无增强方法，利用3D基础模型的几何先验：1）通过深度估计获取每个像素的3D位置作为位置嵌入；2）通过交叉注意力机制融合中间几何特征；3）在VR-Drive相机视角扰动基准上进行评估。
AI.result: 在VR-Drive基准测试中，该方法在大多数扰动条件下减少了性能下降，在俯仰和高度扰动方面有明显改进。在纵向平移方面的增益较小，表明需要更视角无关的集成来实现对相机视角变化的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 利用3D基础模型的几何先验可以有效提高自动驾驶轨迹规划在相机视角变化下的鲁棒性，特别是在俯仰和高度扰动方面。但需要进一步开发更视角无关的集成方法以应对纵向平移等挑战。

title: KG-CMI: Knowledge graph enhanced cross-Mamba interaction for medical visual question answering
summary: Medical visual question answering (Med-VQA) is a crucial multimodal task in clinical decision support and telemedicine. Recent methods fail to fully leverage domain-specific medical knowledge, making it difficult to accurately associate lesion features in medical images with key diagnostic criteria. Additionally, classification-based approaches typically rely on predefined answer sets. Treating Med-VQA as a simple classification problem limits its ability to adapt to the diversity of free-form answers and may overlook detailed semantic information in those answers. To address these challenges, we propose a knowledge graph enhanced cross-Mamba interaction (KG-CMI) framework, which consists of a fine-grained cross-modal feature alignment (FCFA) module, a knowledge graph embedding (KGE) module, a cross-modal interaction representation (CMIR) module, and a free-form answer enhanced multi-task learning (FAMT) module. The KG-CMI learns cross-modal feature representations for images and texts by effectively integrating professional medical knowledge through a graph, establishing associations between lesion features and disease knowledge. Moreover, FAMT leverages auxiliary knowledge from open-ended questions, improving the model's capability for open-ended Med-VQA. Experimental results demonstrate that KG-CMI outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods on three Med-VQA datasets, i.e., VQA-RAD, SLAKE, and OVQA. Additionally, we conduct interpretability experiments to further validate the framework's effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KG-CMI框架，通过知识图谱增强的跨模态交互解决医学视觉问答中知识利用不足和答案形式受限的问题，在多个数据集上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有医学视觉问答方法未能充分利用领域专业知识，难以准确关联医学图像中的病灶特征与诊断标准。同时，基于分类的方法依赖预定义答案集，限制了自由形式答案的适应性，可能忽略答案中的详细语义信息。
AI.method: 提出知识图谱增强的跨Mamba交互框架(KG-CMI)，包含四个模块：细粒度跨模态特征对齐(FCFA)、知识图谱嵌入(KGE)、跨模态交互表示(CMIR)和自由形式答案增强多任务学习(FAMT)。该框架通过图结构有效整合专业医学知识，建立病灶特征与疾病知识关联，并利用开放性问题辅助知识提升模型能力。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，KG-CMI在三个医学VQA数据集(VQA-RAD、SLAKE、OVQA)上优于现有最先进方法。此外，通过可解释性实验进一步验证了框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: KG-CMI框架通过知识图谱增强和跨模态交互，有效解决了医学视觉问答中知识利用不足和答案形式受限的问题，为临床决策支持和远程医疗提供了更强大的多模态解决方案。

title: Fluently Lying: Adversarial Robustness Can Be Substrate-Dependent
summary: The primary tools used to monitor and defend object detectors under adversarial attack assume that when accuracy degrades, detection count drops in tandem. This coupling was assumed, not measured. We report a counterexample observed on a single model: under standard PGD, EMS-YOLO, a spiking neural network (SNN) object detector, retains more than 70% of its detections while mAP collapses from 0.528 to 0.042. We term this count-preserving accuracy collapse Quality Corruption (QC), to distinguish it from the suppression that dominates untargeted evaluation. Across four SNN architectures and two threat models (l-infinity and l-2), QC appears only in one of the four detectors tested (EMS-YOLO). On this model, all five standard defense components fail to detect or mitigate QC, suggesting the defense ecosystem may rely on a shared assumption calibrated on a single substrate. These results provide, to our knowledge, the first evidence that adversarial failure modes can be substrate-dependent.

AI.tldr: 研究发现对抗性攻击下，物体检测器的检测数量与精度可能不耦合：EMS-YOLO在精度崩溃时仍保留70%以上检测，揭示了新的失败模式"质量腐化"。
AI.motivation: 传统对抗性攻击防御工具假设检测精度下降时检测数量会同步下降，但这种耦合关系从未被实际测量验证。研究旨在探索这一假设的有效性。
AI.method: 在四个SNN架构和两种威胁模型（l-infinity和l-2）下测试，使用标准PGD攻击，特别关注EMS-YOLO模型在对抗攻击下的表现。
AI.result: EMS-YOLO在mAP从0.528崩溃到0.042时仍保留超过70%的检测数量，这种现象被定义为"质量腐化"。其他三个SNN检测器未出现此现象，且五种标准防御组件均无法检测或缓解QC。
AI.conclusion: 对抗性失败模式具有底物依赖性，传统防御生态系统可能基于单一底物校准的共享假设，需要重新评估对抗性攻击防御的基本假设。

title: TALENT: Target-aware Efficient Tuning for Referring Image Segmentation
summary: Referring image segmentation aims to segment specific targets based on a natural text expression. Recently, parameter-efficient tuning (PET) has emerged as a promising paradigm. However, existing PET-based methods often suffer from the fact that visual features can't emphasize the text-referred target instance but activate co-category yet unrelated objects. We analyze and quantify this problem, terming it the `non-target activation' (NTA) issue. To address this, we propose a novel framework, TALENT, which utilizes target-aware efficient tuning for PET-based RIS. Specifically, we first propose a Rectified Cost Aggregator (RCA) to efficiently aggregate text-referred features. Then, to calibrate `NTA' into accurate target activation, we adopt a Target-aware Learning Mechanism (TLM), including contextual pairwise consistency learning and target-centric contrastive learning. The former uses the sentence-level text feature to achieve a holistic understanding of the referent and constructs a text-referred affinity map to optimize the semantic association of visual features. The latter further enhances target localization to discover the distinct instance while suppressing associations with other unrelated ones. The two objectives work in concert and address `NTA' effectively. Extensive evaluations show that TALENT outperforms existing methods across various metrics (e.g., 2.5\% mIoU gains on G-Ref val set). Our codes will be released at: https://github.com/Kimsure/TALENT.

AI.tldr: TALENT框架通过目标感知高效调优解决基于参数高效调优的参考图像分割中的非目标激活问题，使用修正成本聚合器和目标感知学习机制提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于参数高效调优的参考图像分割方法存在非目标激活问题，即视觉特征无法准确聚焦文本所指的目标实例，反而激活了同类别但不相关的对象。
AI.method: 提出TALENT框架：1) 修正成本聚合器高效聚合文本参考特征；2) 目标感知学习机制包括上下文成对一致性学习和目标中心对比学习，前者通过句子级文本特征构建文本参考亲和图，后者增强目标定位并抑制无关关联。
AI.result: 在多个指标上超越现有方法，如在G-Ref验证集上获得2.5%的mIoU提升。
AI.conclusion: TALENT框架有效解决了非目标激活问题，通过目标感知高效调优显著提升了参考图像分割的性能。

title: Lipschitz Dueling Bandits over Continuous Action Spaces
summary: We study for the first time, stochastic dueling bandits over continuous action spaces with Lipschitz structure, where feedback is purely comparative. While dueling bandits and Lipschitz bandits have been studied separately, their combination has remained unexplored. We propose the first algorithm for Lipschitz dueling bandits, using round-based exploration and recursive region elimination guided by an adaptive reference arm. We develop new analytical tools for relative feedback and prove a regret bound of $\tilde O\left(T^{\frac{d_z+1}{d_z+2}}\right)$, where $d_z$ is the zooming dimension of the near-optimal region. Further, our algorithm takes only logarithmic space in terms of the total time horizon, best achievable by any bandit algorithm over a continuous action space.

AI.tldr: 首次研究具有Lipschitz结构的连续动作空间随机对决赌博机问题，提出首个Lipschitz对决赌博机算法，使用轮次探索和自适应参考臂引导的递归区域消除
AI.motivation: 对决赌博机和Lipschitz赌博机已分别被研究，但两者的结合尚未探索。连续动作空间中的纯比较反馈对决赌博机问题具有实际应用价值
AI.method: 提出首个Lipschitz对决赌博机算法，采用轮次探索和自适应参考臂引导的递归区域消除策略，利用相对反馈的新分析工具
AI.result: 证明了后悔界为$\tilde O\left(T^{\frac{d_z+1}{d_z+2}}\right)$，其中$d_z$是近优区域的缩放维度，算法仅需对数空间复杂度
AI.conclusion: 成功解决了连续动作空间Lipschitz对决赌博机问题，提供了理论保证和高效的空间复杂度，填补了该领域的研究空白

title: DirectFisheye-GS: Enabling Native Fisheye Input in Gaussian Splatting with Cross-View Joint Optimization
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has enabled efficient 3D scene reconstruction from everyday images with real-time, high-fidelity rendering, greatly advancing VR/AR applications. Fisheye cameras, with their wider field of view (FOV), promise high-quality reconstructions from fewer inputs and have recently attracted much attention. However, since 3DGS relies on rasterization, most subsequent works involving fisheye camera inputs first undistort images before training, which introduces two problems: 1) Black borders at image edges cause information loss and negate the fisheye's large FOV advantage; 2) Undistortion's stretch-and-interpolate resampling spreads each pixel's value over a larger area, diluting detail density -- causes 3DGS overfitting these low-frequency zones, producing blur and floating artifacts. In this work, we integrate fisheye camera model into the original 3DGS framework, enabling native fisheye image input for training without preprocessing. Despite correct modeling, we observed that the reconstructed scenes still exhibit floaters at image edges: Distortion increases toward the periphery, and 3DGS's original per-iteration random-selecting-view optimization ignores the cross-view correlations of a Gaussian, leading to extreme shapes (e.g., oversized or elongated) that degrade reconstruction quality. To address this, we introduce a feature-overlap-driven cross-view joint optimization strategy that establishes consistent geometric and photometric constraints across views-a technique equally applicable to existing pinhole-camera-based pipelines. Our DirectFisheye-GS matches or surpasses state-of-the-art performance on public datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DirectFisheye-GS方法，将鱼眼相机模型直接集成到3DGS框架中，避免传统预处理导致的图像信息损失和细节稀释问题，并通过特征重叠驱动的跨视图联合优化策略解决边缘浮动物体问题。
AI.motivation: 鱼眼相机具有更宽的视野，可以用更少的输入实现高质量重建，但现有3DGS方法需要先对鱼眼图像进行去畸变预处理，这会导致两个问题：1) 图像边缘出现黑边，造成信息损失并抵消鱼眼大视野优势；2) 去畸变的拉伸和插值重采样会稀释像素值，导致3DGS在低频区域过拟合，产生模糊和浮动物体。
AI.method: 1) 将鱼眼相机模型直接集成到原始3DGS框架中，支持原生鱼眼图像输入训练而无需预处理；2) 提出特征重叠驱动的跨视图联合优化策略，建立跨视图的一致几何和光度约束，解决边缘浮动物体问题。
AI.result: DirectFisheye-GS在公开数据集上达到或超越了最先进方法的性能，有效解决了鱼眼图像重建中的边缘浮动物体问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过将鱼眼相机模型直接集成到3DGS框架并引入跨视图联合优化策略，DirectFisheye-GS实现了高质量的鱼眼图像3D重建，避免了传统预处理方法的信息损失和细节稀释问题，该方法同样适用于现有的针孔相机管道。

title: MF-QAT: Multi-Format Quantization-Aware Training for Elastic Inference
summary: Quantization-aware training (QAT) is typically performed for a single target numeric format, while practical deployments often need to choose numerical precision at inference time based on hardware support or runtime constraints. We study multi-format QAT, where a single model is trained to be robust across multiple quantization formats. We find that multi-format QAT can match single-format QAT at each target precision, yielding one model that performs well overall across different formats, even formats that were not seen during training. To enable practical deployment, we propose the Slice-and-Scale conversion procedure for both MXINT and MXFP that converts a high-precision representation into lower-precision formats without re-training. Building on this, we introduce a pipeline that (i) trains a model with multi-format QAT, (ii) stores a single anchor format checkpoint (MXINT8/MXFP8), and (iii) allows on-the-fly conversion to lower MXINT or MXFP formats at runtime with negligible-or no-additional accuracy degradation. Together, these components provide a practical path to elastic precision scaling and allow selecting the runtime format at inference time across diverse deployment targets.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了多格式量化感知训练（QAT），使单个模型能够适应多种量化格式，无需为每种格式单独训练，并提出了Slice-and-Scale转换方法和弹性精度缩放部署方案。
AI.motivation: 传统QAT通常针对单一目标数值格式训练，而实际部署中需要根据硬件支持或运行时约束选择不同精度。这导致需要为每种格式单独训练模型，增加了存储和部署成本。
AI.method: 提出多格式QAT方法，训练单个模型使其对多种量化格式具有鲁棒性；开发Slice-and-Scale转换程序，可将高精度表示转换为低精度格式而无需重新训练；建立完整部署流程：多格式QAT训练→存储单一锚点格式检查点→运行时动态转换到更低精度格式。
AI.result: 多格式QAT能够在每个目标精度上匹配单格式QAT的性能，单个模型在不同格式（包括训练中未见过的格式）上都能表现良好；Slice-and-Scale转换在MXINT和MXFP格式上有效，运行时转换带来的精度损失可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: 多格式QAT结合Slice-and-Scale转换提供了一种实用的弹性精度缩放路径，允许在推理时根据部署目标选择运行时格式，简化了模型部署并提高了灵活性。

title: When AI and Experts Agree on Error: Intrinsic Ambiguity in Dermatoscopic Images
summary: The integration of artificial intelligence (AI), particularly Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), into dermatological diagnosis demonstrates substantial clinical potential. While existing literature predominantly benchmarks algorithmic performance against human experts, our study adopts a novel perspective by investigating the intrinsic complexity of dermatoscopic images. Through rigorous experimentation with multiple CNN architectures, we isolated a subset of images systematically misclassified across all models-a phenomenon statistically proven to exceed random chance. To determine if these failures stem from algorithmic biases or inherent visual ambiguity, expert dermatologists independently evaluated these challenging cases alongside a control group. The results revealed a collapse in human diagnostic performance on the AI-misclassified images. First, agreement with ground-truth labels plummeted, with Cohen's kappa dropping to a mere 0.08 for the difficult images, compared to a 0.61 for the control group. Second, we observed a severe deterioration in expert consensus; inter-rater reliability among physicians fell from moderate concordance (Fleiss kappa = 0.456) on control images to only modest agreement (Fleiss kappa = 0.275) on difficult cases. We identified image quality as a primary driver of these dual systematic failures. To promote transparency and reproducibility, all data, code, and trained models have been made publicly available

AI.tldr: 研究揭示AI在皮肤镜图像诊断中的系统性失败不仅源于算法偏差，更反映了图像本身的固有复杂性，人类专家在AI误判的图像上同样表现不佳，图像质量是双重失败的主要驱动因素。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注AI算法与人类专家的性能对比，而本研究从新视角出发，探究皮肤镜图像本身的内在复杂性，特别是那些被多种CNN架构系统性误判的图像，以确定失败源于算法偏差还是图像本身的视觉模糊性。
AI.method: 使用多种CNN架构进行严格实验，识别出所有模型都系统性误判的图像子集；然后让皮肤科专家独立评估这些挑战性案例和对照组图像；通过Cohen's kappa和Fleiss kappa等统计指标量化人类诊断性能和专家共识的变化。
AI.result: AI系统性误判的图像同样导致人类专家诊断性能崩溃：与真实标签的一致性从对照组的kappa=0.61骤降至0.08；专家共识从中等一致性（Fleiss kappa=0.456）恶化到仅微弱一致性（0.275）；图像质量被确定为双重系统性失败的主要驱动因素。
AI.conclusion: AI在皮肤镜诊断中的失败不仅反映了算法局限性，更揭示了图像本身的固有复杂性；这些"困难"图像对人类专家同样构成挑战，表明问题根源在于图像质量而非单纯算法偏差；研究强调了提高诊断系统鲁棒性需要同时关注算法改进和图像质量提升。

title: Learning Shared Representations for Multi-Task Linear Bandits
summary: Multi-task representation learning is an approach that learns shared latent representations across related tasks, facilitating knowledge transfer and improving sample efficiency. This paper introduces a novel approach to multi-task representation learning in linear bandits. We consider a setting with T concurrent linear bandit tasks, each with feature dimension d, that share a common latent representation of dimension r \ll min{d,T}$, capturing their underlying relatedness. We propose a new Optimism in the Face of Uncertainty Linear (OFUL) algorithm that leverages shared low-rank representations to enhance decision-making in a sample-efficient manner. Our algorithm first collects data through an exploration phase, estimates the shared model via spectral initialization, and then conducts OFUL based learning over a newly constructed confidence set. We provide theoretical guarantees for the confidence set and prove that the unknown reward vectors lie within the confidence set with high probability. We derive cumulative regret bounds and show that the proposed approach achieves \tilde{O}(\sqrt{drNT}), a significant improvement over solving the T tasks independently, resulting in a regret of \tilde{O}(dT\sqrt{N}). We performed numerical simulations to validate the performance of our algorithm for different problem sizes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于线性老虎机多任务表示学习的新方法，通过共享低维潜在表示来提升样本效率和决策性能。
AI.motivation: 在多任务线性老虎机问题中，当多个相关任务共享潜在的低维表示时，独立解决每个任务会浪费样本效率。本文旨在利用任务间的相关性，通过共享表示学习来提高决策效率。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于乐观面对不确定性线性（OFUL）的新算法，包含探索阶段收集数据、通过谱初始化估计共享模型、在新构建的置信集上进行OFUL学习三个步骤。
AI.result: 理论分析证明了置信集的有效性，未知奖励向量以高概率位于置信集内。累积遗憾界达到Õ(√(drNT))，相比独立解决T个任务的Õ(dT√N)有显著改进。数值模拟验证了算法在不同问题规模下的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了在多任务线性老虎机中利用共享低维表示学习的有效性，显著提高了样本效率，为相关领域提供了理论保证和实用算法。

title: CL-VISTA: Benchmarking Continual Learning in Video Large Language Models
summary: Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) require continual learning to adapt to non-stationary real-world data. However, existing benchmarks fall short of evaluating modern foundation models: many still rely on models without large-scale pre-training, and prevailing benchmarks typically partition a single dataset into sub-tasks, resulting in high task redundancy and negligible forgetting on pre-trained Video-LLMs. To address these limitations, we propose CL-VISTA, a benchmark tailored for continual video understanding of Video-LLMs. By curating 8 diverse tasks spanning perception, understanding, and reasoning, CL-VISTA induces substantial distribution shifts that effectively expose catastrophic forgetting. To systematically assess CL methods, we establish a comprehensive evaluation framework comprising 6 distinct protocols across 3 critical dimensions: performance, computational efficiency, and memory footprint. Notably, the performance dimension incorporates a general video understanding assessment to assess whether CL methods genuinely enhance foundational intelligence or merely induce task-specific overfitting. Extensive benchmarking of 10 mainstream CL methods reveals a fundamental trade-off: no single approach achieves universal superiority across all dimensions. Methods that successfully mitigate catastrophic forgetting tend to compromise generalization or incur prohibitive computational and memory overheads. We hope CL-VISTA provides critical insights for advancing continual learning in multimodal foundation models.

AI.tldr: CL-VISTA是一个专门为视频大语言模型设计的持续学习基准测试，包含8个多样化任务，通过6种评估协议在3个维度上全面评估持续学习方法，揭示了性能、计算效率和内存占用之间的基本权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习基准测试存在局限性：许多仍基于未经过大规模预训练的模型，且通常将单个数据集划分为子任务，导致任务冗余度高，对预训练视频大语言模型的遗忘效应不明显。需要专门针对视频大语言模型的持续学习基准来评估真实场景下的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.method: 提出CL-VISTA基准测试，精心策划8个多样化任务，涵盖感知、理解和推理三个层面，以产生显著分布偏移。建立包含6种不同协议的全面评估框架，覆盖性能、计算效率和内存占用三个关键维度，其中性能维度包含通用视频理解评估以区分真实智能提升与任务特定过拟合。
AI.result: 对10种主流持续学习方法进行广泛基准测试，发现基本权衡：没有任何单一方法在所有维度上实现普遍优势。成功缓解灾难性遗忘的方法往往以牺牲泛化能力或产生过高计算和内存开销为代价。
AI.conclusion: CL-VISTA为推进多模态基础模型的持续学习提供了关键见解，揭示了当前持续学习方法在平衡遗忘缓解、泛化能力和资源效率方面的挑战，为未来研究指明了方向。

title: Learning from Many and Adapting to the Unknown in Open-set Test Streams
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) generalize across tasks via reusable representations and flexible reasoning, yet remain brittle in real deployment under evolving tasks and continual distribution shift. A common approach is Test-Time Adaptation (TTA), existing ones of which updates models with hand-designed unsupervised objectives over the full parameter space and mostly overlook preserving shared source knowledge and the reliability of adaptation signals. Drawing on molecular signaling cascades of memory updating in Drosophila, we propose Synapse Consolidation (SyCo), a parameter-efficient LLM adaptation method that updates low-rank adapters through Rac1 and MAPK pathways under the guidance of a structured TTA objective driven by problem understanding, process understanding, and source-domain guardrail. Rac1 confines plasticity to a tail-gradient subspace that is less critical for source knowledge, enabling rapid specialization while preserving source representations. MAPK uses a tiered controller to suppress noisy updates and consolidate useful adaptations under non-stationary streams. To model real deployments with multiple sources and continually emerging tasks, we introduce Multi-source Open-set Adaptation (MOA) setting, where a model is trained on multiple labeled source tasks and then adapts on open, non-stationary unlabeled test streams that mix seen and unseen tasks with partial overlap in label and intent space. Across 18 NLP datasets and the MOA setting, SyCo consistently outperforms strong baselines, achieving 78.31\% on unseen-task adaptation and 85.37\% on unseen-data shifts.

AI.tldr: SyCo是一种受果蝇记忆更新机制启发的参数高效LLM测试时适应方法，通过Rac1和MAPK通路更新低秩适配器，在保持源知识的同时实现对新任务的快速适应
AI.motivation: 现有测试时适应方法通常使用手工设计的无监督目标更新全部参数，忽视了保护共享源知识的可靠性和适应信号的可靠性。大语言模型在现实部署中面临任务演变和持续分布偏移的挑战
AI.method: 受果蝇分子信号级联启发，提出Synapse Consolidation方法：1) Rac1通路将可塑性限制在尾部梯度子空间，保护源知识；2) MAPK通路使用分层控制器抑制噪声更新并巩固有用适应；3) 引入结构化TTA目标，包含问题理解、过程理解和源域护栏
AI.result: 在18个NLP数据集和MOA设置中，SyCo持续优于强基线，在未见任务适应上达到78.31%，在未见数据偏移上达到85.37%
AI.conclusion: SyCo通过受生物学启发的参数高效适应机制，在保护源知识的同时有效应对现实部署中的任务演变和分布偏移，为LLM的测试时适应提供了新思路

title: MoonAnything: A Vision Benchmark with Large-Scale Lunar Supervised Data
summary: Accurate perception of lunar surfaces is critical for modern lunar exploration missions. However, developing robust learning-based perception systems is hindered by the lack of datasets that provide both geometric and photometric supervision. Existing lunar datasets typically lack either geometric ground truth, photometric realism, illumination diversity, or large-scale coverage. In this paper, we introduce MoonAnything, a unified benchmark built on real lunar topography with physically-based rendering, providing the first comprehensive geometric and photometric supervision under diverse illumination with large scale. The benchmark comprises two complementary sub-datasets : i) LunarGeo provides stereo images with corresponding dense depth maps and camera calibration enabling 3D reconstruction and pose estimation; ii) LunarPhoto provides photorealistic images using a spatially-varying BRDF model, along with multi-illumination renderings under real solar configurations, enabling reflectance estimation and illumination-robust perception. Together, these datasets offer over 130K samples with comprehensive supervision. Beyond lunar applications, MoonAnything offers a unique setting and challenging testbed for algorithms under low-textured, high-contrast conditions and applies to other airless celestial bodies and could generalize beyond.
