We establish baselines using state-of-the-art methods and release the complete dataset along with generation tools to support community extension: https://github.com/clementinegrethen/MoonAnything.

AI.tldr: MoonAnything是一个基于真实月球地形的统一基准数据集，提供几何和光度学监督，包含LunarGeo（几何数据）和LunarPhoto（光度学数据）两个子数据集，共13万+样本，用于月球感知算法开发。
AI.motivation: 现有的月球数据集通常缺乏几何真值、光度学真实性、光照多样性或大规模覆盖，这阻碍了基于学习的感知系统的开发。需要提供全面的几何和光度学监督数据集来支持月球探索任务。
AI.method: 基于真实月球地形，使用基于物理的渲染创建统一基准。包含两个互补子数据集：1) LunarGeo提供立体图像、密集深度图和相机标定；2) LunarPhoto使用空间变化的BRDF模型生成真实感图像，并在真实太阳配置下进行多光照渲染。
AI.result: 创建了包含超过13万个样本的综合数据集，提供几何和光度学监督。建立了最先进方法的基线，并发布了完整数据集和生成工具，支持社区扩展。
AI.conclusion: MoonAnything为月球感知提供了首个全面的几何和光度学监督基准，不仅适用于月球应用，还为低纹理、高对比度条件下的算法提供了独特测试环境，可推广到其他无大气天体。

title: HabitatAgent: An End-to-End Multi-Agent System for Housing Consultation
summary:
Housing selection is a high-stakes and largely irreversible decision problem. We study housing consultation as a decision-support interface for housing selection. Existing housing platforms and many LLM-based assistants often reduce this process to ranking or recommendation, resulting in opaque reasoning, brittle multi-constraint handling, and limited guarantees on factuality.
  We present HabitatAgent, the first LLM-powered multi-agent architecture for end-to-end housing consultation. HabitatAgent comprises four specialized agent roles: Memory, Retrieval, Generation, and Validation. The Memory Agent maintains multi-layer user memory through internal stages for constraint extraction, memory fusion, and verification-gated updates; the Retrieval Agent performs hybrid vector--graph retrieval (GraphRAG); the Generation Agent produces evidence-referenced recommendations and explanations; and the Validation Agent applies multi-tier verification and targeted remediation. Together, these agents provide an auditable and reliable workflow for end-to-end housing consultation.
  We evaluate HabitatAgent on 100 real user consultation scenarios (300 multi-turn question--answer pairs) under an end-to-end correctness protocol. A strong single-stage baseline (Dense+Rerank) achieves 75% accuracy, while HabitatAgent reaches 95%.

AI.tldr: HabitatAgent：首个基于LLM的多智能体架构，用于端到端住房咨询，通过四个专门智能体角色实现可审计、可靠的住房选择决策支持
AI.motivation: 住房选择是高风险且基本不可逆的决策问题。现有住房平台和许多基于LLM的助手通常将这一过程简化为排名或推荐，导致推理不透明、多约束处理脆弱、事实性保证有限
AI.method: HabitatAgent包含四个专门智能体角色：记忆智能体（通过约束提取、记忆融合和验证门控更新维护多层用户记忆）、检索智能体（执行混合向量-图检索GraphRAG）、生成智能体（生成证据引用的推荐和解释）、验证智能体（应用多层验证和针对性修复）
AI.result: 在100个真实用户咨询场景（300个多轮问答对）的端到端正确性协议评估中，强单阶段基线（Dense+Rerank）达到75%准确率，而HabitatAgent达到95%准确率
AI.conclusion: HabitatAgent通过多智能体架构为端到端住房咨询提供了可审计且可靠的工作流程，显著提升了住房选择决策支持的准确性和可靠性

title: TP-Seg: Task-Prototype Framework for Unified Medical Lesion Segmentation
summary: Building a unified model with a single set of parameters to efficiently handle diverse types of medical lesion segmentation has become a crucial objective for AI-assisted diagnosis. Existing unified segmentation approaches typically rely on shared encoders across heterogeneous tasks and modalities, which often leads to feature entanglement, gradient interference, and suboptimal lesion discrimination. In this work, we propose TP-Seg, a task-prototype framework for unified medical lesion segmentation. On one hand, the task-conditioned adapter effectively balances shared and task-specific representations through a dual-path expert structure, enabling adaptive feature extraction across diverse medical imaging modalities and lesion types. On the other hand, the prototype-guided task decoder introduces learnable task prototypes as semantic anchors and employs a cross-attention mechanism to achieve fine-grained modeling of task-specific foreground and background semantics. Without bells and whistles, TP-Seg consistently outperforms specialized, general and unified segmentation methods across 8 different medical lesion segmentation tasks covering multiple imaging modalities, demonstrating strong generalization, scalability and clinical applicability.

AI.tldr: TP-Seg是一个任务原型框架，用于统一的医学病灶分割，通过任务条件适配器和原型引导任务解码器解决现有统一分割方法中的特征纠缠和梯度干扰问题。
AI.motivation: 现有统一分割方法通常依赖异构任务和模态间的共享编码器，导致特征纠缠、梯度干扰和病灶区分能力不足，需要一种更好的统一医学病灶分割框架。
AI.method: 提出TP-Seg框架：1) 任务条件适配器通过双路径专家结构平衡共享和任务特定表示；2) 原型引导任务解码器引入可学习的任务原型作为语义锚点，使用交叉注意力机制实现任务特定前景和背景语义的细粒度建模。
AI.result: TP-Seg在涵盖多种成像模态的8个不同医学病灶分割任务中，始终优于专用、通用和统一分割方法，展示了强大的泛化能力、可扩展性和临床适用性。
AI.conclusion: TP-Seg通过任务原型框架有效解决了统一医学病灶分割中的特征纠缠问题，为AI辅助诊断提供了高效、可扩展的统一分割解决方案。

title: Representation choice shapes the interpretation of protein conformational dynamics
summary:
Molecular dynamics simulations provide detailed trajectories at the atomic level, but extracting interpretable and robust insights from these high-dimensional data remains challenging. In practice, analyses typically rely on a single representation. Here, we show that representation choice is not neutral: it fundamentally shapes the conformational organization, similarity relationships, and apparent transitions inferred from identical simulation data.
  To complement existing representations, we introduce Orientation features, a geometrically grounded, rotation-aware encoding of protein backbone. We compare it against common descriptions across three dynamical regimes: fast-folding proteins, large-scale domain motions, and protein-protein association. Across these systems, we find that different representations emphasize complementary aspects of conformational space, and that no single representation provides a complete picture of the underlying dynamics.
  To facilitate systematic comparison, we developed ManiProt, a library for efficient computation and analysis of multiple protein representations. Our results motivate a comparative, representation-aware framework for the interpretation of molecular dynamics simulations.

AI.tldr: 不同蛋白质构象表示方法对分子动力学模拟分析结果有显著影响，没有单一表示能完整描述蛋白质动力学
AI.motivation: 分子动力学模拟产生高维原子轨迹数据，但从中提取可解释且稳健的见解具有挑战性。现有分析通常依赖单一表示方法，而表示选择会从根本上影响构象组织、相似性关系和表观转变的推断。
AI.method: 引入Orientation特征——一种几何基础、旋转感知的蛋白质骨架编码方法，并与常见描述方法进行比较。开发ManiProt库用于高效计算和分析多种蛋白质表示。在三种动力学体系中进行比较：快速折叠蛋白质、大规模结构域运动和蛋白质-蛋白质结合。
AI.result: 不同表示方法强调构象空间的不同方面，没有单一表示能提供底层动力学的完整图像。表示选择会显著影响构象组织、相似性关系和表观转变的推断结果。
AI.conclusion: 需要采用比较性、表示感知的框架来解释分子动力学模拟结果，不同表示方法提供互补信息，共同使用可获得更全面的蛋白质动力学理解。

title: TTA-Vid: Generalized Test-Time Adaptation for Video Reasoning
summary: Recent video reasoning models have shown strong results on temporal and multimodal understanding, yet they depend on large-scale supervised data and multi-stage training pipelines, making them costly to train and difficult to adapt to new domains. In this work, we leverage the paradigm of Test-Time Reinforcement Learning on video-language data to allow for adapting a pretrained model to incoming video samples at test-time without explicit labels. The proposed test-time adaptation for video approach (TTA-Vid) combines two components that work simultaneously: (1) a test-time adaptation that performs step-by-step reasoning at inference time on multiple frame subsets. We then use a batch-aware frequency-based reward computed across different frame subsets as pseudo ground truth to update the model. It shows that the resulting model trained on a single batch or even a single sample from a dataset, is able to generalize at test-time to the whole dataset and even across datasets. Because the adaptation occurs entirely at test time, our method requires no ground-truth annotations or dedicated training splits. Additionally, we propose a multi-armed bandit strategy for adaptive frame selection that learns to prioritize informative frames, guided by the same reward formulation. Our evaluation shows that TTA-Vid yields consistent improvements across various video reasoning tasks and is able to outperform current state-of-the-art methods trained on large-scale data. This highlights the potential of test-time reinforcement learning for temporal multimodal understanding.

AI.tldr: 提出TTA-Vid方法，通过测试时强化学习在无标签情况下自适应视频推理模型，结合批量感知频率奖励和多臂老虎机帧选择策略，在单批次甚至单样本上训练即可泛化到整个数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有视频推理模型依赖大规模监督数据和多阶段训练流程，成本高昂且难以适应新领域。需要一种能在测试时自适应、无需标注的方法来降低训练成本并提高适应性。
AI.method: 提出TTA-Vid方法：1）测试时适应在推理时对多个帧子集进行逐步推理；2）使用跨不同帧子集计算的批量感知频率奖励作为伪真值更新模型；3）提出多臂老虎机策略进行自适应帧选择，优先选择信息丰富的帧。
AI.result: TTA-Vid在单批次或单样本上训练即可泛化到整个数据集甚至跨数据集，在多种视频推理任务上取得一致改进，优于当前基于大规模数据训练的SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: 测试时强化学习在时序多模态理解方面具有巨大潜力，TTA-Vid方法无需标注和专用训练分割即可实现有效的测试时自适应，为视频推理提供了高效且适应性强的解决方案。

title: A Survey of On-Policy Distillation for Large Language Models
summary: Knowledge distillation has become a primary mechanism for transferring reasoning and domain expertise from frontier Large Language Models (LLMs) to smaller, deployable students. However, the dominant paradigm remains \textit{off-policy}: students train on static teacher-generated data and never encounter their own errors during learning. This train--test mismatch, an instance of \textit{exposure bias}, causes prediction errors to compound autoregressively at inference time. On-Policy Distillation (OPD) addresses this by letting the student generate its own trajectories and receive teacher feedback on these self-generated outputs, grounding distillation in the theory of interactive imitation learning. Despite rapid growth spanning divergence minimization, reward-guided learning, and self-play, the OPD literature remains fragmented with no unified treatment. This survey provides the first comprehensive overview of OPD for LLMs. We introduce a unified $f$-divergence framework over on-policy samples and organize the landscape along three orthogonal dimensions: \emph{feedback signal} (logit-based, outcome-based, or self-play), \emph{teacher access} (white-box, black-box, or teacher-free), and \emph{loss granularity} (token-level, sequence-level, or hybrid). We systematically analyze representative methods, examine industrial deployments, and identify open problems including distillation scaling laws, uncertainty-aware feedback, and agent-level distillation.

AI.tldr: 这篇综述首次全面梳理了大语言模型中的在线策略蒸馏方法，提出了统一的f-散度框架，并从反馈信号、教师访问和损失粒度三个维度对现有方法进行了系统分类。
AI.motivation: 传统的离线策略蒸馏存在训练-测试不匹配问题，导致推理时的预测误差自回归累积。在线策略蒸馏通过让学生模型生成自己的轨迹并接收教师反馈，基于交互模仿学习理论解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出了统一的f-散度框架，从三个正交维度组织在线策略蒸馏方法：反馈信号（基于logit、基于结果或自博弈）、教师访问（白盒、黑盒或无教师）和损失粒度（token级、序列级或混合）。
AI.result: 系统分析了代表性方法，考察了工业部署情况，并识别了蒸馏缩放定律、不确定性感知反馈和智能体级蒸馏等开放性问题。
AI.conclusion: 在线策略蒸馏通过解决暴露偏差问题，为将前沿大语言模型的专业知识转移到可部署的小型学生模型提供了更有效的框架，但仍面临诸多研究挑战。

title: IWP: Token Pruning as Implicit Weight Pruning in Large Vision Language Models
summary: Large Vision Language Models show impressive performance across image and video understanding tasks, yet their computational cost grows rapidly with the number of visual tokens. Existing token pruning methods mitigate this issue through empirical approaches while overlooking the internal mechanism of attention. In this paper, we propose a novel training free token pruning framework grounded in the dual form perspective of attention. We reformulate attention as an implicit linear layer whose weight matrix is the sum of rank 1 outer products, each generated by a single token's key value pair. Token pruning thus reduces to selecting an optimal subset of these rank 1 updates that best approximates the original dual weight matrix. Extending this perspective to standard softmax attention in LVLMs, we derive a novel metric quantifying both a token's information magnitude and information duplication. To efficiently select the subset with the proposed metric, we introduce Progressive Chunked Maximal Marginal Relevance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves a better trade off between performance and efficiency, while providing another perspective on existing pruning approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于注意力对偶形式视角的无训练token剪枝框架，通过渐进式分块最大边际相关性选择最优token子集，在LVLMs中实现性能与效率的更好权衡。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型的计算成本随视觉token数量快速增长，现有token剪枝方法多为经验性方法，忽略了注意力的内部机制。
AI.method: 从注意力的对偶形式视角出发，将注意力重新表述为隐式线性层，其权重矩阵是rank 1外积和。提出衡量token信息量和信息重复度的新度量，并引入渐进式分块最大边际相关性来高效选择最优token子集。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，该方法在性能和效率之间实现了更好的权衡，同时为现有剪枝方法提供了新的视角。
AI.conclusion: 基于注意力对偶形式视角的无训练token剪枝框架有效解决了LVLMs计算成本问题，为token剪枝提供了理论依据和新视角。

title: Chameleons do not Forget: Prompt-Based Online Continual Learning for Next Activity Prediction
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication in the International Journal of Cooperative Information Systems
summary: Predictive process monitoring (PPM) focuses on predicting future process trajectories, including next activity predictions. This is crucial in dynamic environments where processes change or face uncertainty. However, current frameworks often assume a static environment, overlooking dynamic characteristics and concept drifts. This results in catastrophic forgetting, where training while focusing merely on new data distribution negatively impacts the performance on previously learned data distributions. Continual learning addresses, among others, the challenges related to mitigating catastrophic forgetting. This paper proposes a novel approach called Continual Next Activity Prediction with Prompts (CNAPwP), which adapts the DualPrompt algorithm for next activity prediction to improve accuracy and adaptability while mitigating catastrophic forgetting. We introduce new datasets with recurring concept drifts, alongside a task-specific forgetting metric that measures the prediction accuracy gap between initial occurrence and subsequent task occurrences. Extensive testing on three synthetic and two real-world datasets representing several setups of recurrent drifts shows that CNAPwP achieves SOTA or competitive results compared to five baselines, demonstrating its potential applicability in real-world scenarios. An open-source implementation of our method, together with the datasets and results, is available at: https://github.com/SvStraten/CNAPwP.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CNAPwP方法，将DualPrompt算法应用于下一个活动预测，以解决预测过程监控中的灾难性遗忘问题，并在包含重复概念漂移的数据集上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 当前预测过程监控框架通常假设静态环境，忽略了动态特性和概念漂移，导致灾难性遗忘问题。持续学习可以缓解这一问题，但需要专门针对下一个活动预测任务进行适配。
AI.method: 提出CNAPwP方法，基于DualPrompt算法进行适配，用于下一个活动预测。引入了包含重复概念漂移的新数据集，并设计了任务特定的遗忘度量指标。
AI.result: 在三个合成数据集和两个真实世界数据集上进行广泛测试，CNAPwP相比五个基线方法取得了SOTA或具有竞争力的结果，证明了其在真实场景中的潜在适用性。
AI.conclusion: CNAPwP方法能够有效缓解预测过程监控中的灾难性遗忘问题，提高准确性和适应性，为动态环境下的过程预测提供了有效的解决方案。

title: PrivHAR-Bench: A Graduated Privacy Benchmark Dataset for Video-Based Action Recognition
summary: Existing research on privacy-preserving Human Activity Recognition (HAR) typically evaluates methods against a binary paradigm: clear video versus a single privacy transformation. This limits cross-method comparability and obscures the nuanced relationship between privacy strength and recognition utility. We introduce \textit{PrivHAR-Bench}, a multi-tier benchmark dataset designed to standardize the evaluation of the \textit{Privacy-Utility Trade-off} in video-based action recognition. PrivHAR-Bench applies a graduated spectrum of visual privacy transformations: from lightweight spatial obfuscation to cryptographic block permutation, to a curated subset of 15 activity classes selected for human articulation diversity. Each of the 1,932 source videos is distributed across 9 parallel tiers of increasing privacy strength, with additional background-removed variants to isolate the contribution of human motion features from contextual scene bias. We provide lossless frame sequences, per-frame bounding boxes, estimated pose keypoints with joint-level confidence scores, standardized group-based train/test splits, and an evaluation toolkit computing recognition accuracy and privacy metrics. Empirical validation using R3D-18 demonstrates a measurable and interpretable degradation curve across tiers, with within-tier accuracy declining from 88.8\% (clear) to 53.5\% (encrypted, background-removed) and cross-domain accuracy collapsing to 4.8\%, establishing PrivHAR-Bench as a controlled benchmark for comparing privacy-preserving HAR methods under standardized conditions. The dataset, generation pipeline, and evaluation code are publicly available.

AI.tldr: PrivHAR-Bench是一个多层级基准数据集，用于标准化评估视频动作识别中的隐私-效用权衡，包含9个隐私强度递增的转换层级和背景移除变体。
AI.motivation: 现有隐私保护人体活动识别研究通常采用二元评估范式（清晰视频vs单一隐私转换），限制了跨方法可比性，且模糊了隐私强度与识别效用之间的微妙关系。
AI.method: 创建PrivHAR-Bench数据集，包含15个活动类别、1,932个源视频，应用从轻量级空间模糊到密码块置换的渐进式视觉隐私转换，分为9个隐私强度递增的层级，并提供背景移除变体以分离人体运动特征与场景背景影响。
AI.result: 使用R3D-18模型验证显示，识别准确率随隐私强度增加呈可测量且可解释的下降曲线：层级内准确率从88.8%（清晰）降至53.5%（加密+背景移除），跨域准确率崩溃至4.8%。
AI.conclusion: PrivHAR-Bench为在标准化条件下比较隐私保护HAR方法提供了可控基准，数据集、生成管道和评估代码已公开可用。

title: An Approach to Enriching Surgical Video Datasets for Fine-Grained Spatial-Temporal Understanding of Vision-Language Models
summary: Surgical video understanding is a crucial prerequisite for advancing Computer-Assisted Surgery. While vision-language models (VLMs) have recently been applied to the surgical domain, existing surgical vision-language datasets lack in capturing and evaluating complex, interleaved spatial-temporal dynamics. Creating large scale datasets that accurately represent fine-grained spatial-temporal relationships in surgical videos is challenging due to costly manual annotations or error-prone generation using large language models. To address this gap, we introduce the SurgSTU-Pipeline, a deterministic generation pipeline featuring temporal and spatial continuity filtering to reliably create surgical datasets for fine-grained spatial-temporal multimodal understanding. Applying this pipeline to publicly available surgical datasets, we create the SurgSTU dataset, comprising 7515 video clips densely extended with 150k fine-grained spatial-temporal question-answer samples. Our comprehensive evaluation shows that while state-of-the-art generalist VLMs struggle in zero-shot settings, their spatial-temporal capabilities can be improved through in-context learning. A fine-tuned VLM on the SurgSTU training dataset achieves highest performance among all spatial-temporal tasks, validating the dataset's efficacy to improve spatial-temporal understanding of VLMs in surgical videos. Code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了SurgSTU-Pipeline生成框架和SurgSTU数据集，用于提升手术视频中细粒度时空关系的多模态理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有手术视觉语言数据集缺乏对复杂、交织的时空动态的捕捉和评估能力，而大规模数据集的创建面临昂贵的人工标注或大语言模型生成错误的问题。
AI.method: 提出SurgSTU-Pipeline确定性生成框架，包含时空连续性过滤机制，能够可靠地创建用于细粒度时空多模态理解的手术数据集。将该框架应用于公开手术数据集，创建了包含7515个视频片段和15万个细粒度时空问答样本的SurgSTU数据集。
AI.result: 评估显示，最先进的通用视觉语言模型在零样本设置下表现不佳，但通过上下文学习可以改善其时空能力。在SurgSTU训练数据集上微调的视觉语言模型在所有时空任务中取得最高性能。
AI.conclusion: SurgSTU数据集能有效提升视觉语言模型在手术视频中的时空理解能力，验证了该数据集对改善手术视频时空多模态理解的有效性。

title: Multimodal Language Models Cannot Spot Spatial Inconsistencies
summary: Spatial consistency is a fundamental property of the visual world and a key requirement for models that aim to understand physical reality. Despite recent advances, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) often struggle to reason about 3D geometry across multiple views. Rather than asking models to describe scene attributes, we introduce a more challenging task: given two views of the same scene, identify the object that violates 3D motion consistency. We propose a simple and scalable method for generating realistic, spatially inconsistent image pairs from multi-view scenes, enabling systematic evaluation of this capability. Our results show that state-of-the-art MLLMs significantly underperform human observers and exhibit substantial variability across different scene attributes, revealing a fragile and incomplete understanding of 3D structure. We hope our findings underscore the need for approaches that develop a more deeply grounded understanding of the physical world.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种评估多模态大语言模型在3D运动一致性推理能力的新任务，发现现有模型在此方面表现远低于人类水平，揭示了对3D结构理解的不足。
AI.motivation: 空间一致性是视觉世界的基本属性，也是理解物理现实模型的关键要求。尽管多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）取得了进展，但在多视角3D几何推理方面仍存在困难。需要更系统地评估模型对3D运动一致性的理解能力。
AI.method: 提出了一个更具挑战性的任务：给定同一场景的两个视角，识别违反3D运动一致性的物体。开发了一种简单且可扩展的方法，从多视角场景生成真实但空间不一致的图像对，用于系统评估该能力。
AI.result: 最先进的多模态大语言模型在此任务上显著低于人类观察者表现，且在不同场景属性上表现出巨大变异性，显示出对3D结构的脆弱和不完整理解。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果强调了需要开发对物理世界有更深入基础理解的方法，多模态大语言模型在3D空间一致性推理方面仍有很大改进空间。

title: Learning to Hint for Reinforcement Learning
summary: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is widely used for reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards, but it often suffers from advantage collapse: when all rollouts in a group receive the same reward, the group yields zero relative advantage and thus no learning signal. For example, if a question is too hard for the reasoner, all sampled rollouts can be incorrect and receive zero reward. Recent work addresses this issue by adding hints or auxiliary scaffolds to such hard questions so that the reasoner produces mixed outcomes and recovers a non-zero update. However, existing hints are usually fixed rather than adapted to the current reasoner, and a hint that creates learning signal under the hinted input does not necessarily improve the no-hint policy used at test time. To this end, we propose Hint Learning for Reinforcement Learning (HiLL), a framework that jointly trains a hinter policy and a reasoner policy during RL. For each hard question, the hinter generates hints online conditioned on the current reasoner's incorrect rollout, allowing hint generation to adapt to the reasoner's evolving errors. We further introduce hint reliance, which measures how strongly correct hinted trajectories depend on the hint. We derive a transferability result showing that lower hint reliance implies stronger transfer from hinted success to no-hint success, and we use this result to define a transfer-weighted reward for training the hinter. Therefore, HiLL favors hints that not only recover informative GRPO groups, but also produce signals that are more likely to improve the original no-hint policy. Experiments across multiple benchmarks show that HiLL consistently outperforms GRPO and prior hint-based baselines, demonstrating the value of adaptive and transfer-aware hint learning for RL. The code is available at https://github.com/Andree-9/HiLL.

AI.tldr: HiLL框架通过联合训练提示生成策略和推理策略，解决GRPO中的优势崩溃问题，实现自适应和可迁移的提示学习
AI.motivation: GRPO在强化学习中存在优势崩溃问题：当组内所有轨迹获得相同奖励时，相对优势为零，导致学习信号缺失。现有方法使用固定提示，无法适应推理器的当前状态，且带提示的成功不一定能迁移到无提示策略
AI.method: 提出HiLL框架：1）联合训练提示策略和推理策略，提示策略根据推理器的错误轨迹在线生成自适应提示；2）引入提示依赖度衡量正确提示轨迹对提示的依赖程度；3）推导迁移性理论，证明低提示依赖度意味着更好的从提示成功到无提示成功的迁移；4）基于此设计转移加权奖励来训练提示策略
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，HiLL一致优于GRPO和现有的基于提示的基线方法，证明了自适应和迁移感知的提示学习对强化学习的价值
AI.conclusion: HiLL通过联合训练自适应提示生成器和推理器，有效解决了GRPO的优势崩溃问题，同时确保提示学习能够有效迁移到无提示策略，显著提升了强化学习性能

title: Revisiting Human-in-the-Loop Object Retrieval with Pre-Trained Vision Transformers
summary: Building on existing approaches, we revisit Human-in-the-Loop Object Retrieval, a task that consists of iteratively retrieving images containing objects of a class-of-interest, specified by a user-provided query. Starting from a large unlabeled image collection, the aim is to rapidly identify diverse instances of an object category relying solely on the initial query and the user's Relevance Feedback, with no prior labels. The retrieval process is formulated as a binary classification task, where the system continuously learns to distinguish between relevant and non-relevant images to the query, through iterative user interaction. This interaction is guided by an Active Learning loop: at each iteration, the system selects informative samples for user annotation, thereby refining the retrieval performance. This task is particularly challenging in multi-object datasets, where the object of interest may occupy only a small region of the image within a complex, cluttered scene. Unlike object-centered settings where global descriptors often suffice, multi-object images require more adapted, localized descriptors. In this work, we formulate and revisit the Human-in-the-Loop Object Retrieval task by leveraging pre-trained ViT representations, and addressing key design questions, including which object instances to consider in an image, what form the annotations should take, how Active Selection should be applied, and which representation strategies best capture the object's features. We compare several representation strategies across multi-object datasets highlighting trade-offs between capturing the global context and focusing on fine-grained local object details. Our results offer practical insights for the design of effective interactive retrieval pipelines based on Active Learning for object class retrieval.

AI.tldr: 该论文重新审视了人在回路目标检索任务，利用预训练的ViT表示，在主动学习框架下通过用户交互迭代检索多对象图像中的目标类别。
AI.motivation: 在多对象数据集中，目标对象可能只占据图像的小区域，全局描述符往往不足，需要更适应的局部描述符。现有方法在处理复杂场景中的目标检索时面临挑战，需要重新审视人在回路目标检索任务的设计。
AI.method: 将检索任务构建为二分类问题，通过主动学习循环迭代优化：系统选择信息丰富的样本供用户标注，利用预训练的ViT表示，探索不同的表示策略（全局上下文与局部细节），并解决关键设计问题（考虑哪些目标实例、标注形式、主动选择策略等）。
AI.result: 比较了多对象数据集上的多种表示策略，揭示了捕获全局上下文与聚焦细粒度局部目标细节之间的权衡，为基于主动学习的交互式检索管道设计提供了实用见解。
AI.conclusion: 通过重新审视人在回路目标检索任务，利用预训练ViT表示并解决关键设计问题，为复杂多对象场景中的目标类别检索提供了有效的交互式检索框架。

title: Exploring Silent Data Corruption as a Reliability Challenge in LLM Training
summary:
As Large Language Models (LLMs) scale in size and complexity, the consequences of failures during training become increasingly severe. A major challenge arises from Silent Data Corruption (SDC): hardware-induced faults that bypass system-level detection mechanisms. SDC may behave like benign numerical noise, but can also cause harmful gradient corruption that leads to loss spikes, divergence, or stalled progress.
  This work provides a controlled study of how intermittent SDC affects LLM pretraining. Using targeted fault injection at the level of GPU matrix-multiply instructions, we characterize the sensitivity of different bit positions, kernel functions, and execution stages. Our analysis shows that locally originating faults can produce impactful corruption, including NaN propagation, short-lived spikes in loss, gradient norm, and attention logits, as well as persistent parameter divergence. Building on the observed corruption signatures, we propose a lightweight detection method that identifies potentially harmful parameter updates. Experiments on LLaMA models with 60M, 350M, and 1.3B parameters demonstrate that recomputing the most recent training step upon detection can effectively mitigate the impact of these events.

AI.tldr: 研究大型语言模型训练中的静默数据损坏问题，通过故障注入实验分析影响，并提出轻量级检测与恢复方法
AI.motivation: 随着LLM规模和复杂度增加，训练过程中的故障后果日益严重。静默数据损坏（SDC）是硬件引发的故障，可能绕过系统检测机制，导致梯度损坏、损失峰值、发散或训练停滞等问题
AI.method: 在GPU矩阵乘法指令级别进行定向故障注入，分析不同比特位、核函数和执行阶段的敏感性。基于观察到的损坏特征，提出轻量级检测方法识别有害参数更新，并在检测到问题时重新计算最近训练步骤
AI.result: 实验表明局部故障可能产生显著影响，包括NaN传播、损失和梯度范数的短期峰值、注意力对数变化以及持久性参数发散。在LLaMA 60M、350M和1.3B参数模型上的实验证明，重新计算最近训练步骤能有效缓解这些事件的影响
AI.conclusion: 静默数据损坏对LLM预训练有实质性影响，但通过基于损坏特征的轻量级检测和恢复机制可以有效缓解，为大规模模型训练提供了实用的容错解决方案

title: Spectral Compact Training: Pre-Training Large Language Models via Permanent Truncated SVD and Stiefel QR Retraction
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. Patent pending: Irish Application PTIE20260000000219. Code at https://github.com/EctoSpace/SCT
summary: The memory wall remains the primary bottleneck for training large language models on consumer hardware. We introduce Spectral Compact Training (SCT), a method that replaces dense weight matrices with permanent truncated SVD factors W = U diag(s) V^T, where the full dense matrix is never materialized during training or inference. Gradients flow through the compact spectral factors via standard backpropagation, and U, V are retracted to the Stiefel manifold via QR decomposition after each optimizer step. SCT achieves up to 199x memory reduction per MLP layer at rank 32, enabling full training steps of 70B-parameter architectures on a Steam Deck handheld (7.2 GB peak memory vs. 1,245 GB for dense FP32 training with Adam). Rank-sweep experiments on SmolLM2-1.7B (ranks 32-256, 2000 steps, NVIDIA A100) show that all tested ranks converge to the same loss floor (~4.2-4.5), identifying the learning rate schedule -- not MLP rank -- as the primary bottleneck. Rank 128 emerges as the efficiency sweet spot at 11.7x MLP compression with the lowest perplexity. GPU memory drops 46% at rank 32 while training throughput doubles.

AI.tldr: Spectral Compact Training (SCT) 通过将密集权重矩阵替换为截断SVD因子，在训练和推理中都不实例化完整矩阵，实现了高达199倍的内存减少，使70B参数模型能在Steam Deck手持设备上训练。
AI.motivation: 内存墙是消费级硬件上训练大语言模型的主要瓶颈，需要一种能显著减少内存占用的训练方法。
AI.method: 使用永久截断SVD因子W = U diag(s) V^T替代密集权重矩阵，梯度通过紧凑谱因子反向传播，每次优化器步骤后通过QR分解将U、V回缩到Stiefel流形上。
AI.result: 在秩32时每MLP层内存减少高达199倍，70B参数架构在Steam Deck上峰值内存仅7.2GB（对比密集FP32训练需1245GB）。秩128是效率最佳点，MLP压缩11.7倍且困惑度最低，秩32时GPU内存下降46%而训练吞吐量翻倍。
AI.conclusion: SCT方法能显著减少内存占用，使大模型训练在消费级硬件上成为可能，实验表明学习率调度而非MLP秩是收敛的主要瓶颈。

title: BioCOMPASS: Integrating Biomarkers into Transformer-Based Immunotherapy Response Prediction
summary: Datasets used in immunotherapy response prediction are typically small in size, as well as diverse in cancer type, drug administered, and sequencer used. Models often drop in performance when tested on patient cohorts that are not included in the training process. Recent work has shown that transformer-based models along with self-supervised learning show better generalisation performance than threshold-based biomarkers, but is still suboptimal. We present BioCOMPASS, an extension of a transformer-based model called COMPASS, that integrates biomarkers and treatment information to further improve its generalisability. Instead of feeding biomarker data as input, we built loss components to align them with the model's intermediate representations. We found that components such as treatment gating and pathway consistency loss improved generalisability when evaluated with Leave-one-cohort-out, Leave-one-cancer-type-out and Leave-one-treatment-out strategies. Results show that building components that exploit biomarker and treatment information can help in generalisability of immunotherapy response prediction. Careful curation of additional components that leverage complementary clinical information and domain knowledge represents a promising direction for future research.

AI.tldr: BioCOMPASS模型通过整合生物标志物和治疗信息，使用治疗门控和通路一致性损失等组件，提高了免疫治疗反应预测的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 免疫治疗反应预测面临数据集小、癌症类型多样、药物和治疗方案各异的问题，现有模型在未见患者队列上性能下降，需要提高模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 扩展COMPASS模型为BioCOMPASS，通过构建损失组件（治疗门控和通路一致性损失）将生物标志物信息与模型中间表示对齐，而不是直接作为输入。
AI.result: 在Leave-one-cohort-out、Leave-one-cancer-type-out和Leave-one-treatment-out评估策略下，BioCOMPASS显示出更好的泛化性能，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 利用生物标志物和治疗信息的组件能有效提高免疫治疗反应预测的泛化性，未来研究应继续探索利用临床信息和领域知识的补充组件。

title: Continual Vision-Language Learning for Remote Sensing: Benchmarking and Analysis
summary: Current remote sensing vision-language models (RS VLMs) demonstrate impressive performance in image interpretation but rely on static training data, limiting their ability to accommodate continuously emerging sensing modalities and downstream tasks. This exposes a fundamental challenge: enabling RS VLMs to continually adapt without catastrophic forgetting. Despite its practical importance, the continual learning capability of RS VLMs remains underexplored, and no dedicated benchmark currently exists. In this work, we present CLeaRS, a comprehensive benchmark for continual vision-language learning in remote sensing. CLeaRS comprises 10 curated subsets with over 207k image-text pairs, spanning diverse interpretation tasks, sensing modalities, and application scenarios. We further define three evaluation protocols: long-horizon, modality-incremental, and task-incremental settings, to systematically assess continual adaptation. Extensive benchmarking of diverse vision-language models reveals catastrophic forgetting across all settings. Moreover, representative continual learning methods, when adapted to RS VLMs, exhibit limited effectiveness in handling task, instruction, and modality transitions. Our findings underscore the need for developing continual learning methods tailored to RS VLMs.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了CLeaRS基准，用于评估遥感视觉语言模型的持续学习能力，发现现有模型存在灾难性遗忘问题，需要开发专门的持续学习方法。
AI.motivation: 当前遥感视觉语言模型依赖静态训练数据，无法适应不断涌现的新传感模态和下游任务，缺乏持续学习能力且没有专门的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建了CLeaRS基准，包含10个精心挑选的子集、超过207k图像-文本对，涵盖多样化解释任务、传感模态和应用场景，并定义了三种评估协议。
AI.result: 广泛基准测试显示所有设置下都存在灾难性遗忘，现有持续学习方法在适应遥感视觉语言模型时效果有限，无法有效处理任务、指令和模态转换。
AI.conclusion: 遥感视觉语言模型需要专门设计的持续学习方法，CLeaRS基准为这一研究方向提供了重要的评估工具。

title: ActivityNarrated: An Open-Ended Narrative Paradigm for Wearable Human Activity Understanding
summary: Wearable HAR has improved steadily, but most progress still relies on closed-set classification, which limits real-world use. In practice, human activity is open-ended, unscripted, personalized, and often compositional, unfolding as narratives rather than instances of fixed classes. We argue that addressing this gap does not require simply scaling datasets or models. It requires a fundamental shift in how wearable HAR is formulated, supervised, and evaluated. This work shows how to model open-ended activity narratives by aligning wearable sensor data with natural-language descriptions in an open-vocabulary setting. Our framework has three core components. First, we introduce a naturalistic data collection and annotation pipeline that combines multi-position wearable sensing with free-form, time-aligned narrative descriptions of ongoing behavior, allowing activity semantics to emerge without a predefined vocabulary. Second, we define a retrieval-based evaluation framework that measures semantic alignment between sensor data and language, enabling principled evaluation without fixed classes while also subsuming closed-set classification as a special case. Third, we present a language-conditioned learning architecture that supports sensor-to-text inference over variable-length sensor streams and heterogeneous sensor placements. Experiments show that models trained with fixed-label objectives degrade sharply under real-world variability, while open-vocabulary sensor-language alignment yields robust and semantically grounded representations. Once this alignment is learned, closed-set activity recognition becomes a simple downstream task. Under cross-participant evaluation, our method achieves 65.3% Macro-F1, compared with 31-34% for strong closed-set HAR baselines. These results establish open-ended narrative modeling as a practical and effective foundation for real-world wearable HAR.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种基于开放词汇的传感器-语言对齐框架，用于建模可穿戴设备中的开放世界人类活动识别，通过将传感器数据与自然语言描述对齐，取代传统的封闭集分类方法。
AI.motivation: 当前可穿戴人类活动识别主要依赖封闭集分类，但现实世界中的活动是开放式的、非脚本化的、个性化的，且通常是组合性的，以叙事形式展开而非固定类别实例。需要从根本上改变可穿戴HAR的建模、监督和评估方式。
AI.method: 提出三个核心组件：1）自然主义数据收集和标注流程，结合多位置可穿戴传感与自由形式的时间对齐叙事描述；2）基于检索的评估框架，测量传感器数据与语言之间的语义对齐；3）语言条件学习架构，支持可变长度传感器流和异构传感器放置的传感器到文本推理。
AI.result: 使用固定标签目标训练的模型在现实世界变异性下性能急剧下降，而开放词汇传感器-语言对齐产生鲁棒且语义基础的表征。在跨参与者评估中，该方法达到65.3%的Macro-F1，而强封闭集HAR基线仅为31-34%。
AI.conclusion: 开放端叙事建模为现实世界可穿戴HAR提供了实用有效的基础，一旦学习到传感器-语言对齐，封闭集活动识别就变成了简单的下游任务。

title: Thinking Wrong in Silence: Backdoor Attacks on Continuous Latent Reasoning
summary:
A new generation of language models reasons entirely in continuous hidden states, producing no tokens and leaving
  no audit trail. We show that this silence creates a fundamentally new attack surface. ThoughtSteer perturbs a
  single embedding vector at the input layer; the model's own multi-pass reasoning amplifies this perturbation into a
  hijacked latent trajectory that reliably produces the attacker's chosen answer, while remaining structurally
  invisible to every token-level defense. Across two architectures (Coconut and SimCoT), three reasoning benchmarks,
  and model scales from 124M to 3B parameters, ThoughtSteer achieves >=99% attack success rate with near-baseline
  clean accuracy, transfers to held-out benchmarks without retraining (94-100%), evades all five evaluated active
  defenses, and survives 25 epochs of clean fine-tuning. We trace these results to a unifying mechanism: Neural
  Collapse in the latent space pulls triggered representations onto a tight geometric attractor, explaining both why
  defenses fail and why any effective backdoor must leave a linearly separable signature (probe AUC>=0.999). Yet a
  striking paradox emerges: individual latent vectors still encode the correct answer even as the model outputs the
  wrong one. The adversarial information is not in any single vector but in the collective trajectory, establishing
  backdoor perturbations as a new lens for mechanistic interpretability of continuous reasoning. Code and checkpoints
  are available.

AI.tldr: ThoughtSteer攻击通过扰动连续推理语言模型的隐藏状态，在保持正常准确率的同时实现高成功率攻击，且能逃避现有防御措施
AI.motivation: 新一代语言模型完全在连续隐藏状态中进行推理，不产生令牌且没有审计追踪，这种沉默特性创造了全新的攻击面
AI.method: ThoughtSteer在输入层扰动单个嵌入向量，利用模型自身的多轮推理将扰动放大为被劫持的潜在轨迹，可靠产生攻击者选择的答案
AI.result: 在两个架构、三个推理基准测试和124M到3B参数规模的模型中，攻击成功率≥99%，保持接近基线的干净准确率，能转移到未见过的基准测试(94-100%)，逃避所有五种主动防御，并能经受25个epoch的微调
AI.conclusion: 研究发现潜在空间中的神经坍缩现象将触发的表示拉向紧密的几何吸引子，解释了防御失败的原因，同时揭示了后门攻击必须留下线性可分特征；有趣的是，单个潜在向量仍编码正确答案，但模型输出错误答案，表明对抗信息不在单个向量中而在集体轨迹中

title: LinguDistill: Recovering Linguistic Ability in Vision- Language Models via Selective Cross-Modal Distillation
summary: Adapting pretrained language models (LMs) into vision-language models (VLMs) can degrade their native linguistic capability due to representation shift and cross-modal interference introduced during multimodal adaptation. Such loss is difficult to recover, even with targeted task-specific fine-tuning using standard objectives. Prior recovery approaches typically introduce additional modules that act as intermediate alignment layers to maintain or isolate modality-specific subspaces, which increases architectural complexity, adds parameters at inference time, and limits flexibility across models and settings. We propose LinguDistill, an adapter-free distillation method that restores linguistic capability by utilizing the original frozen LM as a teacher. We overcome the key challenge of enabling vision-conditioned teacher supervision by introducing layer-wise KV-cache sharing, which exposes the teacher to the student's multimodal representations without modifying the architecture of either model. We then selectively distill the teacher's strong linguistic signal on language-intensive data to recover language capability, while preserving the student's visual grounding on multimodal tasks. As a result, LinguDistill recovers $\sim$10% of the performance lost on language and knowledge benchmarks, while maintaining comparable performance on vision-heavy tasks. Our findings demonstrate that linguistic capability can be recovered without additional modules, providing an efficient and practical solution to modality-specific degradation in multimodal models.

AI.tldr: LinguDistill：一种无需额外适配器的蒸馏方法，通过使用原始冻结语言模型作为教师，恢复多模态适应过程中损失的语言能力，同时保持视觉任务性能。
AI.motivation: 预训练语言模型适应为视觉语言模型时，由于表示偏移和跨模态干扰，会损害其原有的语言能力。现有恢复方法通常需要引入额外的对齐模块，增加了架构复杂性和推理参数。
AI.method: 提出LinguDistill方法：1）使用原始冻结语言模型作为教师；2）通过层级KV缓存共享使教师能够接触学生的多模态表示；3）在语言密集型数据上选择性蒸馏教师的语言信号，同时保持学生的视觉基础能力。
AI.result: 在语言和知识基准上恢复了约10%的性能损失，同时在视觉密集型任务上保持可比性能。无需额外模块，提供了高效实用的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 语言能力可以在不增加额外模块的情况下恢复，为多模态模型中特定模态性能退化问题提供了高效实用的解决方案。

title: Disentangling to Re-couple: Resolving the Similarity-Controllability Paradox in Subject-Driven Text-to-Image Generation
summary: Subject-Driven Text-to-Image (T2I) Generation aims to preserve a subject's identity while editing its context based on a text prompt. A core challenge in this task is the "similarity-controllability paradox", where enhancing textual control often degrades the subject's fidelity, and vice-versa. We argue this paradox stems from the ambiguous role of text prompts, which are often tasked with describing both the subject and the desired modifications, leading to conflicting signals for the model. To resolve this, we propose DisCo, a novel framework that first Disntangles and then re-Couples visual and textual information. First, our textual-visual decoupling module isolates the sources of information: subject identity is extracted exclusively from the reference image with the entity word of the subject, while the text prompt is simplified to contain only the modification command, where the subject refers to general pronouns, eliminating descriptive ambiguity. However, this strict separation can lead to unnatural compositions between the subject and its contexts. We address this by designing a dedicated reward signal and using reinforcement learning to seamlessly recouple the visually-defined subject and the textually-generated context. Our approach effectively resolves the paradox, enabling simultaneous high-fidelity subject preservation and precise textual control. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, producing highly realistic and coherent images.

AI.tldr: DisCo框架通过解耦视觉和文本信息来解决主题驱动文本到图像生成中的相似性-可控性悖论，先分离主题身份和修改指令，再通过强化学习重新耦合，实现高保真主题保持和精确文本控制。
AI.motivation: 主题驱动文本到图像生成面临"相似性-可控性悖论"：增强文本控制会降低主题保真度，反之亦然。作者认为这源于文本提示的模糊性，它同时描述主题和修改内容，导致模型接收冲突信号。
AI.method: 提出DisCo框架：1) 文本-视觉解耦模块：从参考图像和实体词提取主题身份，简化文本提示仅包含修改指令；2) 设计专用奖励信号，使用强化学习无缝重新耦合视觉定义的主题和文本生成的上下文。
AI.result: 该方法有效解决了相似性-可控性悖论，实现了同时高保真主题保持和精确文本控制。大量实验表明该方法达到最先进性能，生成高度真实和连贯的图像。
AI.conclusion: 通过先解耦再重新耦合视觉和文本信息的方法，DisCo框架成功解决了主题驱动文本到图像生成中的核心挑战，为同时实现高保真主题保持和精确文本控制提供了有效解决方案。

title: Scalable Pretraining of Large Mixture of Experts Language Models on Aurora Super Computer
summary: Pretraining Large Language Models (LLMs) from scratch requires massive amount of compute. Aurora super computer is an ExaScale machine with 127,488 Intel PVC (Ponte Vechio) GPU tiles. In this work, we showcase LLM pretraining on Aurora at the scale of 1000s of GPU tiles. Towards this effort, we developed Optimus, an inhouse training library with support for standard large model training techniques. Using Optimus, we first pretrained Mula-1B, a 1 Billion dense model and Mula-7B-A1B, a 7 Billion Mixture of Experts (MoE) model from scratch on 3072 GPU tiles for the full 4 trillion tokens of the OLMoE-mix-0924 dataset. We then demonstrated model scaling by pretraining three large MoE models Mula-20B-A2B, Mula-100B-A7B, and Mula-220B-A10B till 100 Billion tokens on the same dataset. On our largest model Mula-220B-A10B, we pushed the compute scaling from 384 to 12288 GPU tiles and observed scaling efficiency of around 90% at 12288 GPU tiles. We significantly improved the runtime performance of MoE models using custom GPU kernels for expert computation, and a novel EP-Aware sharded optimizer resulting in training speedups up to 1.71x. As part of the Optimus library, we also developed a robust set of reliability and fault tolerant features to improve training stability and continuity at scale.

AI.tldr: 该研究展示了在Aurora超级计算机上使用数千个GPU tile进行大规模语言模型预训练，开发了Optimus训练库，训练了从1B到220B参数规模的MoE模型，实现了高达90%的计算扩展效率。
AI.motivation: 大规模语言模型预训练需要巨大的计算资源，研究旨在利用Aurora超级计算机的127,488个Intel PVC GPU tile，展示在数千个GPU tile规模上的LLM预训练能力。
AI.method: 开发了Optimus训练库，支持标准大模型训练技术；使用自定义GPU内核优化MoE模型的专家计算；提出新颖的EP-Aware分片优化器；实现了可靠性和容错功能以提高训练稳定性。
AI.result: 成功预训练了Mula-1B密集模型和多个MoE模型（7B、20B、100B、220B参数）；在最大模型Mula-220B-A10B上，从384扩展到12288个GPU tile时观察到约90%的扩展效率；通过优化实现了高达1.71倍的训练加速。
AI.conclusion: 研究证明了在Aurora超级计算机上大规模预训练LLM的可行性，开发的Optimus库和优化技术显著提升了训练效率和稳定性，为未来更大规模的语言模型训练奠定了基础。

title: MotionGrounder: Grounded Multi-Object Motion Transfer via Diffusion Transformer
comment: Please visit our project page at https://kaist-viclab.github.io/motiongrounder-site/
summary: Motion transfer enables controllable video generation by transferring temporal dynamics from a reference video to synthesize a new video conditioned on a target caption. However, existing Diffusion Transformer (DiT)-based methods are limited to single-object videos, restricting fine-grained control in real-world scenes with multiple objects. In this work, we introduce MotionGrounder, a DiT-based framework that firstly handles motion transfer with multi-object controllability. Our Flow-based Motion Signal (FMS) in MotionGrounder provides a stable motion prior for target video generation, while our Object-Caption Alignment Loss (OCAL) grounds object captions to their corresponding spatial regions. We further propose a new Object Grounding Score (OGS), which jointly evaluates (i) spatial alignment between source video objects and their generated counterparts and (ii) semantic consistency between each generated object and its target caption. Our experiments show that MotionGrounder consistently outperforms recent baselines across quantitative, qualitative, and human evaluations.

AI.tldr: MotionGrounder：首个基于DiT的多物体可控运动迁移框架，通过流式运动信号和物体-字幕对齐损失实现多物体精细控制
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散变换器（DiT）的运动迁移方法仅限于单物体视频，无法处理现实场景中多物体的精细控制需求
AI.method: 提出MotionGrounder框架，包含流式运动信号（FMS）提供稳定运动先验，物体-字幕对齐损失（OCAL）将物体字幕与对应空间区域对齐
AI.result: MotionGrounder在定量、定性和人工评估中均优于现有基线方法，并提出了新的物体定位评分（OGS）联合评估空间对齐和语义一致性
AI.conclusion: MotionGrounder首次实现了基于DiT的多物体可控运动迁移，为现实场景中的精细视频生成控制提供了有效解决方案

title: MIRANDA: MId-feature RANk-adversarial Domain Adaptation toward climate change-robust ecological forecasting with deep learning
summary: Plant phenology modelling aims to predict the timing of seasonal phases, such as leaf-out or flowering, from meteorological time series. Reliable predictions are crucial for anticipating ecosystem responses to climate change. While phenology modelling has traditionally relied on mechanistic approaches, deep learning methods have recently been proposed as flexible, data-driven alternatives with often superior performance. However, mechanistic models tend to outperform deep networks when data distribution shifts are induced by climate change. Domain Adaptation (DA) techniques could help address this limitation. Yet, unlike standard DA settings, climate change induces a temporal continuum of domains and involves both a covariate and label shift, with warmer records and earlier start of spring. To tackle this challenge, we introduce Mid-feature Rank-adversarial Domain Adaptation (MIRANDA). Whereas conventional adversarial methods enforce domain invariance on final latent representations, an approach that does not explicitly address label shift, we apply adversarial regularization to intermediate features. Moreover, instead of a binary domain-classification objective, we employ a rank-based objective that enforces year-invariance in the learned meteorological representations. On a country-scale dataset spanning 70 years and comprising 67,800 phenological observations of 5 tree species, we demonstrate that, unlike conventional DA approaches, MIRANDA improves robustness to climatic distribution shifts and narrows the performance gap with mechanistic models.

AI.tldr: 提出MIRANDA方法，通过中间特征对抗正则化和基于排序的域适应目标，提升深度学习在气候变化导致的分布偏移下的植物物候预测鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习在植物物候预测中面临气候变化导致的分布偏移问题，而现有域适应方法难以处理时间连续域变化和协变量-标签双重偏移的挑战。
AI.method: 提出MIRANDA方法：1）在中间特征而非最终表示上应用对抗正则化；2）使用基于排序的域分类目标来强制学习气象表示的年不变性。
AI.result: 在包含70年、67,800个观测的全国尺度数据集上，MIRANDA相比传统域适应方法显著提升了对气候分布偏移的鲁棒性，缩小了与机理模型的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: MIRANDA通过创新的中间特征对抗正则化和排序目标，有效解决了气候变化导致的分布偏移问题，为深度学习在物候预测中的应用提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Routing-Free Mixture-of-Experts
summary: Standard Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models rely on centralized routing mechanisms that introduce rigid inductive biases. We propose Routing-Free MoE which eliminates any hard-coded centralized designs including external routers, Softmax, Top-K and load balancing, instead encapsulating all activation functionalities within individual experts and directly optimized through continuous gradient flow, enabling each expert to determine its activation entirely on its own. We introduce a unified adaptive load-balancing framework to simultaneously optimize both expert-balancing and token-balancing objectives through a configurable interpolation, allowing flexible and customizable resource allocation. Extensive experiments show that Routing-Free MoE can consistently outperform baselines with better scalability and robustness. We analyze its behavior in detail and offer insights that may facilitate future MoE design ad optimization.

AI.tldr: 提出Routing-Free MoE，消除集中式路由机制，让专家自主决定激活，通过自适应负载均衡框架优化资源分配，实验显示优于基线模型
AI.motivation: 传统MoE模型依赖集中式路由机制，引入了僵化的归纳偏置，限制了模型的灵活性和优化潜力
AI.method: 1. 消除硬编码的集中式设计（外部路由器、Softmax、Top-K、负载均衡）；2. 将所有激活功能封装在单个专家内部；3. 通过连续梯度流直接优化；4. 引入统一的自适应负载均衡框架，通过可配置插值同时优化专家平衡和令牌平衡目标
AI.result: 实验表明Routing-Free MoE能够持续超越基线模型，具有更好的可扩展性和鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: Routing-Free MoE为MoE设计提供了新思路，通过消除集中式路由约束，让专家自主决策，同时通过自适应负载均衡实现灵活的资源分配，为未来MoE设计和优化提供了有价值的见解

title: Sparkle: A Robust and Versatile Representation for Point Cloud based Human Motion Capture
summary: Point cloud-based motion capture leverages rich spatial geometry and privacy-preserving sensing, but learning robust representations from noisy, unstructured point clouds remains challenging. Existing approaches face a struggle trade-off between point-based methods (geometrically detailed but noisy) and skeleton-based ones (robust but oversimplified). We address the fundamental challenge: how to construct an effective representation for human motion capture that can balance expressiveness and robustness. In this paper, we propose Sparkle, a structured representation unifying skeletal joints and surface anchors with explicit kinematic-geometric factorization. Our framework, SparkleMotion, learns this representation through hierarchical modules embedding geometric continuity and kinematic constraints. By explicitly disentangling internal kinematic structure from external surface geometry, SparkleMotion achieves state-of-the-art performance not only in accuracy but crucially in robustness and generalization under severe domain shifts, noise, and occlusion. Extensive experiments demonstrate our superiority across diverse sensor types and challenging real-world scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出Sparkle表示法，通过显式分解运动学结构和表面几何，平衡表达性和鲁棒性，用于点云运动捕捉
AI.motivation: 点云运动捕捉面临表达性与鲁棒性的权衡：点基方法几何细节丰富但噪声敏感，骨架基方法鲁棒但过于简化。需要构建既能保持几何细节又能抵抗噪声的有效表示。
AI.method: 提出Sparkle表示法，统一骨骼关节和表面锚点，通过显式运动学-几何分解构建结构化表示。SparkleMotion框架通过分层模块学习该表示，嵌入几何连续性和运动学约束，解耦内部运动学结构和外部表面几何。
AI.result: 在准确性、鲁棒性和泛化能力方面达到最先进水平，特别是在严重域偏移、噪声和遮挡条件下表现优异。在多种传感器类型和挑战性真实场景中验证了方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式分解运动学结构和表面几何的Sparkle表示法，成功解决了点云运动捕捉中表达性与鲁棒性的权衡问题，为噪声、遮挡和域偏移条件下的鲁棒运动捕捉提供了有效解决方案。

title: Cost-Penalized Fitness in FMA-Orchestrated Mixture of Experts: Experimental Evidence for Molecular Memory in Domain Adaptation
summary: We present experimental results from seven controlled runs of nanoFMT, a Free-Market Algorithm (FMA) orchestrated transformer with dynamic Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) management. The experiments address a fundamental question for advanced LLM development: how should an MoE system manage its expert pool when operating at full capacity under changing data distributions? We demonstrate that cost-penalized fitness metrics, combined with a linear grace period for newborn experts, produce a system that accumulates domain expertise through diversification rather than replacement. The central result is a round-trip domain shift experiment showing 9-11x faster recovery when returning to a previously learned domain, with zero expert births or replacements required. This "molecular memory" effect -- where dormant experts survive and reactivate when their domain returns -- has no analogue in current MoE management approaches. A preliminary cost analysis estimates annual savings of $39.1M and 27.1 GWh energy reduction for an OpenAI-scale provider under a moderate scenario.

AI.tldr: nanoFMT是一种具有动态专家混合管理的自由市场算法变压器，实验显示通过成本惩罚适应度指标和新生儿专家宽限期，系统通过多样化而非替换积累领域专业知识，在领域切换时实现9-11倍更快的恢复速度，无需专家出生或替换。
AI.motivation: 解决高级LLM开发中的一个基本问题：当专家混合系统在变化的数据分布下满负荷运行时，应如何管理其专家池？当前MoE管理方法缺乏在领域变化时保持和重新激活专业知识的能力。
AI.method: 使用成本惩罚适应度指标结合新生儿专家的线性宽限期，创建了一个通过多样化而非替换积累领域专业知识的系统。采用自由市场算法协调的变压器，通过七次受控运行进行实验验证。
AI.result: 在往返领域切换实验中，返回先前学习领域时的恢复速度提高了9-11倍，且无需专家出生或替换。系统表现出"分子记忆"效应，休眠专家在领域回归时存活并重新激活。初步成本分析显示，在中等规模场景下，OpenAI规模的提供商每年可节省3910万美元并减少27.1GWh能源消耗。
AI.conclusion: nanoFMT的MoE管理方法通过成本惩罚适应度指标和新生儿专家宽限期，实现了通过多样化积累专业知识而非替换，创造了"分子记忆"效应，在领域切换时显著提高恢复效率，具有显著的成本和能源节约潜力。

title: Shape Representation using Gaussian Process mixture models
summary: Traditional explicit 3D representations, such as point clouds and meshes, demand significant storage to capture fine geometric details and require complex indexing systems for surface lookups, making functional representations an efficient, compact, and continuous alternative. In this work, we propose a novel, object-specific functional shape representation that models surface geometry with Gaussian Process (GP) mixture models. Rather than relying on computationally heavy neural architectures, our method is lightweight, leveraging GPs to learn continuous directional distance fields from sparsely sampled point clouds. We capture complex topologies by anchoring local GP priors at strategic reference points, which can be flexibly extracted using any structural decomposition method (e.g. skeletonization, distance-based clustering). Extensive evaluations on the ShapeNetCore and IndustryShapes datasets demonstrate that our method can efficiently and accurately represent complex geometries.

AI.tldr: 提出基于高斯过程混合模型的对象特定功能形状表示方法，用于从稀疏点云学习连续方向距离场，替代传统显式3D表示
AI.motivation: 传统显式3D表示（如点云和网格）需要大量存储空间来捕捉精细几何细节，并且需要复杂的索引系统进行表面查找，而功能表示提供了一种高效、紧凑且连续的替代方案
AI.method: 提出基于高斯过程混合模型的对象特定功能形状表示方法，通过在战略参考点锚定局部GP先验来捕捉复杂拓扑结构，这些参考点可以通过任何结构分解方法（如骨架化、基于距离的聚类）灵活提取
AI.result: 在ShapeNetCore和IndustryShapes数据集上的广泛评估表明，该方法能够高效且准确地表示复杂几何形状
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种轻量级、高效的功能形状表示方案，相比计算量大的神经架构，利用高斯过程从稀疏点云学习连续方向距离场，能够有效捕捉复杂拓扑结构

title: Optimal Brain Decomposition for Accurate LLM Low-Rank Approximation
summary: Low-rank decomposition has emerged as an important problem in Large Language Model (LLM) fine-tuning and inference. Through Singular Value Decomposition (SVD), the weight matrix can be factorized into low-rank spaces optimally. Previously, a common practice was to decompose the weight in the activation-whitened space, and then achieve satisfying results. In this work, we propose Optimal Brain Decomposition LLM (OBD-LLM), which studies the decomposition problem in the model space by utilizing second-order Hessian information. Through a rigorous Kronecker-factorization of the Hessian, we show that the decomposition needs to consider both input and output information of the layer, and achieves much better decomposition results compared to input only method. Our loss-aware decomposition method involves a bi-directional whitening on the weight matrix. As a result, OBD-LLM is a closed-form solution for the optimal decomposition of weights in the language model. Remarkably, we achieve ~20-40\% better results than previous state-of-the-art decomposition methods, the SVD-LLM.

AI.tldr: OBD-LLM是一种基于二阶Hessian信息的低秩分解方法，通过双向白化权重矩阵，在模型空间中实现最优分解，性能比SVD-LLM提升20-40%。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型低秩分解方法主要基于激活白化空间的奇异值分解，这种方法只考虑了输入信息，忽略了输出信息，导致分解结果不够理想。
AI.method: 提出OBD-LLM方法，利用Hessian矩阵的二阶信息，通过Kronecker分解Hessian，考虑层的输入和输出信息，采用双向白化权重矩阵，形成闭式解的最优分解方案。
AI.result: OBD-LLM在语言模型权重分解方面显著优于现有方法，比之前的SOTA方法SVD-LLM提升了约20-40%的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入二阶Hessian信息和双向白化，OBD-LLM为语言模型权重分解提供了理论最优的闭式解，显著提升了低秩分解的效果。

title: A 4D Representation for Training-Free Agentic Reasoning from Monocular Laparoscopic Video
summary: Spatiotemporal reasoning is a fundamental capability for artificial intelligence (AI) in soft tissue surgery, paving the way for intelligent assistive systems and autonomous robotics. While 2D vision-language models show increasing promise at understanding surgical video, the spatial complexity of surgical scenes suggests that reasoning systems may benefit from explicit 4D representations. Here, we propose a framework for equipping surgical agents with spatiotemporal tools based on an explicit 4D representation, enabling AI systems to ground their natural language reasoning in both time and 3D space. Leveraging models for point tracking, depth, and segmentation, we develop a coherent 4D model with spatiotemporally consistent tool and tissue semantics. A Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) then acts as an agent on tools derived from the explicit 4D representation (e.g., trajectories) without any fine-tuning. We evaluate our method on a new dataset of 134 clinically relevant questions and find that the combination of a general purpose reasoning backbone and our 4D representation significantly improves spatiotemporal understanding and allows for 4D grounding. We demonstrate that spatiotemporal intelligence can be "assembled" from 2D MLLMs and 3D computer vision models without additional training. Code, data, and examples are available at https://tum-ai.github.io/surg4d/

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种基于显式4D表示的时空推理框架，将2D多模态大语言模型与3D计算机视觉模型结合，无需额外训练即可为手术AI系统提供时空智能。
AI.motivation: 软组织手术中的时空推理是AI的关键能力，虽然2D视觉语言模型在理解手术视频方面显示出潜力，但手术场景的空间复杂性表明推理系统可能受益于显式的4D表示。
AI.method: 利用点跟踪、深度和分割模型构建具有时空一致性的工具和组织语义的连贯4D模型，然后让多模态大语言模型基于显式4D表示（如轨迹）作为智能体进行推理，无需微调。
AI.result: 在包含134个临床相关问题的新数据集上评估，发现通用推理主干与4D表示的结合显著改善了时空理解能力，并实现了4D基础。
AI.conclusion: 时空智能可以从2D多模态大语言模型和3D计算机视觉模型中"组装"出来，无需额外训练，为智能辅助系统和自主机器人手术提供了新途径。

title: PixelPrune: Pixel-Level Adaptive Visual Token Reduction via Predictive Coding
summary: Document understanding and GUI interaction are among the highest-value applications of Vision-Language Models (VLMs), yet they impose exceptionally heavy computational burden: fine-grained text and small UI elements demand high-resolution inputs that produce tens of thousands of visual tokens. We observe that this cost is largely wasteful -- across document and GUI benchmarks, only 22--71\% of image patches are pixel-unique, the rest being exact duplicates of another patch in the same image. We propose \textbf{PixelPrune}, which exploits this pixel-level redundancy through predictive-coding-based compression, pruning redundant patches \emph{before} the Vision Transformer (ViT) encoder. Because it operates in pixel space prior to any neural computation, PixelPrune accelerates both the ViT encoder and the downstream LLM, covering the full inference pipeline. The method is training-free, requires no learnable parameters, and supports pixel-lossless compression ($τ{=}0$) as well as controlled lossy compression ($τ{>}0$). Experiments across three model scales and document and GUI benchmarks show that PixelPrune maintains competitive task accuracy while delivering up to 4.2$\times$ inference speedup and 1.9$\times$ training acceleration. Code is available at https://github.com/OPPO-Mente-Lab/PixelPrune.

AI.tldr: PixelPrune是一种基于预测编码的压缩方法，通过剪枝视觉Transformer编码前的冗余图像块来加速文档和GUI理解任务，无需训练且支持无损和有损压缩。
AI.motivation: 文档理解和GUI交互是视觉语言模型的高价值应用，但需要高分辨率输入产生大量视觉token，计算负担重。研究发现这些图像中只有22-71%的图像块是像素唯一的，其余都是重复的，存在大量冗余。
AI.method: 提出PixelPrune方法，利用像素级冗余，通过基于预测编码的压缩在视觉Transformer编码器之前剪枝冗余图像块。该方法在像素空间操作，无需训练参数，支持像素无损压缩（τ=0）和可控有损压缩（τ>0）。
AI.result: 在三个模型规模和文档/GUI基准测试中，PixelPrune在保持竞争力的任务准确性的同时，实现了高达4.2倍的推理加速和1.9倍的训练加速。
AI.conclusion: PixelPrune通过有效利用图像中的像素级冗余，为文档和GUI理解任务提供了高效的计算加速方案，无需额外训练且覆盖完整推理流程。

title: Adversarial Attenuation Patch Attack for SAR Object Detection
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures. Source code is available at https://github.com/boremycin/SAAP
summary: Deep neural networks have demonstrated excellent performance in SAR target detection tasks but remain susceptible to adversarial attacks. Existing SAR-specific attack methods can effectively deceive detectors; however, they often introduce noticeable perturbations and are largely confined to digital domain, neglecting physical implementation constrains for attacking SAR systems. In this paper, a novel Adversarial Attenuation Patch (AAP) method is proposed that employs energy-constrained optimization strategy coupled with an attenuation-based deployment framework to achieve a seamless balance between attack effectiveness and stealthiness. More importantly, AAP exhibits strong potential for physical realization by aligning with signal-level electronic jamming mechanisms. Experimental results show that AAP effectively degrades detection performance while preserving high imperceptibility, and shows favorable transferability across different models. This study provides a physical grounded perspective for adversarial attacks on SAR target detection systems and facilitates the design of more covert and practically deployable attack strategies. The source code is made available at https://github.com/boremycin/SAAP.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的对抗性衰减补丁方法，通过能量约束优化和衰减部署框架，在SAR目标检测攻击中实现攻击效果与隐蔽性的平衡，并具备物理实现潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有的SAR攻击方法虽然能有效欺骗检测器，但通常引入明显扰动，且主要局限于数字域，忽视了攻击SAR系统的物理实现约束。需要开发更隐蔽且物理可实现的攻击策略。
AI.method: 提出了对抗性衰减补丁方法，采用能量约束优化策略结合衰减部署框架，通过信号级电子干扰机制实现物理可实现的攻击。
AI.result: AAP能有效降低检测性能，同时保持高隐蔽性，在不同模型间表现出良好的可迁移性，为SAR目标检测系统的对抗攻击提供了物理基础视角。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为SAR目标检测系统的对抗攻击提供了物理基础视角，有助于设计更隐蔽和实际可部署的攻击策略。

title: Super-Resolving Coarse-Resolution Weather Forecasts With Flow Matching
summary: Machine learning-based weather forecasting models now surpass state-of-the-art numerical weather prediction systems, but training and operating these models at high spatial resolution remains computationally expensive. We present a modular framework that decouples forecasting from spatial resolution by applying learned generative super-resolution as a post-processing step to coarse-resolution forecast trajectories. We formulate super-resolution as a stochastic inverse problem, using a residual formulation to preserve large-scale structure while reconstructing unresolved variability. The model is trained with flow matching exclusively on reanalysis data and is applied to global medium-range forecasts. We evaluate (i) design consistency by re-coarsening super-resolved forecasts and comparing them to the original coarse trajectories, and (ii) high-resolution forecast quality using standard ensemble verification metrics and spectral diagnostics. Results show that super-resolution preserves large-scale structure and variance after re-coarsening, introduces physically consistent small-scale variability, and achieves competitive probabilistic forecast skill at 0.25° resolution relative to an operational ensemble baseline, while requiring only a modest additional training cost compared with end-to-end high-resolution forecasting.

AI.tldr: 提出模块化框架，将天气预报与空间分辨率解耦，通过学习生成式超分辨率作为粗分辨率预报轨迹的后处理步骤，在保持大尺度结构的同时重建未解析的变异性。
AI.motivation: 机器学习天气预报模型虽然超越传统数值天气预报系统，但在高空间分辨率下的训练和运行计算成本高昂。需要一种方法既能获得高分辨率预报，又能降低计算成本。
AI.method: 采用模块化框架，将预报与分辨率解耦：先进行粗分辨率预报，然后通过学习的生成式超分辨率作为后处理步骤。将超分辨率建模为随机逆问题，使用残差公式保持大尺度结构，重建未解析变异性。模型基于再分析数据通过流匹配训练，应用于全球中期预报。
AI.result: 超分辨率在重新粗化后能保持大尺度结构和方差，引入物理一致的小尺度变异性，在0.25°分辨率下相对于业务集合预报基线达到有竞争力的概率预报技能，同时相比端到端高分辨率预报仅需适度的额外训练成本。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模块化框架通过将预报与分辨率解耦，实现了计算效率与预报质量的平衡，为高分辨率天气预报提供了一种经济有效的解决方案。

title: IDDM: Identity-Decoupled Personalized Diffusion Models with a Tunable Privacy-Utility Trade-off
summary:
Personalized text-to-image diffusion models (e.g., DreamBooth, LoRA) enable users to synthesize high-fidelity avatars from a few reference photos for social expression. However, once these generations are shared on social media platforms (e.g., Instagram, Facebook), they can be linked to the real user via face recognition systems, enabling identity tracking and profiling. Existing defenses mainly follow an anti-personalization strategy that protects publicly released reference photos by disrupting model fine-tuning. While effective against unauthorized personalization, they do not address another practical setting in which personalization is authorized, but the resulting public outputs still leak identity information.
  To address this problem, we introduce a new defense setting, termed model-side output immunization, whose goal is to produce a personalized model that supports authorized personalization while reducing the identity linkability of public generations, with tunable control over the privacy-utility trade-off to accommodate diverse privacy needs. To this end, we propose Identity-Decoupled personalized Diffusion Models (IDDM), a model-side defense that integrates identity decoupling into the personalization pipeline. Concretely, IDDM follows an alternating procedure that interleaves short personalization updates with identity-decoupled data optimization, using a two-stage schedule to balance identity linkability suppression and generation utility. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets, diverse prompts, and state-of-the-art face recognition systems show that IDDM consistently reduces identity linkability while preserving high-quality personalized generation.

AI.tldr: IDDM是一种保护个性化文本到图像生成隐私的防御方法，通过身份解耦技术降低生成图像的身份可链接性，同时保持高质量的个性化生成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有的防御方法主要针对未经授权的个性化模型训练进行保护，但无法解决授权个性化后生成的公开图像仍然泄露身份信息的问题。当用户在社交媒体分享个性化生成的图像时，这些图像可能通过人脸识别系统被链接到真实用户，导致身份追踪和画像分析。
AI.method: 提出IDDM（Identity-Decoupled personalized Diffusion Models）方法，采用模型端输出免疫策略。该方法将身份解耦集成到个性化流程中，通过交替执行短期个性化更新和身份解耦数据优化，使用两阶段调度来平衡身份可链接性抑制和生成效用。
AI.result: 在多个数据集、多样化提示词和最先进的人脸识别系统上的广泛实验表明，IDDM能够持续降低身份可链接性，同时保持高质量的个性化生成效果，实现了可调的隐私-效用权衡控制。
AI.conclusion: IDDM为解决授权个性化后生成图像的隐私泄露问题提供了有效解决方案，通过模型端输出免疫策略，在支持授权个性化的同时减少公开生成图像的身份可链接性，满足多样化的隐私需求。

title: Fatigue-Aware Learning to Defer via Constrained Optimisation
summary: Learning to defer (L2D) enables human-AI cooperation by deciding when an AI system should act autonomously or defer to a human expert. Existing L2D methods, however, assume static human performance, contradicting well-established findings on fatigue-induced degradation. We propose Fatigue-Aware Learning to Defer via Constrained Optimisation (FALCON), which explicitly models workload-varying human performance using psychologically grounded fatigue curves. FALCON formulates L2D as a Constrained Markov Decision Process (CMDP) whose state includes both task features and cumulative human workload, and optimises accuracy under human-AI cooperation budgets via PPO-Lagrangian training. We further introduce FA-L2D, a benchmark that systematically varies fatigue dynamics from near-static to rapidly degrading regimes. Experiments across multiple datasets show that FALCON consistently outperforms state-of-the-art L2D methods across coverage levels, generalises zero-shot to unseen experts with different fatigue patterns, and demonstrates the advantage of adaptive human-AI collaboration over AI-only or human-only decision-making when coverage lies strictly between 0 and 1.

AI.tldr: 提出FALCON方法，通过建模人类疲劳动态来优化人机协作中的延迟决策，在多种数据集上优于现有方法
AI.motivation: 现有学习延迟决策方法假设人类性能是静态的，这与疲劳导致性能下降的心理学发现相矛盾，需要建模动态的人类疲劳影响
AI.method: 提出FALCON方法，使用心理学基础的疲劳曲线建模工作负载变化的人类性能，将L2D问题形式化为约束马尔可夫决策过程，状态包括任务特征和累积人类工作负载，通过PPO-Lagrangian训练在人类-AI协作预算下优化准确性
AI.result: FALCON在多个数据集上始终优于最先进的L2D方法，能够零样本泛化到具有不同疲劳模式的未见专家，并展示了当覆盖率严格在0到1之间时，自适应人机协作相对于纯AI或纯人类决策的优势
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模人类疲劳动态，FALCON方法能够实现更有效的人机协作决策，为实际应用中的自适应人机协作系统提供了重要改进

title: JAMMEval: A Refined Collection of Japanese Benchmarks for Reliable VLM Evaluation
summary: Reliable evaluation is essential for the development of vision-language models (VLMs). However, Japanese VQA benchmarks have undergone far less iterative refinement than their English counterparts. As a result, many existing benchmarks contain issues such as ambiguous questions, incorrect answers, and instances that can be solved without visual grounding, undermining evaluation reliability and leading to misleading conclusions in model comparisons. To address these limitations, we introduce JAMMEval, a refined collection of Japanese benchmarks for reliable VLM evaluation. It is constructed by systematically refining seven existing Japanese benchmark datasets through two rounds of human annotation, improving both data quality and evaluation reliability. In our experiments, we evaluate open-weight and proprietary VLMs on JAMMEval and analyze the capabilities of recent models on Japanese VQA. We further demonstrate the effectiveness of our refinement by showing that the resulting benchmarks yield evaluation scores that better reflect model capability, exhibit lower run-to-run variance, and improve the ability to distinguish between models of different capability levels. We release our dataset and code to advance reliable evaluation of VLMs.

AI.tldr: JAMMEval是一个经过系统精炼的日语视觉问答基准数据集，通过两轮人工标注改进了7个现有日语基准，旨在提高视觉语言模型评估的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 日语VQA基准相比英语基准缺乏迭代精炼，现有基准存在模糊问题、错误答案以及无需视觉基础即可解决的实例等问题，这损害了评估可靠性并导致模型比较中的误导性结论。
AI.method: 通过两轮人工标注系统精炼7个现有日语基准数据集，构建JAMMEval数据集，提高数据质量和评估可靠性。
AI.result: JAMMEval评估显示，精炼后的基准能更好地反映模型能力，表现出更低的运行间方差，并提高了区分不同能力水平模型的能力。
AI.conclusion: JAMMEval为日语视觉语言模型提供了更可靠的评估基准，通过系统精炼现有数据集解决了评估可靠性问题，推动了日语VLM评估的发展。

title: ProCap: Projection-Aware Captioning for Spatial Augmented Reality
summary: Spatial augmented reality (SAR) directly projects digital content onto physical scenes using projectors, creating immersive experience without head-mounted displays. However, for SAR to support intelligent interaction, such as reasoning about the scene or answering user queries, it must semantically distinguish between the physical scene and the projected content. Standard Vision Language Models (VLMs) struggle with this virtual-physical ambiguity, often confusing the two contexts. To address this issue, we introduce ProCap, a novel framework that explicitly decouples projected content from physical scenes. ProCap employs a two-stage pipeline: first it visually isolates virtual and physical layers via automated segmentation; then it uses region-aware retrieval to avoid ambiguous semantic context due to projection distortion. To support this, we present RGBP (RGB + Projections), the first large-scale SAR semantic benchmark dataset, featuring 65 diverse physical scenes and over 180,000 projections with dense, decoupled annotations. Finally, we establish a dual-captioning evaluation protocol using task-specific tokens to assess physical scene and projection descriptions independently. Our experiments show that ProCap provides a robust semantic foundation for future SAR research. The source code, pre-trained models and the RGBP dataset are available on the project page: https://ZimoCao.github.io/ProCap/.

AI.tldr: ProCap框架解决空间增强现实中视觉语言模型难以区分物理场景与投影内容的虚拟-物理模糊问题，通过两阶段解耦方法提升语义理解能力
AI.motivation: 空间增强现实(SAR)通过投影仪将数字内容直接投影到物理场景上，但现有视觉语言模型难以区分物理场景和投影内容，导致语义理解模糊，限制了SAR支持智能交互的能力
AI.method: 提出ProCap框架：1) 通过自动分割视觉上分离虚拟和物理层；2) 使用区域感知检索避免投影变形导致的语义模糊；3) 创建RGBP数据集(首个大规模SAR语义基准数据集)；4) 建立双描述评估协议
AI.result: 实验表明ProCap为未来SAR研究提供了稳健的语义基础，创建了包含65个多样化物理场景和超过18万投影的RGBP数据集，并开源了代码、预训练模型和数据集
AI.conclusion: ProCap通过明确解耦投影内容和物理场景，有效解决了空间增强现实中的虚拟-物理模糊问题，为SAR的智能交互应用奠定了语义理解基础

title: Orthogonal Learner for Estimating Heterogeneous Long-Term Treatment Effects
summary: Estimation of heterogeneous long-term treatment effects (HLTEs) is widely used for personalized decision-making in marketing, economics, and medicine, where short-term randomized experiments are often combined with long-term observational data. However, HLTE estimation is challenging due to limited overlap in treatment or in observing long-term outcomes for certain subpopulations, which can lead to unstable HLTE estimates with large finite-sample variance. To address this challenge, we introduce the LT-O-learners (Long-Term Orthogonal Learners), a set of novel orthogonal learners for HLTE estimation. The learners are designed for the canonical HLTE setting that combines a short-term randomized dataset $\mathcal{D}_1$ with a long-term historical dataset $\mathcal{D}_2$. The key idea of our LT-O-Learners is to retarget the learning objective by introducing custom overlap weights that downweight samples with low overlap in treatment or in long-term observation. We show that the retargeted loss is equivalent to the weighted oracle loss and satisfies Neyman-orthogonality, which means our learners are robust to errors in the nuisance estimation. We further provide a general error bound for the LT-O-Learners and give the conditions under which quasi-oracle rate can be achieved. Finally, our LT-O-learners are model-agnostic and can thus be instantiated with arbitrary machine learning models. We conduct empirical evaluations on synthetic and semi-synthetic benchmarks to confirm the theoretical properties of our LT-O-Learners, especially the robustness in low-overlap settings. To the best of our knowledge, ours are the first orthogonal learners for HLTE estimation that are robust to low overlap that is common in long-term outcomes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了LT-O-Learners（长期正交学习器），用于估计异质性长期处理效应，通过引入自定义重叠权重来解决处理或长期观测重叠不足的问题，提高估计的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 异质性长期处理效应估计在个性化决策中广泛应用，但面临挑战：由于某些子群体中处理或长期结果观测的重叠有限，导致估计不稳定、方差大。需要一种能在低重叠设置下稳健估计的方法。
AI.method: 提出LT-O-Learners，通过引入自定义重叠权重重新定位学习目标，降低处理或长期观测重叠低的样本权重。该方法具有Neyman正交性，对干扰参数估计误差具有鲁棒性，且模型无关，可与任意机器学习模型结合。
AI.result: 理论分析表明重新定位的损失等价于加权oracle损失，满足Neyman正交性，提供了LT-O-Learners的一般误差界，给出了达到准oracle速率的条件。实证评估在合成和半合成基准上验证了理论特性，特别是在低重叠设置下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: LT-O-Learners是首个针对异质性长期处理效应估计的正交学习器，能够有效处理长期结果中常见的低重叠问题，为个性化决策提供更稳定的估计方法。

title: Benchmarking and Mechanistic Analysis of Vision-Language Models for Cross-Depiction Assembly Instruction Alignment
summary: 2D assembly diagrams are often abstract and hard to follow, creating a need for intelligent assistants that can monitor progress, detect errors, and provide step-by-step guidance. In mixed reality settings, such systems must recognize completed and ongoing steps from the camera feed and align them with the diagram instructions. Vision Language Models (VLMs) show promise for this task, but face a depiction gap because assembly diagrams and video frames share few visual features. To systematically assess this gap, we construct IKEA-Bench, a benchmark of 1,623 questions across 6 task types on 29 IKEA furniture products, and evaluate 19 VLMs (2B-38B) under three alignment strategies. Our key findings: (1) assembly instruction understanding is recoverable via text, but text simultaneously degrades diagram-to-video alignment; (2) architecture family predicts alignment accuracy more strongly than parameter count; (3) video understanding remains a hard bottleneck unaffected by strategy. A three-level mechanistic analysis further reveals that diagrams and video occupy disjoint ViT subspaces, and that adding text shifts models from visual to text-driven reasoning. These results identify visual encoding as the primary target for improving cross-depiction robustness. Project page: https://ryenhails.github.io/IKEA-Bench/

AI.tldr: IKEA-Bench基准测试评估了19个视觉语言模型在理解IKEA家具组装说明方面的表现，发现视觉编码是提升跨描述鲁棒性的关键瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 2D组装图通常抽象且难以理解，需要智能助手来监控进度、检测错误并提供逐步指导。在混合现实环境中，系统必须从摄像头画面识别已完成和进行中的步骤，并与图示说明对齐。
AI.method: 构建IKEA-Bench基准，包含29个IKEA家具产品的1,623个问题，涵盖6种任务类型。评估19个VLMs（2B-38B参数）在三种对齐策略下的表现，并进行三级机制分析。
AI.result: 主要发现：1) 组装指令理解可通过文本恢复，但文本同时会降低图示到视频的对齐；2) 架构家族比参数数量更能预测对齐准确性；3) 视频理解仍是硬瓶颈，不受策略影响。机制分析显示图示和视频占据不相交的ViT子空间，添加文本会使模型从视觉驱动转向文本驱动推理。
AI.conclusion: 视觉编码是提升跨描述鲁棒性的主要目标，需要改进视觉表示来弥合组装图与视频帧之间的描述差距。

title: Representation Selection via Cross-Model Agreement using Canonical Correlation Analysis
summary: Modern vision pipelines increasingly rely on pretrained image encoders whose representations are reused across tasks and models, yet these representations are often overcomplete and model-specific. We propose a simple, training-free method to improve the efficiency of image representations via a post-hoc canonical correlation analysis (CCA) operator. By leveraging the shared structure between representations produced by two pre-trained image encoders, our method finds linear projections that serve as a principled form of representation selection and dimensionality reduction, retaining shared semantic content while discarding redundant dimensions. Unlike standard dimensionality reduction techniques such as PCA, which operate on a single embedding space, our approach leverages cross-model agreement to guide representation distillation and refinement. The technique allows representations to be reduced by more than 75% in dimensionality with improved downstream performance, or enhanced at fixed dimensionality via post-hoc representation transfer from larger or fine-tuned models. Empirical results on ImageNet-1k, CIFAR-100, MNIST, and additional benchmarks show consistent improvements over both baseline and PCA-projected representations, with accuracy gains of up to 12.6%.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于典型相关分析（CCA）的训练免费方法，通过利用两个预训练图像编码器表示之间的共享结构，实现表示选择和降维，保留共享语义内容同时丢弃冗余维度。
AI.motivation: 现代视觉流程依赖预训练图像编码器，但这些表示通常是过完备且模型特定的，需要更高效的表示方法。
AI.method: 使用后处理的典型相关分析（CCA）算子，利用两个预训练图像编码器产生的表示之间的共享结构，找到线性投影作为表示选择和降维的原则性方法。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1k、CIFAR-100、MNIST等基准测试中，表示维度可减少75%以上且下游性能提升，或在固定维度下通过从更大或微调模型进行后处理表示迁移来增强表示，准确率提升最高达12.6%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种简单有效的训练免费技术，通过跨模型一致性指导表示蒸馏和精炼，优于基线方法和PCA投影表示。

title: Differentially Private Manifold Denoising
summary: We introduce a differentially private manifold denoising framework that allows users to exploit sensitive reference datasets to correct noisy, non-private query points without compromising privacy. The method follows an iterative procedure that (i) privately estimates local means and tangent geometry using the reference data under calibrated sensitivity, (ii) projects query points along the privately estimated subspace toward the local mean via corrective steps at each iteration, and (iii) performs rigorous privacy accounting across iterations and queries using $(\varepsilon,δ)$-differential privacy (DP). Conceptually, this framework brings differential privacy to manifold methods, retaining sufficient geometric signal for downstream tasks such as embedding, clustering, and visualization, while providing formal DP guarantees for the reference data. Practically, the procedure is modular and scalable, separating DP-protected local geometry (means and tangents) from budgeted query-point updates, with a simple scheduler allocating privacy budget across iterations and queries. Under standard assumptions on manifold regularity, sampling density, and measurement noise, we establish high-probability utility guarantees showing that corrected queries converge toward the manifold at a non-asymptotic rate governed by sample size, noise level, bandwidth, and the privacy budget. Simulations and case studies demonstrate accurate signal recovery under moderate privacy budgets, illustrating clear utility-privacy trade-offs and providing a deployable DP component for manifold-based workflows in regulated environments without reengineering privacy systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种差分隐私流形去噪框架，利用敏感参考数据集校正噪声查询点而不泄露隐私，通过迭代估计局部几何结构并提供形式化隐私保证。
AI.motivation: 在受监管环境中，需要利用敏感参考数据集进行流形去噪，但传统方法会泄露隐私。本文旨在开发一个既能保护参考数据隐私，又能有效校正噪声查询点的框架。
AI.method: 采用迭代三步法：(1) 在校准敏感度下使用参考数据私有估计局部均值和切向几何；(2) 沿私有估计子空间将查询点向局部均值投影；(3) 使用(ε,δ)-差分隐私进行严格的跨迭代和查询隐私核算。
AI.result: 在流形正则性、采样密度和测量噪声的标准假设下，建立了高概率效用保证，显示校正后的查询点以由样本大小、噪声水平、带宽和隐私预算决定的非渐近速率收敛到流形。
AI.conclusion: 该框架将差分隐私引入流形方法，在保持足够几何信号用于下游任务的同时提供形式化隐私保证，为受监管环境中的流形工作流程提供了可部署的差分隐私组件。

title: Flow-based Policy With Distributional Reinforcement Learning in Trajectory Optimization
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has proven highly effective in addressing complex control and decision-making tasks. However, in most traditional RL algorithms, the policy is typically parameterized as a diagonal Gaussian distribution, which constrains the policy from capturing multimodal distributions, making it difficult to cover the full range of optimal solutions in multi-solution problems, and the return is reduced to a mean value, losing its multimodal nature and thus providing insufficient guidance for policy updates. In response to these problems, we propose a RL algorithm termed flow-based policy with distributional RL (FP-DRL). This algorithm models the policy using flow matching, which offers both computational efficiency and the capacity to fit complex distributions. Additionally, it employs a distributional RL approach to model and optimize the entire return distribution, thereby more effectively guiding multimodal policy updates and improving agent performance. Experimental trails on MuJoCo benchmarks demonstrate that the FP-DRL algorithm achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance in most MuJoCo control tasks while exhibiting superior representation capability of the flow policy.

AI.tldr: 提出FP-DRL算法，结合流匹配策略和分布强化学习，解决传统RL中高斯策略无法捕捉多模态分布的问题，在MuJoCo任务中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 传统RL算法通常使用对角高斯分布参数化策略，这限制了策略捕捉多模态分布的能力，在多解问题中难以覆盖所有最优解。同时，回报被简化为均值，失去了多模态特性，无法为策略更新提供充分指导。
AI.method: 提出FP-DRL算法：1) 使用流匹配建模策略，既计算高效又能拟合复杂分布；2) 采用分布强化学习方法建模和优化整个回报分布，更有效地指导多模态策略更新。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo基准测试中，FP-DRL算法在大多数控制任务中实现了最先进的性能，同时展示了流策略的优越表示能力。
AI.conclusion: FP-DRL算法通过结合流匹配策略和分布强化学习，有效解决了传统RL在多模态问题中的局限性，提升了智能体性能。

title: EgoSim: Egocentric World Simulator for Embodied Interaction Generation
