summary: We introduce EgoSim, a closed-loop egocentric world simulator that generates spatially consistent interaction videos and persistently updates the underlying 3D scene state for continuous simulation. Existing egocentric simulators either lack explicit 3D grounding, causing structural drift under viewpoint changes, or treat the scene as static, failing to update world states across multi-stage interactions. EgoSim addresses both limitations by modeling 3D scenes as updatable world states. We generate embodiment interactions via a Geometry-action-aware Observation Simulation model, with spatial consistency from an Interaction-aware State Updating module. To overcome the critical data bottleneck posed by the difficulty in acquiring densely aligned scene-interaction training pairs, we design a scalable pipeline that extracts static point clouds, camera trajectories, and embodiment actions from in-the-wild large-scale monocular egocentric videos. We further introduce EgoCap, a capture system that enables low-cost real-world data collection with uncalibrated smartphones. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EgoSim significantly outperforms existing methods in terms of visual quality, spatial consistency, and generalization to complex scenes and in-the-wild dexterous interactions, while supporting cross-embodiment transfer to robotic manipulation. Codes and datasets will be open soon. The project page is at egosimulator.github.io.

AI.tldr: EgoSim是一个闭环的自我中心世界模拟器，能够生成空间一致的交互视频并持续更新底层3D场景状态，解决了现有模拟器缺乏3D基础或场景静态的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自我中心模拟器要么缺乏明确的3D基础，导致视角变化下的结构漂移；要么将场景视为静态，无法在多阶段交互中更新世界状态。需要解决这两个限制来创建更真实的交互模拟。
AI.method: 通过将3D场景建模为可更新的世界状态，使用几何动作感知的观察模拟模型生成具身交互，并通过交互感知状态更新模块确保空间一致性。设计了可扩展的流水线从大规模单目自我中心视频中提取静态点云、相机轨迹和具身动作，并开发了低成本数据采集系统EgoCap。
AI.result: EgoSim在视觉质量、空间一致性以及复杂场景和野外灵巧交互的泛化能力方面显著优于现有方法，同时支持跨具身转移到机器人操作。
AI.conclusion: EgoSim通过建模可更新的3D世界状态，解决了现有自我中心模拟器的关键限制，为交互视频生成提供了空间一致且动态更新的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

title: YieldSAT: A Multimodal Benchmark Dataset for High-Resolution Crop Yield Prediction
summary: Crop yield prediction requires substantial data to train scalable models. However, creating yield prediction datasets is constrained by high acquisition costs, heterogeneous data quality, and data privacy regulations. Consequently, existing datasets are scarce, low in quality, or limited to regional levels or single crop types, hindering the development of scalable data-driven solutions. In this work, we release YieldSAT, a large, high-quality, and multimodal dataset for high-resolution crop yield prediction. YieldSAT spans various climate zones across multiple countries, including Argentina, Brazil, Uruguay, and Germany, and includes major crop types, including corn, rapeseed, soybeans, and wheat, across 2,173 expert-curated fields. In total, over 12.2 million yield samples are available, each with a spatial resolution of 10 m. Each field is paired with multispectral satellite imagery, resulting in 113,555 labeled satellite images, complemented by auxiliary environmental data. We demonstrate the potential of large-scale and high-resolution crop yield prediction as a pixel regression task by comparing various deep learning models and data fusion architectures. Furthermore, we highlight open challenges arising from severe distribution shifts in the ground truth data under real-world conditions. To mitigate this, we explore a domain-informed Deep Ensemble approach that exhibits significant performance gains. The dataset is available at https://yieldsat.github.io/.

AI.tldr: YieldSAT是一个大规模、高质量、多模态的作物产量预测数据集，覆盖多国多种作物，包含1220万产量样本和11.3万张卫星图像，用于高分辨率像素回归任务。
AI.motivation: 现有作物产量预测数据集存在稀缺、质量低、区域限制或作物类型单一等问题，这主要是由于数据获取成本高、数据质量参差不齐以及数据隐私法规限制，阻碍了可扩展数据驱动解决方案的发展。
AI.method: 发布YieldSAT数据集，包含阿根廷、巴西、乌拉圭和德国多个气候区的2173个专家标注农田，涵盖玉米、油菜、大豆和小麦等主要作物类型。每个样本提供10米空间分辨率的多光谱卫星图像和辅助环境数据。将大规模高分辨率作物产量预测建模为像素回归任务，比较不同深度学习模型和数据融合架构，并提出领域知识引导的深度集成方法来缓解真实条件下的严重分布偏移问题。
AI.result: 数据集包含超过1220万产量样本和113,555张标注卫星图像，覆盖多种作物和气候区。通过比较不同模型和架构，展示了大规模高分辨率作物产量预测的潜力，并发现领域知识引导的深度集成方法能显著提升性能，应对真实条件下的分布偏移挑战。
AI.conclusion: YieldSAT为作物产量预测研究提供了大规模、高质量、多模态的数据资源，推动了可扩展数据驱动解决方案的发展。研究揭示了真实条件下分布偏移的挑战，并展示了领域知识引导的深度集成方法的有效性，为未来研究提供了重要基础。

title: Enhancing Gradient Inversion Attacks in Federated Learning via Hierarchical Feature Optimization
summary: Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a compelling paradigm for privacy-preserving distributed machine learning, allowing multiple clients to collaboratively train a global model by transmitting locally computed gradients to a central server without exposing their private data. Nonetheless, recent studies find that the gradients exchanged in the FL system are also vulnerable to privacy leakage, e.g., an attacker can invert shared gradients to reconstruct sensitive data by leveraging pre-trained generative adversarial networks (GAN) as prior knowledge. However, existing attacks simply perform gradient inversion in the latent space of the GAN model, which limits their expression ability and generalizability. To tackle these challenges, we propose \textbf{G}radient \textbf{I}nversion over \textbf{F}eature \textbf{D}omains (GIFD), which disassembles the GAN model and searches the hierarchical features of the intermediate layers. Instead of optimizing only over the initial latent code, we progressively change the optimized layer, from the initial latent space to intermediate layers closer to the output images. In addition, we design a regularizer to avoid unreal image generation by adding a small ${l_1}$ ball constraint to the searching range. We also extend GIFD to the out-of-distribution (OOD) setting, which weakens the assumption that the training sets of GANs and FL tasks obey the same data distribution. Furthermore, we consider the challenging OOD scenario of label inconsistency and propose a label mapping technique as an effective solution. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method can achieve pixel-level reconstruction and outperform competitive baselines across a variety of FL scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GIFD方法，通过在GAN中间层特征域进行梯度反演，相比现有方法在潜在空间优化，能实现像素级重建并提升泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中的梯度交换存在隐私泄露风险，现有攻击方法仅在GAN潜在空间进行梯度反演，表达能力有限且泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 提出GIFD方法：1) 分解GAN模型，在中间层特征域进行分层搜索；2) 从初始潜在空间逐步优化到接近输出图像的中间层；3) 设计正则化器避免生成不真实图像；4) 扩展到分布外场景，提出标签映射技术处理标签不一致问题。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，GIFD方法能实现像素级重建，在各种联邦学习场景中优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: GIFD通过利用GAN中间层特征域进行梯度反演，显著提升了隐私攻击的效果和泛化能力，揭示了联邦学习中更严重的隐私风险。

title: Model-Based Learning of Near-Optimal Finite-Window Policies in POMDPs
summary: We study model-based learning of finite-window policies in tabular partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs). A common approach to learning under partial observability is to approximate unbounded history dependencies using finite action-observation windows. This induces a finite-state Markov decision process (MDP) over histories, referred to as the superstate MDP. Once a model of this superstate MDP is available, standard MDP algorithms can be used to compute optimal policies, motivating the need for sample-efficient model estimation. Estimating the superstate MDP model is challenging because trajectories are generated by interaction with the original POMDP, creating a mismatch between the sampling process and target model. We propose a model estimation procedure for tabular POMDPs and analyze its sample complexity. Our analysis exploits a connection between filter stability and concentration inequalities for weakly dependent random variables. As a result, we obtain tight sample complexity guarantees for estimating the superstate MDP model from a single trajectory. Combined with value iteration, this yields approximately optimal finite-window policies for the POMDP.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在表格化部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程中基于模型的有限窗口策略学习，提出了从单轨迹估计超状态MDP模型的方法，并分析了其样本复杂度。
AI.motivation: 在部分可观测环境下学习时，通常使用有限动作-观测窗口来近似无界历史依赖，这诱导出基于历史的超状态MDP。然而，从原始POMDP交互生成的轨迹与目标模型之间存在采样不匹配问题，因此需要样本高效的模型估计方法。
AI.method: 提出了表格化POMDP的模型估计程序，利用滤波器稳定性与弱依赖随机变量集中不等式之间的联系，分析单轨迹估计超状态MDP模型的样本复杂度。
AI.result: 获得了从单轨迹估计超状态MDP模型的紧致样本复杂度保证，结合值迭代算法，可以为POMDP生成近似最优的有限窗口策略。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过理论分析证明了在部分可观测环境下，能够从有限数据中有效学习有限窗口策略，为POMDP中的模型学习提供了理论保证。

title: DLWM: Dual Latent World Models enable Holistic Gaussian-centric Pre-training in Autonomous Driving
summary: Vision-based autonomous driving has gained much attention due to its low costs and excellent performance. Compared with dense BEV (Bird's Eye View) or sparse query models, Gaussian-centric method is a comprehensive yet sparse representation by describing scene with 3D semantic Gaussians. In this paper, we introduce DLWM, a novel paradigm with Dual Latent World Models specifically designed to enable holistic gaussian-centric pre-training in autonomous driving using two stages. In the first stage, DLWM predicts 3D Gaussians from queries by self-supervised reconstructing multi-view semantic and depth images. Equipped with fine-grained contextual features, in the second stage, two latent world models are trained separately for temporal feature learning, including Gaussian-flow-guided latent prediction for downstream occupancy perception and forecasting tasks, and ego-planning-guided latent prediction for motion planning. Extensive experiments in SurroundOcc and nuScenes benchmarks demonstrate that DLWM shows significant performance gains across Gaussian-centric 3D occupancy perception, 4D occupancy forecasting and motion planning tasks.

AI.tldr: DLWM提出了一种用于自动驾驶的双潜在世界模型范式，通过两阶段训练实现基于高斯表示的全面预训练，在3D占用感知、4D占用预测和运动规划任务上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 基于视觉的自动驾驶因其低成本和高性能受到关注。与密集BEV或稀疏查询模型相比，高斯中心方法通过3D语义高斯描述场景，是一种全面且稀疏的表示。需要一种专门为自动驾驶设计的高斯中心预训练范式。
AI.method: DLWM采用两阶段训练：第一阶段通过自监督重建多视角语义和深度图像，从查询中预测3D高斯；第二阶段训练两个独立的潜在世界模型进行时序特征学习，包括用于下游占用感知和预测任务的高斯流引导潜在预测，以及用于运动规划的自我规划引导潜在预测。
AI.result: 在SurroundOcc和nuScenes基准测试中，DLWM在高斯中心3D占用感知、4D占用预测和运动规划任务上均显示出显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: DLWM为自动驾驶提供了一种新颖的双潜在世界模型范式，能够实现全面的高斯中心预训练，在多个关键任务上取得优异性能，展示了其在自动驾驶领域的应用潜力。

title: Fast and Accurate Probing of In-Training LLMs' Downstream Performances
summary: The paradigm of scaling Large Language Models (LLMs) in both parameter size and test time has pushed the boundaries of AI capabilities, but at the cost of making the traditional generative evaluation paradigm prohibitively expensive, therefore making the latency of LLM's in-training downstream performance evaluation unbearable. However, simple metrics like training loss (perplexity) are not always correlated with downstream performance, as sometimes their trends diverge from the actual task outcomes. This dilemma calls for a method that is computationally efficient and sufficiently accurate in measuring model capabilities. To address this challenge, we introduce a new in-training evaluation paradigm that uses a lightweight probe for monitoring downstream performance. The probes take the internal representations of LLM checkpoints (during training) as input and directly predict the checkpoint's performance on downstream tasks measured by success probability (i.e., pass@1). We design several probe architectures, validating their effectiveness using the OLMo3-7B's checkpoints across a diverse set of downstream tasks. The probes can accurately predict a checkpoint's performance (with avg. AUROC$>$0.75), have decent generalizability across checkpoints (earlier predicts later), and reduce the computation latency from $\sim$1 hr (using conventional generative evaluation method) to $\sim$3 min. In sum, this work presents a practical and scalable in-training downstream evaluation paradigm, enabling a more agile, informed, and efficient LLM development process.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种轻量级探针方法，用于在LLM训练过程中高效评估下游任务性能，替代传统昂贵的生成式评估
AI.motivation: 传统的大语言模型生成式评估方法计算成本过高，导致训练过程中的下游性能评估延迟难以承受，而简单的训练损失指标又与下游性能不总是相关
AI.method: 使用轻量级探针，以LLM训练检查点的内部表示为输入，直接预测检查点在下游任务上的性能（通过成功率pass@1衡量），设计了多种探针架构
AI.result: 探针能准确预测检查点性能（平均AUROC>0.75），在不同检查点间具有良好的泛化能力（早期预测后期），将计算延迟从约1小时降低到约3分钟
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种实用且可扩展的训练中下游评估范式，使LLM开发过程更加敏捷、信息丰富且高效

title: ACT Now: Preempting LVLM Hallucinations via Adaptive Context Integration
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) frequently suffer from severe hallucination issues. Existing mitigation strategies predominantly rely on isolated, single-step states to enhance visual focus or suppress strong linguistic priors. However, these static approaches neglect dynamic context changes across the generation process and struggles to correct inherited information loss. To address this limitation, we propose Adaptive Context inTegration (ACT), a training-free inference intervention method that mitigates hallucination through the adaptive integration of contextual information. Specifically, we first propose visual context exploration, which leverages spatio-temporal profiling to adaptively amplify attention heads responsible for visual exploration. To further facilitate vision-language alignment, we propose semantic context aggregation that marginalizes potential semantic queries to effectively aggregate visual evidence, thereby resolving the information loss caused by the discrete nature of token prediction. Extensive experiments across diverse LVLMs demonstrate that ACT significantly reduces hallucinations and achieves competitive results on both discriminative and generative benchmarks, acting as a robust and highly adaptable solution without compromising fundamental generation capabilities.

AI.tldr: ACT是一种无需训练的动态推理干预方法，通过自适应整合上下文信息来减少大视觉语言模型中的幻觉问题，在保持基本生成能力的同时显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有缓解LVLM幻觉的方法主要依赖静态的单步状态来增强视觉关注或抑制语言先验，但忽视了生成过程中的动态上下文变化，难以纠正信息损失。
AI.method: 提出自适应上下文整合（ACT）方法：1）视觉上下文探索：利用时空分析自适应放大负责视觉探索的注意力头；2）语义上下文聚合：边缘化潜在语义查询以有效聚合视觉证据，解决标记预测离散性导致的信息损失。
AI.result: 在多种LVLM上的广泛实验表明，ACT显著减少幻觉，在判别性和生成性基准测试中取得有竞争力的结果，且不损害基本生成能力。
AI.conclusion: ACT作为一种无需训练、高度自适应的推理干预方法，通过动态整合上下文信息有效缓解了LVLM的幻觉问题，具有鲁棒性和广泛适用性。

title: Maximizing T2-Only Prostate Cancer Localization from Expected Diffusion Weighted Imaging
summary: Multiparametric MRI is increasingly recommended as a first-line noninvasive approach to detect and localize prostate cancer, requiring at minimum diffusion-weighted (DWI) and T2-weighted (T2w) MR sequences. Early machine learning attempts using only T2w images have shown promising diagnostic performance in segmenting radiologist-annotated lesions. Such uni-modal T2-only approaches deliver substantial clinical benefits by reducing costs and expertise required to acquire other sequences. This work investigates an arguably more challenging application using only T2w at inference, but to localize individual cancers based on independent histopathology labels. We formulate DWI images as a latent modality (readily available during training) to classify cancer presence at local Barzell zones, given only T2w images as input. In the resulting expectation-maximization algorithm, a latent modality generator (implemented using a flow matching-based generative model) approximates the latent DWI image posterior distribution in the E-steps, while in M-steps a cancer localizer is simultaneously optimized with the generative model to maximize the expected likelihood of cancer presence. The proposed approach provides a novel theoretical framework for learning from a privileged DWI modality, yielding superior cancer localization performance compared to approaches that lack training DWI images or existing frameworks for privileged learning and incomplete modalities. The proposed T2-only methods perform competitively or better than baseline methods using multiple input sequences (e.g., improving the patient-level F1 score by 14.4\% and zone-level QWK by 5.3\% over the T2w+DWI baseline). We present quantitative evaluations using internal and external datasets from 4,133 prostate cancer patients with histopathology-verified labels.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种仅使用T2加权MRI进行前列腺癌定位的新方法，通过将DWI作为训练时的潜在模态，在推理时仅需T2图像即可实现与多模态方法相当甚至更好的癌症定位性能。
AI.motivation: 虽然多参数MRI（包括DWI和T2w）被推荐用于前列腺癌检测，但仅使用T2w图像具有临床优势：降低成本、减少对专业序列采集的依赖。研究旨在探索仅使用T2w图像进行基于组织病理学标签的癌症定位这一更具挑战性的应用。
AI.method: 提出期望最大化算法框架：将DWI作为训练时的潜在模态，E步中使用基于流匹配的生成模型近似潜在DWI图像的后验分布，M步中同时优化癌症定位器和生成模型以最大化癌症存在的期望似然。这是一种从特权DWI模态学习的新理论框架。
AI.result: 提出的仅T2方法在癌症定位性能上优于缺乏训练DWI图像的方法以及现有的特权学习和不完整模态框架。在患者层面F1分数比T2w+DWI基线提高14.4%，区域层面QWK提高5.3%，与使用多个输入序列的基线方法相比具有竞争力或更好表现。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为从特权模态学习提供了新颖的理论框架，仅使用T2w图像即可实现优越的前列腺癌定位性能，具有显著的临床实用价值，能够降低成本和专业知识要求，同时保持甚至超越多模态方法的诊断准确性。

title: Customizing Large Vision Model-Guided Low-Rank Approximation for Ground-Roll Denoise
summary: Ground-roll is a dominant source of coherent noise in land and vertical seismic profiling (VSP) data, severely masking reflection events and degrading subsequent imaging and interpretation. Conventional attenuation methods, including transform-domain filtering, sparse representation, and deep learning, often suffer from limited adaptability, signal leakage, or dependence on labeled training data, especially under strong signal-noise overlap. To address these challenges, we propose a training-free framework that reformulates ground-roll attenuation as a semantic-guided signal separation problem. Specifically, a promptable large vision model is employed to extract high-level semantic priors by converting seismic gathers into visual representations and localizing ground-roll-dominant regions via text or image prompts. The resulting semantic response is transformed into a continuous soft mask, which is embedded into a mask-conditioned low-rank inverse formulation to enable spatially adaptive suppression and reflection-preserving reconstruction. An efficient alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM)-based solver is further developed to solve the proposed inverse problem, enabling stable and physically consistent signal recovery without requiring task-specific training or manual annotation. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and field VSP datasets demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior ground-roll attenuation while preserving reflection continuity and waveform fidelity, consistently outperforming representative transform-domain filtering and implicit neural representation methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需训练的地滚波衰减框架，将地滚波衰减重新定义为语义引导的信号分离问题，使用可提示的大型视觉模型提取语义先验，通过软掩码嵌入低秩逆公式实现自适应抑制和反射保护重建。
AI.motivation: 地滚波是陆地和垂直地震剖面数据中的主要相干噪声，严重掩盖反射事件并降低后续成像和解释质量。传统衰减方法存在适应性有限、信号泄漏或依赖标记训练数据等问题，特别是在强信号噪声重叠情况下表现不佳。
AI.method: 1) 将地震道集转换为视觉表示，使用可提示的大型视觉模型通过文本或图像提示提取高级语义先验，定位地滚波主导区域；2) 将语义响应转换为连续软掩码；3) 将软掩码嵌入掩码条件低秩逆公式，实现空间自适应抑制和反射保护重建；4) 开发基于交替方向乘子法的高效求解器。
AI.result: 在合成和实际VSP数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法实现了优异的地滚波衰减效果，同时保持了反射连续性和波形保真度，在性能上一致优于代表性的变换域滤波和隐式神经表示方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无需训练框架通过语义引导的信号分离方法有效解决了地滚波衰减问题，无需任务特定训练或手动标注，实现了稳定且物理一致的信号恢复，为地震数据处理提供了新的解决方案。

title: Toward Personalized Darts Training: A Data-Driven Framework Based on Skeleton-Based Biomechanical Analysis and Motion Modeling
summary: As sports training becomes more data-driven, traditional dart coaching based mainly on experience and visual observation is increasingly inadequate for high-precision, goal-oriented movements. Although prior studies have highlighted the importance of release parameters, joint motion, and coordination in dart throwing, most quantitative methods still focus on local variables, single-release metrics, or static template matching. These approaches offer limited support for personalized training and often overlook useful movement variability. This paper presents a data-driven dart training assistance system. The system creates a closed-loop framework spanning motion capture, feature modeling, and personalized feedback. Dart-throwing data were collected in markerless conditions using a Kinect 2.0 depth sensor and an optical camera. Eighteen kinematic features were extracted from four biomechanical dimensions: three-link coordination, release velocity, multi-joint angular configuration, and postural stability. Two modules were developed: a personalized optimal throwing trajectory model that combines historical high-quality samples with the minimum jerk criterion, and a motion deviation diagnosis and recommendation model based on z-scores and hierarchical logic. A total of 2,396 throwing samples from professional and non-professional athletes were collected. Results show that the system generates smooth personalized reference trajectories consistent with natural human movement. Case studies indicate that it can detect poor trunk stability, abnormal elbow displacement, and imbalanced velocity control, then provide targeted recommendations. The framework shifts dart evaluation from deviation from a uniform standard to deviation from an individual's optimal control range, improving personalization and interpretability for darts training and other high-precision target sports.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的飞镖训练辅助系统，通过无标记运动捕捉、特征建模和个性化反馈的闭环框架，为飞镖投掷提供个性化训练指导。
AI.motivation: 传统飞镖教练主要依赖经验和视觉观察，难以满足高精度、目标导向运动的需求。现有量化方法多关注局部变量、单次释放指标或静态模板匹配，对个性化训练支持有限且常忽略有用的运动变异性。
AI.method: 系统使用Kinect 2.0深度传感器和光学相机在无标记条件下采集飞镖投掷数据，从四个生物力学维度提取18个运动学特征。开发了两个模块：1)结合历史高质量样本和最小急动度准则的个性化最优投掷轨迹模型；2)基于z分数和分层逻辑的运动偏差诊断与推荐模型。
AI.result: 收集了专业和非专业运动员的2,396个投掷样本。结果显示系统能生成符合自然人体运动的平滑个性化参考轨迹。案例研究表明系统能检测躯干稳定性差、肘部位移异常和速度控制不平衡等问题，并提供针对性建议。
AI.conclusion: 该框架将飞镖评估从偏离统一标准转变为偏离个体最优控制范围，提高了飞镖训练及其他高精度目标运动的个性化和可解释性。

title: Property-Level Flood Risk Assessment Using AI-Enabled Street-View Lowest Floor Elevation Extraction and ML Imputation Across Texas
summary: This paper argues that AI-enabled analysis of street-view imagery, complemented by performance-gated machine-learning imputation, provides a viable pathway for generating building-specific elevation data at regional scale for flood risk assessment. We develop and apply a three-stage pipeline across 18 areas of interest (AOIs) in Texas that (1) extracts LFE and the height difference between street grade and the lowest floor (HDSL) from Google Street View imagery using the Elev-Vision framework, (2) imputes missing HDSL values with Random Forest and Gradient Boosting models trained on 16 terrain, hydrologic, geographic, and flood-exposure features, and (3) integrates the resulting elevation dataset with Fathom 1-in-100 year inundation surfaces and USACE depth-damage functions to estimate property-specific interior flood depth and expected loss. Across 12,241 residential structures, street-view imagery was available for 73.4% of parcels and direct LFE/HDSL extraction was successful for 49.0% (5,992 structures). Imputation was retained for 13 AOIs where cross-validated performance was defensible, with selected models achieving R suqre values from 0.159 to 0.974; five AOIs were explicitly excluded from prediction because performance was insufficient. The results show that street-view-based elevation mapping is not universally available for every property, but it is sufficiently scalable to materially improve regional flood-risk characterization by moving beyond hazard exposure to structure-level estimates of interior inundation and expected damage. Scientifically, the study advances LFE estimation from a pilot-scale proof of concept to a regional, end-to-end workflow. Practically, it offers a replicable framework for jurisdictions that lack comprehensive Elevation Certificates but need parcel-level information to support mitigation, planning, and flood-risk management.

AI.tldr: 该研究开发了一个三阶段流程，利用街景图像和机器学习填补技术，为洪水风险评估生成区域尺度的建筑特定高程数据。
AI.motivation: 为缺乏全面高程证书但需要地块级信息支持减灾、规划和洪水风险管理的司法管辖区，提供可复制的洪水风险评估框架。
AI.method: 三阶段流程：1) 使用Elev-Vision框架从Google街景图像提取最低楼层高程和街道与最低楼层高度差；2) 用随机森林和梯度提升模型填补缺失的高度差值；3) 将高程数据与洪水淹没面和深度-损失函数结合，估算建筑内部洪水深度和预期损失。
AI.result: 在12,241个住宅结构中，73.4%的地块有街景图像，49.0%成功直接提取高程数据。在13个研究区域中，填补模型R平方值从0.159到0.974不等，5个区域因性能不足被排除。该方法可显著改善区域洪水风险表征。
AI.conclusion: 街景图像高程测绘虽非对所有房产都适用，但具有足够可扩展性，能从灾害暴露评估推进到建筑级内部淹没和预期损失估算，实质性改善区域洪水风险表征。

title: Online Reasoning Calibration: Test-Time Training Enables Generalizable Conformal LLM Reasoning
summary: While test-time scaling has enabled large language models to solve highly difficult tasks, state-of-the-art results come at exorbitant compute costs. These inefficiencies can be attributed to the miscalibration of post-trained language models, and the lack of calibration in popular sampling techniques. Here, we present Online Reasoning Calibration (ORCA), a framework for calibrating the sampling process that draws upon conformal prediction and test-time training. Specifically, we introduce a meta-learning procedure that updates the calibration module for each input. This allows us to provide valid confidence estimates under distributional shift, e.g. in thought patterns that occur across different stages of reasoning, or in prompt distributions between model development and deployment. ORCA not only provides theoretical guarantees on conformal risks, but also empirically shows higher efficiency and generalization across different reasoning tasks. At risk level $δ=0.1$, ORCA improves Qwen2.5-32B efficiency on in-distribution tasks with savings up to 47.5% with supervised labels and 40.7% with self-consistency labels. Under zero-shot out-of-domain settings, it improves MATH-500 savings from 24.8% of the static calibration baseline to 67.0% while maintaining a low empirical error rate, and the same trend holds across model families and downstream benchmarks. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/wzekai99/ORCA.

AI.tldr: ORCA是一个在线推理校准框架，通过元学习更新每个输入的校准模块，提供有效的置信度估计，显著提高大语言模型在推理任务中的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型在测试时缩放虽然能解决高难度任务，但需要极高的计算成本。这种低效性源于后训练语言模型的校准不足以及流行采样技术缺乏校准。需要一种能在分布偏移下提供有效置信度估计的校准方法。
AI.method: ORCA结合了保形预测和测试时训练，引入元学习过程为每个输入更新校准模块。该方法能在分布偏移（如不同推理阶段的思想模式、模型开发与部署间的提示分布变化）下提供有效的置信度估计。
AI.result: 在风险水平δ=0.1时，ORCA在分布内任务上提高Qwen2.5-32B效率，使用监督标签节省47.5%，使用自洽标签节省40.7%。在零样本分布外设置下，将MATH-500的节省从静态校准基线的24.8%提高到67.0%，同时保持低经验错误率，这一趋势在不同模型系列和下游基准测试中保持一致。
AI.conclusion: ORCA不仅提供了保形风险的理论保证，还实证展示了在不同推理任务中更高的效率和泛化能力。该框架能显著降低大语言模型推理的计算成本，同时保持性能。

title: Reasoning Shift: How Context Silently Shortens LLM Reasoning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) exhibiting test-time scaling behavior, such as extended reasoning traces and self-verification, have demonstrated remarkable performance on complex, long-term reasoning tasks. However, the robustness of these reasoning behaviors remains underexplored. To investigate this, we conduct a systematic evaluation of multiple reasoning models across three scenarios: (1) problems augmented with lengthy, irrelevant context; (2) multi-turn conversational settings with independent tasks; and (3) problems presented as a subtask within a complex task. We observe an interesting phenomenon: reasoning models tend to produce much shorter reasoning traces (up to 50%) for the same problem under different context conditions compared to the traces produced when the problem is presented in isolation. A finer-grained analysis reveals that this compression is associated with a decrease in self-verification and uncertainty management behaviors, such as double-checking. While this behavioral shift does not compromise performance on straightforward problems, it might affect performance on more challenging tasks. We hope our findings draw additional attention to both the robustness of reasoning models and the problem of context management for LLMs and LLM-based agents.

AI.tldr: 研究发现推理模型在不同上下文条件下会产生更短的推理轨迹（最多缩短50%），这种压缩与自我验证和不确定性管理行为的减少相关，可能影响复杂任务表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管展示测试时扩展行为（如扩展推理轨迹和自我验证）的大语言模型在复杂长期推理任务上表现出色，但这些推理行为的鲁棒性尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 在三种场景下对多个推理模型进行系统评估：1）添加冗长无关上下文的问题；2）包含独立任务的多轮对话设置；3）作为复杂任务子任务呈现的问题。
AI.result: 观察到推理模型在不同上下文条件下对相同问题产生的推理轨迹比孤立呈现时短得多（最多缩短50%）。细粒度分析显示这种压缩与自我验证和不确定性管理行为（如双重检查）的减少相关。
AI.conclusion: 虽然这种行为转变不影响简单问题表现，但可能影响更具挑战性任务的性能。研究呼吁关注推理模型的鲁棒性以及LLM和基于LLM的智能体的上下文管理问题。

title: Screening Is Enough
summary: A core limitation of standard softmax attention is that it does not define a notion of absolute query--key relevance: attention weights are obtained by redistributing a fixed unit mass across all keys according to their relative scores. As a result, relevance is defined only relative to competing keys, and irrelevant keys cannot be explicitly rejected. We introduce Multiscreen, a language-model architecture built around a mechanism we call screening, which enables absolute query--key relevance. Instead of redistributing attention across all keys, screening evaluates each key against an explicit threshold, discarding irrelevant keys and aggregating the remaining keys, thereby removing global competition among keys. Across experiments, Multiscreen achieves comparable validation loss with approximately 40% fewer parameters than a Transformer baseline, enables stable optimization at substantially larger learning rates, maintains strong performance in long-context perplexity, shows little to no degradation in retrieval performance even far beyond the training context length, and reduces inference latency by up to 3.2$\times$ at 100K context length.

AI.tldr: Multiscreen架构通过引入screening机制解决标准softmax注意力缺乏绝对查询-键相关性的问题，使用显式阈值筛选相关键而非全局竞争，在减少参数、提高训练稳定性、长上下文性能和推理速度方面表现优异。
AI.motivation: 标准softmax注意力的核心限制在于缺乏绝对查询-键相关性概念：注意力权重是通过在所有键之间重新分配固定单位质量获得的，相关性仅相对于竞争键定义，无法显式拒绝不相关键。
AI.method: 提出Multiscreen语言模型架构，引入screening机制。该机制通过显式阈值评估每个键，丢弃不相关键并聚合剩余键，从而消除键之间的全局竞争。
AI.result: Multiscreen在验证损失相当的情况下比Transformer基线减少约40%参数；支持更大学习率的稳定优化；在长上下文困惑度上保持强性能；在远超训练上下文长度时检索性能几乎不下降；在100K上下文长度下推理延迟降低达3.2倍。
AI.conclusion: Multiscreen通过screening机制解决了标准注意力缺乏绝对相关性的问题，在模型效率、训练稳定性、长上下文性能和推理速度方面均有显著改进，为语言模型架构提供了有前景的替代方案。

title: PDA: Text-Augmented Defense Framework for Robust Vision-Language Models against Adversarial Image Attacks
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are vulnerable to adversarial image perturbations. Existing works based on adversarial training against task-specific adversarial examples are computationally expensive and often fail to generalize to unseen attack types. To address these limitations, we introduce Paraphrase-Decomposition-Aggregation (PDA), a training-free defense framework that leverages text augmentation to enhance VLM robustness under diverse adversarial image attacks. PDA performs prompt paraphrasing, question decomposition, and consistency aggregation entirely at test time, thus requiring no modification on the underlying models. To balance robustness and efficiency, we instantiate PDA as invariants that reduce the inference cost while retaining most of its robustness gains. Experiments on multiple VLM architectures and benchmarks for visual question answering, classification, and captioning show that PDA achieves consistent robustness gains against various adversarial perturbations while maintaining competitive clean accuracy, establishing a generic, strong and practical defense framework for VLMs during inference.

AI.tldr: PDA是一个无需训练、基于文本增强的防御框架，通过提示改写、问题分解和一致性聚合来提升视觉语言模型对抗图像扰动的鲁棒性，保持推理效率的同时实现通用防御。
AI.motivation: 现有基于对抗训练的防御方法计算成本高，且难以泛化到未见过的攻击类型，需要一种更通用、高效的防御方案来保护视觉语言模型免受对抗图像扰动的影响。
AI.method: 提出Paraphrase-Decomposition-Aggregation（PDA）框架，包含三个步骤：1）提示改写生成多个语义等价的变体；2）将复杂问题分解为子问题；3）聚合多个变体的输出以获得一致性结果。框架完全在推理时运行，无需修改底层模型。
AI.result: 在多个视觉语言模型架构和视觉问答、分类、描述任务上的实验表明，PDA能一致地提升对各种对抗扰动的鲁棒性，同时保持有竞争力的干净准确率，实现了通用、强大且实用的防御。
AI.conclusion: PDA为视觉语言模型提供了一个无需训练、推理时有效的通用防御框架，通过文本增强策略平衡了鲁棒性和效率，为对抗防御提供了新的实用解决方案。

title: Bridging the Simulation-to-Experiment Gap with Generative Models using Adversarial Distribution Alignment
summary: A fundamental challenge in science and engineering is the simulation-to-experiment gap. While we often possess prior knowledge of physical laws, these physical laws can be too difficult to solve exactly for complex systems. Such systems are commonly modeled using simulators, which impose computational approximations. Meanwhile, experimental measurements more faithfully represent the real world, but experimental data typically consists of observations that only partially reflect the system's full underlying state. We propose a data-driven distribution alignment framework that bridges this simulation-to-experiment gap by pre-training a generative model on fully observed (but imperfect) simulation data, then aligning it with partial (but real) observations of experimental data. While our method is domain-agnostic, we ground our approach in the physical sciences by introducing Adversarial Distribution Alignment (ADA). This method aligns a generative model of atomic positions -- initially trained on a simulated Boltzmann distribution -- with the distribution of experimental observations. We prove that our method recovers the target observable distribution, even with multiple, potentially correlated observables. We also empirically validate our framework on synthetic, molecular, and experimental protein data, demonstrating that it can align generative models with diverse observables. Our code is available at https://kaityrusnelson.com/ada/.

AI.tldr: 提出对抗性分布对齐(ADA)框架，通过预训练生成模型在模拟数据上，然后与实验观测数据对齐，弥合仿真与实验之间的差距
AI.motivation: 科学和工程中存在仿真与实验的差距：物理定律难以精确求解复杂系统，而仿真包含计算近似，实验数据虽真实但只能部分反映系统状态
AI.method: 提出数据驱动的分布对齐框架，先在完全观测但存在缺陷的仿真数据上预训练生成模型，然后与部分但真实的实验观测数据对齐。具体引入对抗性分布对齐(ADA)方法，对齐原子位置的生成模型（初始训练于模拟玻尔兹曼分布）与实验观测分布
AI.result: 理论上证明方法能恢复目标观测分布，即使存在多个潜在相关的观测变量。在合成数据、分子数据和实验蛋白质数据上验证了框架有效性，表明能对齐具有多样化观测的生成模型
AI.conclusion: 提出的对抗性分布对齐框架能有效弥合仿真与实验之间的差距，为物理科学等领域提供了一种将模拟生成模型与真实实验观测对齐的通用方法

title: Forecasting Motion in the Wild
summary: Visual intelligence requires anticipating the future behavior of agents, yet vision systems lack a general representation for motion and behavior. We propose dense point trajectories as visual tokens for behavior, a structured mid-level representation that disentangles motion from appearance and generalizes across diverse non-rigid agents, such as animals in-the-wild. Building on this abstraction, we design a diffusion transformer that models unordered sets of trajectories and explicitly reasons about occlusion, enabling coherent forecasts of complex motion patterns. To evaluate at scale, we curate 300 hours of unconstrained animal video with robust shot detection and camera-motion compensation. Experiments show that forecasting trajectory tokens achieves category-agnostic, data-efficient prediction, outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, and generalizes to rare species and morphologies, providing a foundation for predictive visual intelligence in the wild.

AI.tldr: 提出使用密集点轨迹作为行为视觉标记，通过扩散变换器建模无序轨迹集并显式处理遮挡，实现复杂运动模式的连贯预测
AI.motivation: 视觉智能需要预测智能体的未来行为，但现有视觉系统缺乏通用的运动和行为的表示方法
AI.method: 使用密集点轨迹作为视觉标记，设计扩散变换器建模无序轨迹集，显式处理遮挡问题
AI.result: 轨迹标记预测实现了类别无关、数据高效的预测，优于现有基线方法，并能泛化到稀有物种和形态
AI.conclusion: 为野外预测性视觉智能提供了基础，展示了结构化中间表示在行为预测中的有效性

title: Diff3R: Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting with Uncertainty-aware Differentiable Optimization
summary: Recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) present two main directions: feed-forward models offer fast inference in sparse-view settings, while per-scene optimization yields high-quality renderings but is computationally expensive. To combine the benefits of both, we introduce Diff3R, a novel framework that explicitly bridges feed-forward prediction and test-time optimization. By incorporating a differentiable 3DGS optimization layer directly into the training loop, our network learns to predict an optimal initialization for test-time optimization rather than a conventional zero-shot result. To overcome the computational cost of backpropagating through the optimization steps, we propose computing gradients via the Implicit Function Theorem and a scalable, matrix-free PCG solver tailored for 3DGS optimization. Additionally, we incorporate a data-driven uncertainty model into the optimization process by adaptively controlling how much the parameters are allowed to change during optimization. This approach effectively mitigates overfitting in under-constrained regions and increases robustness against input outliers. Since our proposed optimization layer is model-agnostic, we show that it can be seamlessly integrated into existing feed-forward 3DGS architectures for both pose-given and pose-free methods, providing improvements for test-time optimization.

AI.tldr: Diff3R是一个新颖的3D高斯泼溅框架，通过将可微分的3DGS优化层集成到训练循环中，将前馈预测与测试时优化相结合，学习预测最优的初始化参数而非传统零次结果。
AI.motivation: 当前3DGS存在两个主要方向：前馈模型在稀疏视图下推理快但质量有限，而逐场景优化质量高但计算成本大。需要结合两者的优势，实现既快速又高质量的3D重建。
AI.method: 1. 引入可微分3DGS优化层到训练循环中；2. 使用隐函数定理和矩阵自由PCG求解器计算梯度，避免优化步骤反向传播的高计算成本；3. 集成数据驱动的不确定性模型，自适应控制优化过程中参数的改变程度。
AI.result: 该方法能有效缓解欠约束区域的过拟合问题，提高对输入异常值的鲁棒性。由于优化层是模型无关的，可以无缝集成到现有的前馈3DGS架构中，为测试时优化提供改进。
AI.conclusion: Diff3R成功桥接了前馈预测和测试时优化，通过预测最优初始化而非传统零次结果，结合了快速推理和高质量渲染的优势，为3D高斯泼溅技术提供了新的优化框架。

title: Sub-metre Lunar DEM Generation and Validation from Chandrayaan-2 OHRC Multi-View Imagery Using Open-Source Photogrammetry
summary: High-resolution digital elevation models (DEMs) of the lunar surface are essential for surface mobility planning, landing site characterization, and planetary science. The Orbiter High Resolution Camera (OHRC) on board Chandrayaan-2 has the best ground sampling capabilities of any lunar orbital imaging currently in use by acquiring panchromatic imagery at a resolution of roughly 20-30 cm per pixel. This work presents, for the first time, the generation of sub-metre DEMs from OHRC multi-view imagery using an exclusively open-source pipeline. Candidate stereo pairs are identified from non-paired OHRC archives through geometric analysis of image metadata, employing baseline-to-height (B/H) ratio computation and convergence angle estimation. Dense stereo correspondence and ray triangulation are then applied to generate point clouds, which are gridded into DEMs at effective spatial resolutions between approximately 24 and 54 cm across five geographically distributed lunar sites. Absolute elevation consistency is established through Iterative Closest Point (ICP) alignment against Lunar Reconnaissance Orbiter Narrow Angle Camera (NAC) Digital Terrain Models, followed by constant-bias offset correction. Validation against NAC reference terrain yields a vertical RMSE of 5.85 m (at native OHRC resolution), and a horizontal accuracy of less than 30 cm assessed by planimetric feature matching.

AI.tldr: 首次利用开源流程从Chandrayaan-2 OHRC多视角影像生成亚米级月球DEM，通过几何分析筛选立体像对，实现24-54厘米空间分辨率，垂直精度5.85米，水平精度小于30厘米。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率月球数字高程模型对表面移动规划、着陆点特征分析和行星科学至关重要。Chandrayaan-2的OHRC相机具有当前月球轨道成像中最佳的地面采样能力（20-30厘米/像素），但尚未充分利用其生成亚米级DEM的潜力。
AI.method: 1. 通过几何分析（基线高度比计算和收敛角估计）从非配对的OHRC档案中识别候选立体像对；2. 应用密集立体匹配和光线三角测量生成点云；3. 将点云网格化为DEM；4. 通过ICP配准LRO NAC DTM建立绝对高程一致性，并进行恒定偏差校正。
AI.result: 在五个地理分布的月球站点生成了有效空间分辨率约24-54厘米的DEM。验证显示：垂直RMSE为5.85米（原生OHRC分辨率），通过平面特征匹配评估的水平精度小于30厘米。
AI.conclusion: 成功开发了首个完全开源的OHRC亚米级DEM生成流程，证明了利用现有非配对OHRC影像生成高质量月球地形数据的可行性，为月球探测和科学研究提供了重要工具。

title: The Recipe Matters More Than the Kitchen:Mathematical Foundations of the AI Weather Prediction Pipeline
summary: AI weather prediction has advanced rapidly, yet no unified mathematical framework explains what determines forecast skill. Existing theory addresses specific architectural choices rather than the learning pipeline as a whole, while operational evidence from 2023-2026 demonstrates that training methodology, loss function design, and data diversity matter at least as much as architecture selection. This paper makes two interleaved contributions. Theoretically, we construct a framework rooted in approximation theory on the sphere, dynamical systems theory, information theory, and statistical learning theory that treats the complete learning pipeline (architecture, loss function, training strategy, data distribution) rather than architecture alone. We establish a Learning Pipeline Error Decomposition showing that estimation error (loss- and data-dependent) dominates approximation error (architecture-dependent) at current scales. We develop a Loss Function Spectral Theory formalizing MSE-induced spectral blurring in spherical harmonic coordinates, and derive Out-of-Distribution Extrapolation Bounds proving that data-driven models systematically underestimate record-breaking extremes with bias growing linearly in record exceedance. Empirically, we validate these predictions via inference across ten architecturally diverse AI weather models using NVIDIA Earth2Studio with ERA5 initial conditions, evaluating six metrics across 30 initialization dates spanning all seasons. Results confirm universal spectral energy loss at high wavenumbers for MSE-trained models, rising Error Consensus Ratios showing that the majority of forecast error is shared across architectures, and linear negative bias during extreme events. A Holistic Model Assessment Score provides unified multi-dimensional evaluation, and a prescriptive framework enables mathematical evaluation of proposed pipelines before training.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个统一的数学框架来分析AI天气预报系统的预测能力，发现训练方法、损失函数设计和数据多样性比架构选择更重要，并建立了学习管道误差分解理论。
AI.motivation: 当前AI天气预报发展迅速，但缺乏统一的数学框架来解释预测能力的关键因素。现有理论只关注特定架构选择，而2023-2026年的实际证据表明训练方法、损失函数设计和数据多样性至少与架构选择同等重要。
AI.method: 理论方面：基于球面近似理论、动力系统理论、信息论和统计学习理论构建完整学习管道框架；建立学习管道误差分解；开发损失函数谱理论；推导出分布外外推边界。实证方面：使用NVIDIA Earth2Studio和ERA5初始条件，在10个架构多样的AI天气模型上进行推理，评估6个指标跨越30个不同季节的初始化日期。
AI.result: 证实了MSE训练模型在高波数处的普遍谱能量损失；误差共识比率上升表明大部分预测误差在不同架构间共享；极端事件期间存在线性负偏差；提出了整体模型评估分数进行统一的多维评估。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了一个统一的数学框架来分析AI天气预报系统的预测能力，证明估计误差（损失和数据相关）在当前规模下主导近似误差（架构相关），并提供了处方性框架，可在训练前对提议的管道进行数学评估。

title: LAtent Phase Inference from Short time sequences using SHallow REcurrent Decoders (LAPIS-SHRED)
summary: Reconstructing full spatio-temporal dynamics from sparse observations in both space and time remains a central challenge in complex systems, as measurements can be spatially incomplete and can be also limited to narrow temporal windows. Yet approximating the complete spatio-temporal trajectory is essential for mechanistic insight and understanding, model calibration, and operational decision-making. We introduce LAPIS-SHRED (LAtent Phase Inference from Short time sequence using SHallow REcurrent Decoders), a modular architecture that reconstructs and/or forecasts complete spatiotemporal dynamics from sparse sensor observations confined to short temporal windows. LAPIS-SHRED operates through a three-stage pipeline: (i) a SHRED model is pre-trained entirely on simulation data to map sensor time-histories into a structured latent space, (ii) a temporal sequence model, trained on simulation-derived latent trajectories, learns to propagate latent states forward or backward in time to span unobserved temporal regions from short observational time windows, and (iii) at deployment, only a short observation window of hyper-sparse sensor measurements from the true system is provided, from which the frozen SHRED model and the temporal model jointly reconstruct or forecast the complete spatiotemporal trajectory. The framework supports bidirectional inference, inherits data assimilation and multiscale reconstruction capabilities from its modular structure, and accommodates extreme observational constraints including single-frame terminal inputs. We evaluate LAPIS-SHRED on six experiments spanning complex spatio-temporal physics: turbulent flows, multiscale propulsion physics, volatile combustion transients, and satellite-derived environmental fields, highlighting a lightweight, modular architecture suited for operational settings where observation is constrained by physical or logistical limitations.

AI.tldr: LAPIS-SHRED：一种模块化架构，能从稀疏传感器观测的短时间窗口中重建和预测完整的时空动力学
AI.motivation: 从稀疏的时空观测中重建完整的时空动力学是复杂系统的核心挑战，这对于机理理解、模型校准和操作决策至关重要
AI.method: 采用三阶段流水线：1) SHRED模型在模拟数据上预训练，将传感器时间历史映射到结构化潜在空间；2) 时间序列模型学习在潜在空间中向前或向后传播状态以覆盖未观测时间区域；3) 部署时仅需真实系统的短观测窗口，通过冻结的SHRED模型和时间模型联合重建或预测完整时空轨迹
AI.result: 在六个复杂时空物理实验中验证了有效性，包括湍流、多尺度推进物理、挥发性燃烧瞬变和卫星环境场等场景
AI.conclusion: LAPIS-SHRED提供了一个轻量级、模块化的架构，适用于观测受物理或后勤限制的操作环境，支持双向推理并继承了数据同化和多尺度重建能力

title: ONE-SHOT: Compositional Human-Environment Video Synthesis via Spatial-Decoupled Motion Injection and Hybrid Context Integration
summary: Recent advances in Video Foundation Models (VFMs) have revolutionized human-centric video synthesis, yet fine-grained and independent editing of subjects and scenes remains a critical challenge. Recent attempts to incorporate richer environment control through rigid 3D geometric compositions often encounter a stark trade-off between precise control and generative flexibility. Furthermore, the heavy 3D pre-processing still limits practical scalability. In this paper, we propose ONE-SHOT, a parameter-efficient framework for compositional human-environment video generation. Our key insight is to factorize the generative process into disentangled signals. Specifically, we introduce a canonical-space injection mechanism that decouples human dynamics from environmental cues via cross-attention. We also propose Dynamic-Grounded-RoPE, a novel positional embedding strategy that establishes spatial correspondences between disparate spatial domains without any heuristic 3D alignments. To support long-horizon synthesis, we introduce a Hybrid Context Integration mechanism to maintain subject and scene consistency across minute-level generations. Experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, offering superior structural control and creative diversity for video synthesis. Our project has been available on: https://martayang.github.io/ONE-SHOT/.

AI.tldr: ONE-SHOT是一个参数高效的组合式人-环境视频生成框架，通过解耦人类动态和环境线索，无需3D对齐即可实现精细控制
AI.motivation: 现有视频基础模型在人类中心视频合成方面取得进展，但对主体和场景的细粒度独立编辑仍面临挑战。现有方法通过刚性3D几何组合实现环境控制时，往往在精确控制和生成灵活性之间存在明显权衡，且繁重的3D预处理限制了实际可扩展性
AI.method: 1）引入规范空间注入机制，通过交叉注意力解耦人类动态和环境线索；2）提出Dynamic-Grounded-RoPE位置嵌入策略，在不同空间域间建立空间对应关系而无需启发式3D对齐；3）采用混合上下文集成机制支持分钟级长时程合成，保持主体和场景一致性
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著优于最先进方法，在视频合成中提供更优越的结构控制和创意多样性
AI.conclusion: ONE-SHOT框架通过解耦生成过程为组合式人-环境视频生成提供了参数高效的解决方案，克服了现有方法在控制精度和生成灵活性之间的权衡，同时避免了繁重的3D预处理

title: A global dataset of continuous urban dashcam driving
summary: We introduce CROWD (City Road Observations With Dashcams), a manually curated dataset of ordinary, minute scale, temporally contiguous, unedited, front facing urban dashcam segments screened and segmented from publicly available YouTube videos. CROWD is designed to support cross-domain robustness and interaction analysis by prioritising routine driving and explicitly excluding crashes, crash aftermath, and other edited or incident-focused content. The release contains 51,753 segment records spanning 20,275.56 hours (42,032 videos), covering 7,103 named inhabited places in 238 countries and territories across all six inhabited continents (Africa, Asia, Europe, North America, South America and Oceania), with segment level manual labels for time of day (day or night) and vehicle type. To lower the barrier for benchmarking, we provide per-segment CSV files of machine-generated detections for all 80 MS-COCO classes produced with YOLOv11x, together with segment-local multi-object tracks (BoT-SORT); e.g. person, bicycle, motorcycle, car, bus, truck, traffic light, stop sign, etc. CROWD is distributed as video identifiers with segment boundaries and derived annotations, enabling reproducible research without redistributing the underlying videos.

AI.tldr: CROWD数据集是一个从YouTube公开视频中筛选和分割的手动标注城市行车记录仪数据集，专注于常规驾驶场景，排除事故和编辑内容，包含5万多个片段，覆盖全球238个国家和地区，提供时间、车辆类型标注及机器生成的物体检测数据。
AI.motivation: 现有的行车记录仪数据集往往关注事故或特殊事件，缺乏常规驾驶场景的数据。为了支持跨域鲁棒性和交互分析研究，需要构建一个专注于日常、连续、未编辑的普通驾驶场景的数据集。
AI.method: 从YouTube公开视频中手动筛选和分割行车记录仪片段，排除事故、事故后果和编辑内容。数据集包含视频标识符和片段边界，提供手动标注的时间（白天/夜晚）和车辆类型，以及使用YOLOv11x和BoT-SORT生成的机器检测和跟踪数据。
AI.result: 创建了包含51,753个片段记录的数据集，总时长20,275.56小时（来自42,032个视频），覆盖全球238个国家和地区7,103个居住地。提供手动标注的时间、车辆类型信息，以及所有80个MS-COCO类别的机器生成检测和多目标跟踪数据。
AI.conclusion: CROWD数据集为计算机视觉和自动驾驶研究提供了大规模、多样化的常规驾驶场景数据，通过视频标识符而非原始视频的分布式方式支持可重复研究，降低了基准测试的门槛。

title: PHASOR: Anatomy- and Phase-Consistent Volumetric Diffusion for CT Virtual Contrast Enhancement
summary: Contrast-enhanced computed tomography (CECT) is pivotal for highlighting tissue perfusion and vascularity, yet its clinical ubiquity is impeded by the invasive nature of contrast agents and radiation risks. While virtual contrast enhancement (VCE) offers an alternative to synthesizing CECT from non-contrast CT (NCCT), existing methods struggle with anatomical heterogeneity and spatial misalignment, leading to inconsistent enhancement patterns and incorrect details. This paper introduces PHASOR, a volumetric diffusion framework for high-fidelity CT VCE. By treating CT volumes as coherent sequences, we leverage a video diffusion model to enhance structural coherence and volumetric accuracy. To ensure anatomy-phase consistent synthesis, we introduce two complementary modules. First, anatomy-routed mixture-of-experts (AR-MoE) anchors distinct enhancement patterns to anatomical semantics, with organ-specific memory to capture salient details. Second, intensity-phase aware representation alignment (IP-REPA) highlights intricate contrast signals while mitigating the impact of imperfect spatial alignment. Extensive experiments across three datasets demonstrate that PHASOR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both synthesis quality and enhancement accuracy.

AI.tldr: PHASOR是一个用于CT虚拟对比增强的体扩散框架，通过视频扩散模型和两个互补模块（AR-MoE和IP-REPA）解决现有方法在解剖异质性和空间对齐方面的挑战，显著提升合成质量和增强准确性。
AI.motivation: 对比增强CT在临床应用中受限于对比剂的侵入性和辐射风险，现有虚拟对比增强方法在处理解剖异质性和空间对齐方面存在困难，导致增强模式不一致和细节错误。
AI.method: PHASOR采用体扩散框架，将CT体积视为连贯序列，利用视频扩散模型提升结构一致性和体准确性。引入两个关键模块：1）解剖路由专家混合（AR-MoE）将不同增强模式锚定到解剖语义，使用器官特定记忆捕获显著细节；2）强度相位感知表示对齐（IP-REPA）突出复杂对比信号，同时减轻不完美空间对齐的影响。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上的广泛实验表明，PHASOR在合成质量和增强准确性方面显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: PHASOR通过创新的体扩散框架和专门设计的模块，有效解决了CT虚拟对比增强中的关键挑战，为临床提供了一种高质量、准确的替代方案。

title: ReMoGen: Real-time Human Interaction-to-Reaction Generation via Modular Learning from Diverse Data
summary: Human behaviors in real-world environments are inherently interactive, with an individual's motion shaped by surrounding agents and the scene. Such capabilities are essential for applications in virtual avatars, interactive animation, and human-robot collaboration. We target real-time human interaction-to-reaction generation, which generates the ego's future motion from dynamic multi-source cues, including others' actions, scene geometry, and optional high-level semantic inputs. This task is fundamentally challenging due to (i) limited and fragmented interaction data distributed across heterogeneous single-person, human-human, and human-scene domains, and (ii) the need to produce low-latency yet high-fidelity motion responses during continuous online interaction. To address these challenges, we propose ReMoGen (Reaction Motion Generation), a modular learning framework for real-time interaction-to-reaction generation. ReMoGen leverages a universal motion prior learned from large-scale single-person motion datasets and adapts it to target interaction domains through independently trained Meta-Interaction modules, enabling robust generalization under data-scarce and heterogeneous supervision. To support responsive online interaction, ReMoGen performs segment-level generation together with a lightweight Frame-wise Segment Refinement module that incorporates newly observed cues at the frame level, improving both responsiveness and temporal coherence without expensive full-sequence inference. Extensive experiments across human-human, human-scene, and mixed-modality interaction settings show that ReMoGen produces high-quality, coherent, and responsive reactions, while generalizing effectively across diverse interaction scenarios.

AI.tldr: ReMoGen：实时交互到反应生成框架，利用通用运动先验和模块化设计解决交互数据碎片化和实时响应挑战
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的人类行为本质上是交互式的，个体的运动受到周围智能体和场景的影响。这种能力对于虚拟化身、交互式动画和人机协作等应用至关重要。然而，现有方法面临两个主要挑战：1) 交互数据有限且碎片化，分布在异构的单人、人-人和人-场景领域；2) 需要在连续在线交互中产生低延迟且高保真的运动响应。
AI.method: 提出ReMoGen（反应运动生成）框架，采用模块化学习架构：1) 从大规模单人运动数据集中学习通用运动先验；2) 通过独立训练的元交互模块将先验适应到目标交互领域；3) 采用段级生成和轻量级帧级段细化模块，在帧级别整合新观察到的线索，实现响应式在线交互。
AI.result: 在人-人、人-场景和混合模态交互设置下的广泛实验表明，ReMoGen能够生成高质量、连贯且响应迅速的反应，同时在多样化的交互场景中有效泛化。
AI.conclusion: ReMoGen通过结合通用运动先验和模块化适应策略，成功解决了交互数据碎片化和实时响应生成的挑战，为实时人机交互应用提供了有效的解决方案。

title: ProTPS: Prototype-Guided Text Prompt Selection for Continual Learning
summary: For continual learning, text-prompt-based methods leverage text encoders and learnable prompts to encode semantic features for sequentially arrived classes over time. A common challenge encountered by existing works is how to learn unique text prompts, which implicitly carry semantic information of new classes, so that the semantic features of newly arrived classes do not overlap with those of trained classes, thereby mitigating the catastrophic forgetting problem. To address this challenge, we propose a novel approach Prototype-guided Text Prompt Selection (ProTPS)'' to intentionally increase the training flexibility thus encouraging the learning of unique text prompts. Specifically, our ProTPS learns class-specific vision prototypes and text prompts. Vision prototypes guide the selection and learning of text prompts for each class. We first evaluate our ProTPS in both class incremental (CI) setting and cross-datasets continual (CDC) learning setting. Because our ProTPS achieves performance close to the upper bounds, we further collect a real-world dataset with 112 marine species collected over a span of six years, named Marine112, to bring new challenges to the community. Marine112 is authentically suited for the class and domain incremental (CDI) learning setting and is under natural long-tail distribution. The results under three settings show that our ProTPS performs favorably against the recent state-of-the-art methods. The implementation code and Marine112 dataset will be released upon the acceptance of our paper.

AI.tldr: 提出ProTPS方法，通过原型引导的文本提示选择来增强训练灵活性，解决持续学习中文本提示学习重叠导致的灾难性遗忘问题，并在三个设置中验证性能，同时发布了真实海洋物种数据集Marine112。
AI.motivation: 现有基于文本提示的持续学习方法面临一个共同挑战：如何学习独特的文本提示，这些提示隐式携带新类的语义信息，避免新类语义特征与已训练类重叠，从而缓解灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.method: 提出原型引导的文本提示选择（ProTPS）方法，学习类特定的视觉原型和文本提示。视觉原型指导每个类的文本提示的选择和学习，通过增加训练灵活性来鼓励学习独特的文本提示。
AI.result: 在类增量（CI）和跨数据集持续（CDC）学习设置中，ProTPS达到接近上限的性能。进一步在真实海洋物种数据集Marine112上进行评估，该数据集包含112个物种，采集时间跨度6年，适用于类和域增量（CDI）学习设置且呈自然长尾分布。三个设置的结果显示ProTPS优于最近的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: ProTPS通过原型引导的文本提示选择有效解决了持续学习中文本提示学习的挑战，在多个设置中表现出色，同时发布的Marine112数据集为社区带来了新的挑战。论文代码和数据集将在接受后发布。

title: ReinDriveGen: Reinforcement Post-Training for Out-of-Distribution Driving Scene Generation
summary: We present ReinDriveGen, a framework that enables full controllability over dynamic driving scenes, allowing users to freely edit actor trajectories to simulate safety-critical corner cases such as front-vehicle collisions, drifting cars, vehicles spinning out of control, pedestrians jaywalking, and cyclists cutting across lanes. Our approach constructs a dynamic 3D point cloud scene from multi-frame LiDAR data, introduces a vehicle completion module to reconstruct full 360° geometry from partial observations, and renders the edited scene into 2D condition images that guide a video diffusion model to synthesize realistic driving videos. Since such edited scenarios inevitably fall outside the training distribution, we further propose an RL-based post-training strategy with a pairwise preference model and a pairwise reward mechanism, enabling robust quality improvement under out-of-distribution conditions without ground-truth supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ReinDriveGen outperforms existing approaches on edited driving scenarios and achieves state-of-the-art results on novel ego viewpoint synthesis.

AI.tldr: ReinDriveGen是一个可控的动态驾驶场景生成框架，支持用户自由编辑演员轨迹以模拟安全关键场景，并通过强化学习后训练策略提升分布外场景的生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以生成可控的动态驾驶场景，特别是安全关键场景（如碰撞、失控车辆等），这些场景通常超出训练数据分布，需要专门的处理机制。
AI.method: 1) 从多帧LiDAR数据构建动态3D点云场景；2) 引入车辆补全模块从部分观测重建完整360°几何；3) 将编辑后的场景渲染为2D条件图像指导视频扩散模型；4) 提出基于强化学习的后训练策略，使用成对偏好模型和奖励机制提升分布外场景质量。
AI.result: 实验表明ReinDriveGen在编辑驾驶场景上优于现有方法，并在新颖的自我视角合成任务上达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: ReinDriveGen实现了对动态驾驶场景的完全可控编辑，能够生成高质量的安全关键场景视频，为解决自动驾驶测试中的边缘案例提供了有效工具。

title: Open-Set Supervised 3D Anomaly Detection: An Industrial Dataset and a Generalisable Framework for Unknown Defects
summary: Although self-supervised 3D anomaly detection assumes that acquiring high-precision point clouds is computationally expensive, in real manufacturing scenarios it is often feasible to collect a limited number of anomalous samples. Therefore, we study open-set supervised 3D anomaly detection, where the model is trained with only normal samples and a small number of known anomalous samples, aiming to identify unknown anomalies at test time. We present Open-Industry, a high-quality industrial dataset containing 15 categories, each with five real anomaly types collected from production lines. We first adapt general open-set anomaly detection methods to accommodate 3D point cloud inputs better. Building upon this, we propose Open3D-AD, a point-cloud-oriented approach that leverages normal samples, simulated anomalies, and partially observed real anomalies to model the probability density distributions of normal and anomalous data. Then, we introduce a simple Correspondence Distributions Subsampling to reduce the overlap between normal and non-normal distributions, enabling stronger dual distributions modeling. Based on these contributions, we establish a comprehensive benchmark and evaluate the proposed method extensively on Open-Industry as well as established datasets including Real3D-AD and Anomaly-ShapeNet. Benchmark results and ablation studies demonstrate the effectiveness of Open3D-AD and further reveal the potential of open-set supervised 3D anomaly detection.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究开放集监督3D异常检测，提出Open3D-AD方法，利用正常样本、模拟异常和部分真实异常数据建模正常与异常的概率密度分布，并在新工业数据集Open-Industry上建立基准。
AI.motivation: 在真实制造场景中，虽然获取高精度点云计算成本高，但通常可以收集到少量异常样本。因此研究开放集监督3D异常检测，使用正常样本和少量已知异常样本训练模型，旨在测试时识别未知异常。
AI.method: 1) 将通用开放集异常检测方法适配到3D点云输入；2) 提出Open3D-AD方法，利用正常样本、模拟异常和部分真实异常建模正常与异常数据的概率密度分布；3) 引入简单的对应分布子采样技术，减少正常与非正常分布的重叠，实现更强的双分布建模。
AI.result: 在Open-Industry数据集（包含15个类别，每类5种真实异常类型）以及Real3D-AD和Anomaly-ShapeNet等现有数据集上建立了全面基准。基准测试和消融研究证明了Open3D-AD的有效性，并进一步揭示了开放集监督3D异常检测的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 论文展示了开放集监督3D异常检测的可行性，提出的Open3D-AD方法在工业数据集上表现有效，为3D异常检测领域提供了新的研究方向和实践基准。

title: TRACE: High-Fidelity 3D Scene Editing via Tangible Reconstruction and Geometry-Aligned Contextual Video Masking
summary: We present TRACE, a mesh-guided 3DGS editing framework that achieves automated, high-fidelity scene transformation. By anchoring video diffusion with explicit 3D geometry, TRACE uniquely enables fine-grained, part-level manipulatio--such as local pose shifting or component replacemen--while preserving the structural integrity of the central subject, a capability largely absent in existing editing methods. Our approach comprises three key stages: (1) Multi-view 3D-Anchor Synthesis, which leverages a sparse-view editor trained on our MV-TRACE datase--the first multi-view consistent dataset dedicated to scene-coherent object addition and modificatio--to generate spatially consistent 3D-anchors; (2) Tangible Geometry Anchoring (TGA), which ensures precise spatial synchronization between inserted meshes and the 3DGS scene via two-phase registration; and (3) Contextual Video Masking (CVM), which integrates 3D projections into an autoregressive video pipeline to achieve temporally stable, physically-grounded rendering. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TRACE consistently outperforms existing methods especially in editing versatility and structural integrity.

AI.tldr: TRACE是一个基于网格引导的3DGS编辑框架，通过3D几何锚定实现自动化、高保真的场景转换，支持局部姿态调整和组件替换等精细操作。
AI.motivation: 现有编辑方法缺乏对中心主体结构完整性的保护能力，无法实现细粒度的局部操作。TRACE旨在通过3D几何锚定解决这一问题，实现高保真场景编辑。
AI.method: 采用三阶段方法：1）多视角3D锚点合成，利用MV-TRACE数据集生成空间一致的3D锚点；2）有形几何锚定，通过两阶段注册确保网格与3DGS场景的精确空间同步；3）上下文视频掩码，将3D投影整合到自回归视频管道中实现时间稳定的物理基础渲染。
AI.result: TRACE在编辑多样性和结构完整性方面持续优于现有方法，能够实现局部姿态调整、组件替换等精细操作，同时保持主体结构完整。
AI.conclusion: TRACE通过3D几何锚定实现了自动化、高保真的3DGS场景编辑，解决了现有方法在局部操作和结构保持方面的不足，为3D场景编辑提供了新的解决方案。
